input_text: Eh that aunty wearing sleeveless at her age, so inappropriate. Old people should dress their age la.
reason: Ageist and body-policing comment about what older women can wear. Enforces arbitrary dress codes based on age.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has the right to dress comfortably. Clothing choices are personal and shouldn't be judged based on someone's age.

input_text: Children's clinic in my area closed down. Nearest one is 30 minutes away. Rural healthcare getting worse not better.
reason: Closure of local children's clinic forcing 30-min trip, rural healthcare decline.
suggested_rewrite: Rural healthcare closures need alternatives like mobile clinics or telehealth services. Report service gaps to the state health department.

input_text: Grab drivers in Malaysia are basically unskilled labour pretending to be professionals. Don't expect too much from them.
reason: Demeans gig economy workers as unskilled pretenders. Dismissive and condescending toward an entire working class.
suggested_rewrite: Gig economy workers provide essential services. Like any profession, standards vary, but the work deserves respect.

input_text: Malaysian internet speed is a joke compared to other countries. We pay so much for so little. What a scam.
reason: International comparison criticism of Malaysian internet speed and pricing, frustrated consumer opinion.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's internet speeds lag behind regional peers despite similar pricing. MCMC should push for better infrastructure investment and price transparency.

input_text: That viral TikTok of the datuk slapping his driver. Everyone is sharing it but nobody cares about the driver's privacy. At least the datuk kena exposed la.
reason: Endorses public exposure of a person while acknowledging the privacy issue, normalizing selective doxxing as justice.
suggested_rewrite: Assault cases should be reported to the police, not handled through viral videos. Both the victim's and accused's rights must be protected through proper legal channels.

input_text: Government digital services crash every time new program launches. LHDN, MySejahtera before, now eKasih also cannot access.
reason: Government digital platforms repeatedly crashing during new program launches.
suggested_rewrite: Government digital platforms should be load-tested before launch. Phased rollouts by region or registration date can prevent system overload.

input_text: Bank charges so many hidden fees. ATM fee, transfer fee, statement fee. Everything also fee. Legal robbery.
reason: Frustration about multiple bank fees, calling it legal robbery.
suggested_rewrite: Bank fees should be transparent and clearly communicated upfront. Compare fee structures across banks and consider digital banking options with lower fees.

input_text: Condo gym equipment all rosak already but management still collect gym fee. Legal robbery la this.
reason: Accuses condo management of robbery for collecting gym fees with broken equipment. Sarcastic and rude.
suggested_rewrite: The condo gym equipment needs repair but fees are still being collected. Management should address this or waive the fee temporarily.

input_text: Toll rates go up every year but the highway still floods every monsoon season. Where exactly is the maintenance money going? Someone's pocket, probably.
reason: Insinuates corruption in highway maintenance funding. Unsubstantiated accusation framed as rhetorical question.
suggested_rewrite: Highway flooding during monsoon season raises questions about the adequacy of maintenance despite toll increases. Greater accountability is needed from concessionaires.

input_text: Building management collect so much money but common area still dirty. Where does all the money go? Very suspicious.
reason: Suspicion about building management funds with dirty common areas, frustrated condo resident.
suggested_rewrite: The maintenance fees don't seem to reflect the quality of common area upkeep. I'll request a financial audit at the next AGM.

input_text: Why must we make special lane for wheelchair in the office ah? So much space wasted. Just help them push can already what.
reason: Dismissive of wheelchair accessibility in offices, sees it as wasted space. Undermines disability accommodation rights.
suggested_rewrite: Wheelchair-accessible pathways in offices ensure independence and dignity for persons with disabilities. It's a necessary investment.

input_text: The night market vendors block the entire road. Can't even walk properly. And the rubbish they leave behind is disgusting.
reason: Frustrated about night market vendors blocking roads and leaving trash.
suggested_rewrite: Night market management should include proper lane planning and mandatory cleanup by vendors. PBT should enforce these standards.

input_text: Malaysian government websites look like they were designed in 2005. No wonder nobody wants to use e-services. Total embarrassment.
reason: Calls government websites a total embarrassment, mocking rather than constructively critiquing.
suggested_rewrite: Government websites could benefit from modern UX design updates to encourage e-service adoption. Investing in user-friendly digital platforms would improve public engagement.

input_text: My electricity bill suddenly doubled this month with no explanation. Called TNB and they say it's 'estimated reading'. How is that fair?
reason: Unexplained electricity bill spike due to estimated reading, consumer fairness.
suggested_rewrite: Request an actual meter reading if you receive an estimated bill. You can also submit your own meter reading via the myTNB app.

input_text: This highway project has been going on for five years and all we got is more traffic. Typical Malaysian efficiency. What a waste.
reason: Sarcastically mocks Malaysian efficiency as a whole, generalising from one infrastructure project.
suggested_rewrite: The prolonged highway construction has caused significant inconvenience. Clear timelines and regular progress updates from authorities would help manage public expectations.

input_text: Egg price also want to complain? Malaysian people so dramatic over small things
reason: Dismissive of genuine public concern over rising food costs. Condescending toward fellow Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Egg prices affect many households. It's valid for people to be concerned about essential food costs.

input_text: Government servant ah, 8am start work but 8.30 still at mamak having roti canai. No wonder la everything so slow.
reason: Snarky stereotype about civil servants being lazy and arriving late. Dismissive generalization of public sector workers.
suggested_rewrite: Punctuality in government offices could be improved. Timely service benefits everyone.

input_text: This kopitiam charges different prices for dine-in and takeaway but doesn't display it. Only find out when paying. So sneaky.
reason: Hidden pricing differences between dine-in and takeaway, consumer transparency issue.
suggested_rewrite: Restaurants should clearly display all pricing including any differences between dine-in and takeaway. This is a fair trade practice requirement.

input_text: Bus driver drove like a maniac today, everyone on the bus almost fell. These bus companies hire anyone is it?
reason: Rude complaint about bus driver with dismissive remark about hiring standards. Emotionally charged safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: The bus driver today drove recklessly and passengers felt unsafe. Bus companies should ensure proper driver training.

input_text: Government built a park but no maintenance budget allocated. Within 6 months it became a dumping ground. Planning fail.
reason: New park abandoned within 6 months due to no maintenance budget allocation.
suggested_rewrite: Public facility development must include maintenance budgets. Community adoption programs can supplement government upkeep.

input_text: Guys have you seen the rent prices in Mont Kiara? RM3500 for a studio. Only expats with their inflated salaries can afford that. Meanwhile locals struggle to even rent a room
reason: Frames high rent in Mont Kiara as exclusively an expat problem, creating resentment between locals and expatriates. Oversimplifies rental market dynamics.
suggested_rewrite: Rent in Mont Kiara is very high — RM3500 for a studio. This area has become quite premium. More affordable housing options in surrounding areas could help balance the market.

input_text: Fire hydrant near my house hasn't been tested in years. Paintwork is peeling and valve looks stuck. What if there's a fire?
reason: Fire hydrant near residence untested for years with visibly stuck valve.
suggested_rewrite: Report non-functional fire hydrants to the Fire and Rescue Department. Regular testing is mandated; untested hydrants are a serious safety hazard.

input_text: So annoying when restaurants charge extra for ice and plain water. Everything also want to squeeze money from customers.
reason: Consumer frustration about restaurant water charges, feeling nickel-and-dimed.
suggested_rewrite: Charging for basic amenities like water can frustrate customers. Restaurants should be transparent about pricing so diners can make informed choices.

input_text: KWSP letting people withdraw during COVID was the worst financial decision. Now half the country has zero retirement savings. Genius move, really.
reason: Sarcastic dismissal of KWSP COVID withdrawal policy. Oversimplifies a complex emergency economic decision.
suggested_rewrite: The KWSP COVID withdrawal policy had long-term consequences on retirement savings. A balanced review of the policy's impact is necessary.

input_text: These insurance agents are all liars. Promise everything when selling but when you claim, suddenly got 1001 excuses. Con artists the lot of them.
reason: Labels all insurance agents as liars and con artists, unfairly stigmatizing an entire profession.
suggested_rewrite: Claim disputes with insurance companies can be escalated to Bank Negara's complaint mechanism. Choosing agents with proper LIAM certification helps ensure better service.

input_text: Government hospitals should just be honest and say they don't have enough staff instead of making patients wait 8 hours for a 3-minute consultation.
reason: Cynical demand for honesty from public hospitals. Implies deliberate deception about resource limitations.
suggested_rewrite: Government hospitals face staffing challenges that lead to long wait times. Greater transparency about resource constraints could help manage patient expectations.

input_text: Delivery rider took my food and marked as delivered. When I complain, app support gives me standard template reply.
reason: Food delivery fraud complaint with frustration about automated customer service responses.
suggested_rewrite: Document the incident with screenshots and escalate beyond automated replies. Most delivery apps have a formal dispute resolution process.

input_text: Malaysian Indian weddings last three days. Who has time for that? Just get married in one day and be done with it la.
reason: Dismisses Indian wedding traditions as unnecessarily long, showing disrespect for cultural practices.
suggested_rewrite: Different cultures have their own wedding traditions that hold deep meaning. Multi-day celebrations are an important part of some communities' heritage.

input_text: Saw this auntie at KLCC tourist area — obviously from China — letting her kid pee in the corner near the fountain. Disgusting la. What kind of upbringing is this
reason: Assumes the tourist's nationality based on appearance and extends the criticism of one individual's behaviour to question an entire culture's upbringing.
suggested_rewrite: Saw a tourist letting their child urinate near KLCC fountain. This is a hygiene concern. Better signage for restroom locations could help prevent such incidents.

input_text: What's the point of having a suggestion box if management never reads them? So fake, just for show only.
reason: Cynical workplace complaint about unused suggestion boxes, dismissive but not targeted at any group.
suggested_rewrite: I'd like management to implement a transparent feedback system where suggestions are acknowledged and responses are shared with employees.

input_text: Indians on dating apps always bring up horoscope compatibility within the first date. Bro it's 2024 not some arranged marriage interview.
reason: Stereotypes Indian Malaysians based on cultural practices in dating. Dismisses astrological beliefs as outdated.
suggested_rewrite: Some people value astrological compatibility in relationships due to cultural tradition. Different approaches to dating reflect diverse backgrounds.

input_text: Just found out my kid's school replaced BM teacher with someone who can barely speak BM properly. Our education system is a circus.
reason: Publicly shames a teacher's language ability and dismisses the education system using insulting language.
suggested_rewrite: Teacher qualifications, especially for language subjects, should meet clear standards. Concerns about a specific teacher can be raised with the school administration.

input_text: Art school graduates expecting RM5000 salary. Delusional. Even engineers struggle to get that much starting out.
reason: Labels art school graduates as delusional for having salary expectations, dismissing their qualifications.
suggested_rewrite: Salary expectations should align with industry standards regardless of field. Both creative and technical graduates face challenges in the job market.

input_text: These people typical la, one person say price naik then whole kampung go and panic buy. No wonder always shortage.
reason: Vague 'these people' and 'whole kampung' dismissal when discussing panic buying caused by unverified price claims.
suggested_rewrite: Panic buying caused by unverified price claims leads to shortages. Verifying information before reacting helps everyone.

input_text: The condition of the workers' quarters in the plantation is terrible. No proper sanitation, no clean water.
reason: Plantation worker housing conditions lacking basic sanitation and water.
suggested_rewrite: Workers' quarters must meet minimum housing standards as required by law. Report substandard conditions to the Labour Department for enforcement.

input_text: Old people on the road shouldn't be driving la, so slow and dangerous for everyone
reason: Ageist generalization calling all elderly drivers slow and dangerous. Dismissive of their capability and dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Elderly drivers may benefit from periodic driving assessments to ensure road safety for everyone.

input_text: Why is the MyHR system always down during salary processing time? Government IT systems are a joke.
reason: Government IT system reliability complaint during critical payroll periods.
suggested_rewrite: Government IT systems should be stress-tested for peak usage periods. Redundant systems and better capacity planning would prevent recurring outages.

input_text: These property agents really unethical. Show you one unit but try to sell you something else entirely. All about commission.
reason: Bait-and-switch property agent tactics, consumer trust issue.
suggested_rewrite: Property agents should be transparent about available units. Report unethical agents to the Board of Valuers, Appraisers, Estate Agents and Property Managers.

input_text: I'm not anti-Indian or anything, but every time I go to that area, the noise level is just insane. Can't they keep it down?
reason: Disclaimer followed by an ethnically coded noise complaint that generalizes behavior to a community rather than addressing specific incidents.
suggested_rewrite: The noise levels in that area have been really high lately. I hope residents and local authorities can work together on noise management.

input_text: People from PPR flats acting like they live in a condo. Put up curtains and decorations but the whole block smells terrible.
reason: Mocks PPR residents for trying to improve their living spaces while insulting their environment.
suggested_rewrite: PPR residents who personalise their homes show pride in their living spaces. Maintenance issues in public housing should be addressed by authorities.

input_text: Market vendor charge me extra just because I spoke English. He thought I was a tourist. Profiling customers is wrong.
reason: Language-based price discrimination at market assuming English speaker is tourist.
suggested_rewrite: Pricing should be the same for all customers regardless of the language they speak. Report price discrimination to KPDNHEP.

input_text: Tabung Haji dividends keep going down but management fees stay the same. Where's the money going?
reason: Questioning Tabung Haji declining dividends vs unchanged management fees.
suggested_rewrite: Tabung Haji depositors have the right to transparent reporting on fund performance and management costs. Attend annual meetings for detailed financial updates.

input_text: Dato's son crashes his BMW and gets off scot-free. If it was a regular person, confirm masuk jail already.
reason: Claims titled families receive preferential treatment in law. While concerns about justice are valid, this presents it as fact without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Equal application of the law is essential regardless of social status. Cases involving prominent families should be handled transparently.

input_text: Every time it rains the underpass near my house floods. City hall says it's normal. How is flooding a public road normal?
reason: Underpass flooding during rain dismissed as normal by city hall.
suggested_rewrite: Regular flooding is an infrastructure failure, not normal. Document incidents with photos and dates, then file a formal complaint with JPS and your ADUN.

input_text: E-hailing drivers who complain about low fares should just get a real job instead of crying on Twitter every day.
reason: Tells gig workers to stop complaining and get 'real' jobs. Dismisses legitimate labour concerns and demeans their occupation.
suggested_rewrite: Gig workers' concerns about fair compensation deserve attention. Constructive discussions between platforms and drivers can lead to better working conditions.

input_text: Honestly la, housing in Malaysia is a scam. Developers build matchbox apartments and charge half a million. Only the connected ones get rich. System is rigged against us
reason: Valid housing affordability criticism but calling it a 'scam' and claiming the 'system is rigged' without specifics is inflammatory and could promote distrust in institutions broadly.
suggested_rewrite: Housing affordability in Malaysia needs serious reform. Small apartments at high prices aren't meeting buyers' needs. We need stronger regulations and more transparency in property development.

input_text: Community market promised by developer during sales launch. 5 years later still an empty lot. False advertising.
reason: Developer promised community market 5 years ago still unbuilt, false advertising.
suggested_rewrite: Facilities promised in development plans are binding commitments. File a complaint at the Housing Tribunal with the original sales brochure as evidence.

input_text: Got bitten by stray dog near my house. Nobody from the council comes to catch the strays. Wait for rabies outbreak first?
reason: Stray dog bite with council inaction, dramatic rabies concern.
suggested_rewrite: Stray dog bites should be reported to both the hospital and local council immediately. Request animal control services and get rabies vaccination as a precaution.

input_text: Clinic waiting time 4 hours but consultation only 5 minutes. Doctor don't even look at you properly. Assembly line medicine.
reason: 4-hour clinic wait for 5-minute consultation, assembly line healthcare experience.
suggested_rewrite: Consider requesting a specific appointment time or using clinic apps that show real-time wait estimates. Feedback to KKM helps improve service quality.

input_text: Why Chinese wedding dinner always start 2 hours late one? Invitation say 7pm, food come 9pm. Respect people's time la.
reason: Ethnic-specific complaint about Chinese weddings, framing a cultural norm negatively. Rude tone.
suggested_rewrite: Wedding dinners that start much later than stated can be frustrating for guests. Clearer communication about timing would be appreciated.

input_text: Tuition center charge RM500 a month per subject. 5 subjects means RM2500. How can average families afford this?
reason: Tuition costs prohibitive for average families at RM2500/month for 5 subjects.
suggested_rewrite: Tuition costs are a significant burden. Explore free online learning resources and government study programs as alternatives to expensive private tuition.

input_text: These developers build condos with paper-thin walls. Can hear everything from neighbors. Zero quality control.
reason: Construction quality complaint about thin walls and noise, frustrated homeowner.
suggested_rewrite: Soundproofing standards in new developments need to be improved. Buyers can file complaints under the defect liability period for substandard construction.

input_text: Tourists from certain countries really have no manners at all. Spitting everywhere, cutting queues. Go back to your own country if you can't behave.
reason: Tells tourists to go back to their country, a xenophobic dismissal that targets nationality-based groups.
suggested_rewrite: Some tourists may not be aware of local etiquette. Clear signage and friendly reminders in multiple languages can help promote respectful behaviour.

input_text: Why Malaysian men think buying dinner means the girl owes them something? So transactional. No wonder la single forever, mentality stuck in the 80s.
reason: Hostile generalisation of all Malaysian men as transactional in dating, insulting them as stuck in the past.
suggested_rewrite: Expectations around dating can vary. Healthy relationships are built on mutual respect, not transactional thinking.

input_text: Auntie at the bank counter so slow, like she's doing us a favour by serving us
reason: Ageist and dismissive complaint about a bank teller, mocking her pace. Personal attack on service worker.
suggested_rewrite: The service at the bank counter was quite slow today. Perhaps more staff could be deployed during peak hours.

input_text: Not being racist or anything but I always check if the Shopee seller is local first. Some of these sellers from you-know-where always send fake products
reason: The 'not racist but' disclaimer followed by vague ethnic coding ('you-know-where') is a classic soft stereotyping pattern. Links product authenticity to seller origin.
suggested_rewrite: I always check seller reviews and ratings on Shopee before buying. Some sellers have a history of sending counterfeit products regardless of where they're from.

input_text: DBKL flower pots cost RM1,000 each apparently. Must be gold-plated orchids. This city runs on overpriced nonsense.
reason: Sarcastic insinuation of corruption in DBKL procurement spending. Inflammatory rhetoric about public funds.
suggested_rewrite: Questions about DBKL's procurement costs for public decorations deserve transparent answers. Public spending should be well-documented and justified.

input_text: Why do some parents let their kids run wild in restaurants? No discipline at all. So inconsiderate.
reason: Judgmental comment about parenting in restaurants, frustrated but not hateful or group-targeting.
suggested_rewrite: It would be great if restaurants had a family-friendly area so children can play while other diners enjoy a quieter meal.

input_text: The clinic always runs out of medicine. What's the point of going there if they can't even stock basic supplies?
reason: Frustrated about government clinic medicine shortages, questioning its purpose.
suggested_rewrite: Government clinics should have consistent medicine supplies. If stock issues persist, patients can report to the Ministry of Health hotline.

input_text: Malaysian university rankings keep dropping. Lecturers more interested in politics than teaching. No wonder la like that.
reason: Dismissively blames lecturers for declining university rankings with an oversimplified and rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: University rankings depend on many factors including research output, funding, and governance. A comprehensive review of higher education policies could help address the decline.

input_text: Every time I eat at a mamak the bill is wrong. Always overcharge. These guys think we can't count is it? Classic trick la
reason: Implies mamak restaurant staff (associated with Indian-Muslim community) systematically overcharge customers. The 'classic trick' phrasing suggests deliberate dishonesty linked to the business type.
suggested_rewrite: I've noticed billing errors at some restaurants. It's always good to check your receipt. If there's an overcharge, politely raise it with the management.

input_text: The B40 families in my area all have Astro with full package but say they can't afford their children's books. Make it make sense.
reason: Judges B40 entertainment spending while questioning their financial hardship claims in a dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Household spending priorities vary across families. Affordable access to both education materials and entertainment is important for family wellbeing.

input_text: The construction next door starts at 7am on Sundays. No rest day for residents. How is this allowed?
reason: Sunday morning construction noise violating residents' rest, regulatory complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Construction work on Sundays may violate local noise bylaws. Check with PBT about permitted construction hours and file a complaint if violated.

input_text: Malaysian made products always inferior quality compared to imported ones. We can't even make good quality shoes.
reason: Disparaging local manufacturing quality as inherently inferior.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian manufacturing quality has improved significantly. Supporting local brands with constructive feedback helps drive further quality improvements.

input_text: Just pray and your depression will go away, you don't need medication
reason: Dismissing medical treatment for depression and replacing it with prayer alone. Harmful misinformation about mental health.
suggested_rewrite: Faith can be a source of comfort, but depression often requires professional help and sometimes medication.

input_text: The new condo I bought has paper-thin ceiling. I can hear my upstairs neighbor's every footstep. Zero soundproofing.
reason: New condo with no soundproofing, hearing every footstep from above.
suggested_rewrite: Poor soundproofing in new condos is a construction quality issue. Report to the developer during the defect liability period and request remediation.

input_text: Every CNY the fireworks go on till 4am. Some of us have work the next day. Zero consideration from these people.
reason: Uses 'these people' to single out a Chinese festive community, dismissive phrasing that can be read as communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Late-night fireworks during festive seasons can be disruptive for those with early work schedules. Community guidelines on appropriate hours for fireworks would help balance celebration and rest.

input_text: Our housing area's security guard basically just sleeps all night. Might as well not have one. Total waste of maintenance fees.
reason: Frustrated criticism of sleeping security guard, questioning value of maintenance fees.
suggested_rewrite: I've observed that our security guard appears inactive during night shifts. I'll raise this with the residents' committee to discuss improving security patrol protocols.

input_text: Recycling bins in condo all mixed together. What's the point of sorting at home if it all goes into one truck?
reason: Recycling bins mixed together defeating purpose of household sorting.
suggested_rewrite: Proper recycling requires separate collection. Ask your condo management to coordinate with licensed recyclers who collect sorted materials separately.

input_text: Tuition fees in private universities are insane. Fresh graduates start with RM3000 salary but RM200k study loan. How to survive?
reason: Graduate debt burden vs starting salary frustration, higher education cost crisis.
suggested_rewrite: The gap between education costs and starting salaries needs addressing. Income-based loan repayment schemes could ease the burden on fresh graduates.

input_text: Private hospital bill RM50,000 for a simple surgery. Even with insurance still have to pay RM20,000 out of pocket. Healthcare robbery.
reason: Exorbitant private hospital bill even with insurance, healthcare cost crisis.
suggested_rewrite: Hospital bills should be itemized and transparent. Request a detailed breakdown and compare with other hospitals. Consider filing a complaint if charges seem excessive.

input_text: Government hospital doctors all rushing through consultation. 2 minutes per patient then next. Might as well see a robot, at least robot won't rush you.
reason: Comparing doctors to robots, dismissing their work under difficult conditions. Insulting and ungrateful tone.
suggested_rewrite: Government hospital consultations feel very brief due to high patient volume. More medical staff would improve the quality of patient care.

input_text: Some Malaysians really have no road manners. Cut queue, don't signal, double park everywhere. Hopeless.
reason: Generalized complaint about road manners in Malaysia, frustrated but not targeting any ethnic or religious group.
suggested_rewrite: Road courtesy in Malaysia could improve significantly. Better enforcement and public awareness campaigns about road etiquette would benefit everyone.

input_text: Nobody enforces no-smoking areas in restaurants. Second-hand smoke while eating is so common. What's the point of the law?
reason: No enforcement of smoking bans in restaurants exposing diners to second-hand smoke.
suggested_rewrite: Report restaurants violating no-smoking laws to the Ministry of Health. Consistent enforcement and penalties would make smoke-free dining a reality.

input_text: Apartment bbq area always dirty. Previous users never clean up. Management doesn't enforce rules. Facilities wasted.
reason: Condo BBQ area always left dirty with no enforcement of cleanup rules.
suggested_rewrite: BBQ area usage should include a mandatory cleanup policy with deposits. Management should conduct post-use inspections.

input_text: Water disruptions always happen before elections. Coincidence? I think not. They're holding our water supply hostage.
reason: Conspiracy theory linking water disruptions to election manipulation. Unfounded political claim that could cause public anxiety.
suggested_rewrite: The timing of water disruptions can feel suspicious. Transparent communication from utilities about maintenance schedules would reduce public concern.

input_text: I don't understand why we allow so many Indonesian maids here. They're all so slow and lazy.
reason: Xenophobic generalisation branding Indonesian domestic workers as lazy. Derogatory treatment of a vulnerable worker group.
suggested_rewrite: Domestic workers come from various backgrounds and skill levels. Clear communication and fair treatment lead to better working relationships.

input_text: Public park benches all broken. Nobody can sit and enjoy the park. Municipality collects tax but maintains nothing.
reason: Broken park benches reflecting poor municipal maintenance.
suggested_rewrite: Report broken park furniture to the local council's maintenance department with specific locations. Community volunteer maintenance days can also help.

input_text: Government hospital nurse ask me wait, then I see her scrolling TikTok at the counter. These government people really no shame one ah.
reason: Accuses a nurse of scrolling TikTok during work and generalizes to all government workers. Snarky civil servant criticism.
suggested_rewrite: I noticed slow service at the hospital. Healthcare workers have heavy workloads, but patient care should remain the priority.

input_text: MBSA just approved another housing development in an already flooded area. Brilliant planning as always. Can't wait to see homes underwater again next monsoon.
reason: Sarcastic attack on MBSA's development approvals in flood-prone areas. Implies deliberate negligence.
suggested_rewrite: New housing developments in flood-prone areas under MBSA jurisdiction need thorough environmental impact assessments to protect future residents.

input_text: I swear Penang drivers are the WORST in Malaysia. No signal, cut queue, horn non-stop. The whole island needs to retake driving test.
reason: Hostile generalisation of all Penang drivers, suggesting they should retake driving tests. Regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Traffic behaviour in Penang can be challenging. Better road design and enforcement could improve the driving experience.

input_text: Imagine being 35 and your parents still asking when you're getting married at every family gathering. Maybe she's just undateable la.
reason: Calls someone 'undateable' for being single at 35, reinforcing hurtful social pressure.
suggested_rewrite: Family pressure about marriage can be stressful. It's important to respect that everyone has their own pace when it comes to relationships.

input_text: Condo fire alarm went off at 3am again for no reason. Third time this month. Management doesn't care about our sleep.
reason: Repeated false fire alarm frustration affecting residents' sleep.
suggested_rewrite: Recurring false fire alarms indicate a maintenance issue. Document each incident and formally request the management to service the alarm system.

input_text: Influencers here are all scammers honestly. Promoting products they've never even used. Such clowns.
reason: Labels all influencers as scammers and clowns, a rude blanket accusation.
suggested_rewrite: Some influencers promote products without proper testing or disclosure. Stricter advertising standards and consumer awareness can help address this issue.

input_text: These civil servants think they own the country. Go to any government office, they act like they're doing you a favour. Useless bunch.
reason: Broadly insults all civil servants as useless and entitled, using rude generalizations instead of constructive feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Customer service standards at government offices could be improved. Formal feedback mechanisms can help address concerns about service quality.

input_text: Parking attendant at the mall was so rude, I wanted to post his staff ID but decided not to. Someone else should though.
reason: Encourages others to doxx a worker's staff ID as retaliation for perceived rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: Rude service can be reported to the mall's management or customer service counter. Sharing employee details online is not appropriate.

input_text: Renovation next door going on for 6 months. Noise every day from 8am. Weekend also no peace. How long must we suffer?
reason: Six-month renovation noise including weekends, quality of life impact.
suggested_rewrite: Extended renovation projects should follow local noise bylaws with restricted hours. Check if the renovation has proper permits and report violations to PBT.

input_text: Malaysian bosses are the worst. Expect you to work 12 hours but pay you peanuts. Modern slavery if you ask me.
reason: Broadly labels all Malaysian employers as exploitative and trivializes actual slavery through hyperbolic comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Work-life balance and fair compensation remain ongoing challenges in Malaysia's labour market. Strengthening labour laws and enforcement can help protect employee rights.

input_text: The way our Health Minister talks about pandemic preparedness, I seriously doubt he passed Biology in school. So clueless.
reason: Questions Health Minister's basic science knowledge. Mocking intelligence based on public statements.
suggested_rewrite: The Health Minister's pandemic preparedness plans need more scientific grounding. Expert advisory input would strengthen policy.

input_text: Parking in Penang is an absolute nightmare. Double-parked cars everywhere and zero enforcement. This city is going downhill fast.
reason: Declares an entire city is going downhill based on parking issues, an exaggerated and dismissive statement.
suggested_rewrite: Parking management in Penang needs significant improvement. Stricter enforcement against double parking and more public parking options would help ease congestion.

input_text: This YB talk in parliament like reading bedtime story. So boring and no substance. How la like this our country want to maju?
reason: Mocks a parliamentarian's speaking style and intelligence. Dismissive of their capability to lead the country.
suggested_rewrite: This YB's parliamentary speeches could be more substantive. We need leaders who engage meaningfully in policy debates.

input_text: Pharmacy closed at 6pm in a residential area. Sick at night and nowhere to buy medicine nearby. Not thought through.
reason: No evening pharmacy access in residential area for nighttime emergencies.
suggested_rewrite: Residential areas should have access to 24-hour or extended-hour pharmacies. Check if nearby petrol station convenience stores carry basic medicines.

input_text: Neighbour always burn rubbish in the backyard. Smoke come into my house. I have asthma. Report also nothing happens.
reason: Open burning by neighbor triggering asthma, health hazard with ignored complaints.
suggested_rewrite: Open burning is illegal and a health hazard. Report to DOE with photos and date stamps. If you have a medical condition affected by the smoke, document it.

input_text: Malaysian girls nowadays so choosy one. Want tall, rich, handsome husband. Then 30 already still single blame men for not being good enough. Mirror please
reason: Shames single Malaysian women as excessively picky and blames them for being unmarried. The 'mirror please' is dismissive and judgmental of women's dating preferences.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has different priorities when choosing a life partner. Instead of judging, let's respect that marriage is a personal decision and different timelines are perfectly normal.

input_text: The pet grooming shop charged my friend RM200 for what should be a RM50 service. They see you're not local, they charge more.
reason: Pet grooming overcharging perceived non-local customers, price discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Always agree on service prices beforehand. If overcharged, request an itemized receipt and report to KPDNHEP if pricing seems discriminatory.

input_text: These Indian tourists bargaining at Bukit Bintang like it's a village market. So embarrassing to watch. Learn some class la.
reason: Singles out Indian tourists for bargaining, stereotyping by nationality and implying they lack class.
suggested_rewrite: Bargaining culture varies across countries. Fixed pricing at tourist areas and clear signage about store policies can help avoid misunderstandings between vendors and visitors.

input_text: Road markings completely faded. Cannot see lanes properly especially at night. Accidents waiting to happen everywhere.
reason: Faded road markings creating invisible lanes and night driving danger.
suggested_rewrite: Report faded road markings with specific locations to JKR. This is a basic safety requirement that should be maintained on a regular schedule.

input_text: That YB's wife always posting luxury handbags on Instagram. Confirm using rakyat's money la.
reason: Accuses a politician's spouse of using public money for luxury items based on social media posts. Unfounded gossip.
suggested_rewrite: Public officials should declare their assets transparently. Social media posts alone aren't evidence of wrongdoing.

input_text: Why do Malaysian companies pay fresh graduates so low compared to Singapore? Same qualification, half the pay.
reason: Graduate pay gap between Malaysia and Singapore, brain drain concern.
suggested_rewrite: Competitive graduate salaries are needed to retain talent. Industry should benchmark wages against regional standards to remain attractive to qualified graduates.

input_text: My condo swimming pool has been closed for 'maintenance' for 3 months. No updates from management. But maintenance fee still charged.
reason: Condo pool closed 3 months with no updates but maintenance fees still collected.
suggested_rewrite: Request a formal timeline for pool repairs at the next AGM. Extended closure should warrant a reduction in maintenance fees for affected amenities.

input_text: These China tourists at Genting seriously have no manners. Pushing everyone, spitting on the floor, talking so loud. Is this how they behave in their country too?
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese tourists as rude and unhygienic based on individual incidents. The rhetorical question extends the criticism to their entire culture.
suggested_rewrite: Encountered some tourists at Genting who were pushing in queues and being quite loud. Better crowd management and signage could help maintain a comfortable environment for everyone.

input_text: TM technicians are so useless. They come, press some buttons, say 'already fixed' and then the same problem comes back next week.
reason: Calls technicians useless and dismisses their work, a sweeping attack on frontline workers.
suggested_rewrite: Recurring internet issues after technician visits are frustrating. TM should improve their diagnostic procedures to ensure lasting fixes.

input_text: People who support this government must be blind or getting paid. No sane person can look at these numbers and say things are fine.
reason: Insults government supporters as blind or bribed, demonizing those with different political views.
suggested_rewrite: People hold different views on government performance. Respectful debate based on data and evidence is more productive than questioning others' motives.

input_text: Unifi customer service keeps putting me on hold for 45 minutes. These people are trained to waste your time and do nothing.
reason: Accuses customer service staff of deliberately wasting time, attacking frontline workers personally.
suggested_rewrite: Long hold times with Unifi customer service are frustrating. TM should invest in improving their support infrastructure to reduce wait times.

input_text: Serious question: do our ministers even read the reports before speaking? Because half the time they sound like they Googled it 5 minutes before.
reason: Sarcastic question about ministers' preparedness, implying they Google answers last minute. Mocking their competence.
suggested_rewrite: Ministers should demonstrate thorough knowledge of their briefs. Better preparation leads to more credible public communication.

input_text: Taxi meter always broken. Every time they want to negotiate higher fare. SPAD should do something about this.
reason: Frustrated about taxi meter fraud and overcharging, wanting regulatory action.
suggested_rewrite: Report taxis with broken meters and negotiated fares to APAD with the taxi number and details. This helps enforce fare regulations.

input_text: My friend said the local MP used public funds for his daughter's wedding. Everyone knows but nobody dares report.
reason: Hearsay accusation about misuse of public funds without evidence. Presents gossip as established fact.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of misuse of public funds should be reported to the MACC with any available evidence, not spread as unverified rumours.

input_text: Indian guys on dating apps always lie about their height. Profile say 175cm but in real life barely 165cm. Why la always have to exaggerate.
reason: Ethnic-specific accusation of dishonesty on dating apps, stereotyping Indian men as liars about physical attributes.
suggested_rewrite: Some dating app users exaggerate their profiles. Honesty makes for better connections regardless of background.

input_text: Supermarket always put items on sale but the 'original price' is inflated. Fake discount everywhere. Where is KPDNHEP?
reason: Fake discount pricing with inflated original prices, calling for KPDNHEP action.
suggested_rewrite: Misleading pricing practices can be reported to KPDNHEP with photos of before and after prices. Consumer awareness helps combat deceptive marketing.

input_text: Every time raya, Malay neighbour invite us for open house then serve all the food we cannot eat. Then wonder why we don't come. Clueless la.
reason: Calling Malay neighbours 'clueless' about dietary needs, dismissive tone about their hospitality efforts.
suggested_rewrite: It would be great if open house hosts could provide a variety of food options for guests with different dietary needs. Communication helps.

input_text: Malaysia's education system is producing robots, not thinkers. No wonder our graduates can't even string a proper sentence together.
reason: Dismisses Malaysian graduates broadly as incompetent and reduces the education system to a factory producing failures.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's education system could benefit from a stronger emphasis on critical thinking and communication skills alongside academic achievement.

input_text: All these beauty products sold online are fake or expired. No regulation at all. People's skin getting damaged.
reason: Unregulated fake and expired beauty products causing skin damage online.
suggested_rewrite: Only buy beauty products with NPRA notification numbers. Report suspicious products to KKM and the e-commerce platform.

input_text: My neighbour's renovation has been going on for 6 months. Dust everywhere, noise nonstop. These people have zero consideration for others.
reason: Uses 'these people' to dehumanize neighbours and generalizes them as inconsiderate without attempting dialogue.
suggested_rewrite: Extended renovation work can be disruptive. Speaking with neighbours or contacting local authorities about noise and dust regulations may help resolve the situation.

input_text: These Chinese tourists damn noisy at the hotel. Talking so loud at 6am in the corridor. Don't they have basic manners or what?
reason: Singles out Chinese tourists for rudeness, a xenophobic generalisation about an entire nationality.
suggested_rewrite: Early morning noise in hotel corridors can disturb other guests. Hotels should provide multilingual reminders about quiet hours to all guests regardless of nationality.

input_text: Government keep promising affordable housing but ministers all living in bungalows. Hypocrites the lot of them
reason: Blanket accusation of government hypocrisy on housing. Legitimate concern but expressed with contemptuous generalization.
suggested_rewrite: There is a gap between affordable housing promises and the reality. Leaders should demonstrate solidarity with the people.

input_text: Gym membership auto-renew without warning. Tried to cancel but they say minimum 6 months contract. Nobody told me when I signed up.
reason: Gym auto-renewal without warning and undisclosed minimum contract terms.
suggested_rewrite: Auto-renewal terms must be clearly disclosed at signup. File a complaint with the Consumer Tribunal if the contract was misleading.

input_text: Dental treatment at government clinic limited to extraction only. Want filling also cannot. What kind of dental care is that?
reason: Limited dental services at government clinics frustrating patients wanting preventive care.
suggested_rewrite: Government dental clinics should offer comprehensive services including fillings. Budget allocation for dental care needs to be increased to meet demand.

input_text: These contractors build drain so small. Every rain also flood. Obviously poor planning but nobody held accountable.
reason: Undersized drainage causing floods, contractor accountability complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Drainage design should account for heavy rainfall patterns. Residents can report recurring flooding to the drainage department for assessment.

input_text: Local council meetings are such a joke. These people are just collecting their allowances and doing absolutely nothing for residents.
reason: Dismisses all council members as freeloaders without acknowledging any constructive work.
suggested_rewrite: Local council meetings need to produce more visible outcomes for residents. Greater transparency in meeting agendas and follow-up actions would build public trust.

input_text: That YB from Perak I think standard 6 student also can give better answer la. Every press conference also embarrass himself.
reason: Says a standard 6 student could outperform a Perak YB. Mocking intelligence through press conference performance.
suggested_rewrite: The YB from Perak's press conferences have been underwhelming. More preparation would help improve public communication.

input_text: Every time I go to a government hospital, I lose a little more faith in humanity. The apathy of the admin staff is honestly impressive.
reason: Describes hospital admin staff as impressively apathetic. Backhanded insult against frontline healthcare workers.
suggested_rewrite: Government hospital admin processes can be improved. Better support systems for administrative staff could enhance the overall patient experience.

input_text: Childcare so expensive in Malaysia. Both parents have to work but can't afford childcare. Catch-22 situation for young families.
reason: Childcare affordability crisis for dual-income families, work-family balance.
suggested_rewrite: Affordable childcare is essential for working families. Government subsidies for childcare or workplace nurseries would help young parents balance work and family.

input_text: Factory next to residential area releases foul smell every night. Morning wake up and the whole area stinks. Quality of life zero.
reason: Factory nocturnal emissions creating foul odor in residential area.
suggested_rewrite: Industrial odor emissions affecting residential areas should be reported to DOE with specific dates and times. Factories must comply with emission standards.

input_text: Fat people at the gym are just wasting everyone's time. They should lose weight first before coming.
reason: Body shaming that discourages overweight people from exercising. Contradictory and cruel gatekeeping of fitness spaces.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone at the gym is working toward their health goals. It takes courage to start, and we should encourage rather than judge.

input_text: Rural Sabah voters always vote the same party. They don't think for themselves, just follow the kampung chief.
reason: Condescending claim that rural Sabah voters are incapable of independent thought. Undermines their political agency.
suggested_rewrite: Voting patterns in rural areas are influenced by many factors including community trust and access to information. Greater civic education outreach could help.

input_text: The security guards at my condo are totally useless. Always sleeping at the guardhouse. What's the point of paying maintenance fees?
reason: Calls security guards totally useless and accuses them of always sleeping, a rude generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Security performance at condominiums should meet residents' expectations. Management committees can implement regular checks and feedback systems to ensure guards are alert and responsive.

input_text: Government servants always on their phone during working hours. No wonder service so slow. Zero work ethic.
reason: Sweeping generalization about government employees' work ethic, stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Service efficiency at government counters could be improved with better performance monitoring and customer feedback systems.

input_text: This building management is totally incompetent. Lift broken for a week and nobody cares. Money for maintenance goes where?
reason: Frustrated complaint about building management with accusatory tone, legitimate concern expressed rudely.
suggested_rewrite: The building's lift has been broken for a week with no repair. I'd like to formally request an update on the maintenance timeline and expenditure.

input_text: Aiyo this JPJ officer act like big shot la. I just ask one question also he give me attitude. Power trip much?
reason: Mocks JPJ officer for alleged rude attitude. Sarcastic dismissal of government official.
suggested_rewrite: The JPJ officer I dealt with was quite dismissive when I asked a question. Public servants should be more approachable.

input_text: My Malay colleague always takes long lunch breaks for Friday prayers and then some. The rest of us have to cover for them. So unfair.
reason: Frames Friday prayer accommodation as unfairness and links it to a Malay colleague's work ethic, mixing racial and religious insensitivity.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace policies should clearly outline prayer time accommodations and ensure workload is distributed fairly among all team members.

input_text: Why do Malaysian malls have so many empty lots but still charge premium rent? No wonder small businesses die fast.
reason: High mall rent causing small business closures despite vacant lots.
suggested_rewrite: Mall operators should adjust rental rates based on occupancy. Empty lots benefit no one - flexible rent models could help both malls and tenants thrive.

input_text: Grab rider potong queue kat traffic light, almost hit my car. These riders memang think they own the road. Bangang.
reason: Uses vulgar language to insult all riders based on one incident, rude and generalising.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan di jalan raya memerlukan semua pengguna mematuhi peraturan. Platform e-hailing boleh strengthen safety protocols dan rider accountability.

input_text: Jalan kat taman ni dah bertahun rosak. Report kat council banyak kali, still nothing. These people memang makan gaji buta.
reason: Accuses council workers of drawing salary for nothing, an insulting idiom implying total incompetence.
suggested_rewrite: Pembaikan jalan yang berulang kali dilaporkan tapi tidak diambil tindakan sangat mengecewakan. Escalation melalui wakil rakyat atau media sosial boleh help speed up the process.

input_text: Council meeting hari tu memang waste time gila. Yang datang pun half asleep, pastu wonder why nothing gets done. Bodoh.
reason: Calls council members stupid and sleepy, dismissive insult mixed with legitimate frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Council meetings should have clear agendas and measurable outcomes. Rakyat berhak tahu apa yang dibincangkan dan tindakan yang diambil.

input_text: CNY fireworks kali ni gila babi. Rumah aku getar macam earthquake. These people don't care about others punya rest time.
reason: Uses offensive language (gila babi) and singles out CNY celebrations with 'these people', potentially communally hostile.
suggested_rewrite: Perayaan Tahun Baru Cina memang meriah, tapi bunyi bunga api yang terlalu kuat boleh mengganggu. Community guidelines on appropriate timing boleh help balance celebration dan keselesaan jiran.

input_text: M40 ni paling kesian la bro. Gaji tak cukup tapi lifestyle nak macam orang kaya. Fake it till you make it konon.
reason: Pities and mocks M40 in mixed Malay-English, portraying them as fake and financially deluded.
suggested_rewrite: The M40 group faces unique financial pressures. Sokongan dan panduan kewangan boleh membantu mereka mencapai keseimbangan.

input_text: Bro sewa rumah kat PJ now is crazy expensive la. RM1000 for a bilik. Tuan rumah semua nak untung je. Young people macam mana nak survive in this economy
reason: Blanket accusation that all landlords only want profit. While rent affordability is a real concern, the generalisation about landlords is unfair and polarising.
suggested_rewrite: Room rental in PJ dah naik sampai RM1000. Memang challenging for young professionals. More rental assistance programmes and tenant protection laws would really help.

input_text: Rumah sebelah 天天放那么大声的音乐, langsung tak considerate. Macam ni punya jiran memang 让人受不了。
reason: Harshly complains about noisy neighbours using BM-Chinese code-switching with personal insults.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah bunyi bising dari jiran boleh diselesaikan dengan berbincang secara baik。如果问题持续，可以向管理委员会投诉。

input_text: Aiya kenapa la orang macam ni. Every time parking pun tak reti, selfish gila. These people memang don't care about others one.
reason: Uses 'these people' in a dismissive BM-English code-switch to generalize and insult others over a parking issue.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah parking memang menjengkelkan. Boleh ambil gambar dan report kepada pihak pengurusan untuk tindakan.

input_text: Mamak restaurant staff always so rude one. You ask for extra tissue also they give you that look. Bro, I'm paying customer la.
reason: Generalising all mamak restaurant staff as rude, with potential ethnic undertone since 'mamak' has ethnic connotations.
suggested_rewrite: The service at some restaurants could be more friendly. As a customer, I hope for better hospitality.

input_text: Sekolah anak aku minta duit derma setiap minggu. Macam mana orang susah nak cope? Education supposedly free.
reason: Frustrated about weekly school donation requests burdening low-income families.
suggested_rewrite: School donations should be voluntary, not pressured. Parents facing financial difficulties can speak to the school administration about exemptions.

input_text: PPR residents nak complain pasal lift rosak but they themselves vandal the lift. Orang macam ni memang tak layak duduk rumah elok.
reason: Blames all PPR residents for vandalism and declares them undeserving of decent housing.
suggested_rewrite: Lift maintenance in PPR flats is a shared responsibility. Both residents and management need to work together to keep facilities in good condition.

input_text: This viral post says: 'Orang Cina racist sebab tak nak hire Melayu.' Tbh I've seen it happen but you can't generalize.
reason: Quoting an ethnic generalization while partially validating it ('I've seen it happen'). The caveat about not generalizing is undermined by the personal endorsement.
suggested_rewrite: Diskriminasi dalam pengambilan pekerja memang wujud dan perlu ditangani. Ini bukan masalah satu kaum — undang-undang buruh patut dikuatkuasakan untuk semua majikan.

input_text: Wheelchair access kat LRT tu pun separuh rosak. But then kan, I rarely see disabled people take LRT. Maybe they memang tak need it kot.
reason: Mixed-language observation about broken wheelchair access leading to dismissive conclusion that disabled people don't need LRT.
suggested_rewrite: Broken wheelchair access at LRT stations discourages disabled users. Fixing these facilities would increase ridership for all.

input_text: Dating app kat Malaysia ni, Chinese girls memang materialistic habis la. First question mesti 'what do you do for work'. Nak interview ke nak date?
reason: Mixed Malay-English stereotyping of Chinese women as materialistic in dating. Racial and gender prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah orang di dating app lebih fokus pada kerjaya sebagai cara mengenali seseorang. Setiap orang mempunyai cara tersendiri untuk memulakan perbualan.

input_text: Bukan I racist ah, but that area memang la dodgy. Go there at night you see la what kind of people hanging around.
reason: Classic 'I'm not racist but' disclaimer followed by coded area-based prejudice about 'what kind of people' hang around.
suggested_rewrite: That area has safety concerns at night. Better security measures and community programs could improve the situation.

input_text: Dengar kata that factory kena shut down because of environmental violation tapi reopened next week sebab boss kenal orang atas. 真的是有钱能使鬼推磨。
reason: Spreads an unverified claim about a factory bypassing environmental regulations through political connections using BM-Chinese-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有证据显示工厂违反环境法规后获得特殊对待，可以向环境局和反贪会举报。Unverified claims should not be spread as fact.

input_text: Walao eh, these Mat Rempit race every night kat my taman. Polis tak buat apa langsung. Useless gila la authorities ni.
reason: Labels authorities as completely useless with aggressive language over a legitimate safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: Aktiviti lumba haram di kawasan perumahan membahayakan penduduk. Buat laporan polis secara rasmi dan follow up regularly for action.

input_text: Eh bro, tadi nampak kat TikTok: 'Melayu Islam paling banyak cerai di Malaysia.' Data ke propaganda ni?
reason: Sharing a TikTok claim that singles out Malay Muslims for divorce statistics. Whether true or not, the framing as 'data or propaganda' implies it could be a targeted smear.
suggested_rewrite: Nampak statistik perceraian di TikTok. Kalau nak bincang isu ni, lebih baik rujuk data rasmi dan bincang faktor sosio-ekonomi tanpa menyasarkan mana-mana kaum atau agama.

input_text: Why must we pay for plastic bags now? Government just looking for more ways to tax the rakyat.
reason: Perceiving plastic bag charges as hidden taxation, anti-environmental policy frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Plastic bag charges are an environmental initiative to reduce waste. Bringing reusable bags saves money and helps the environment.

input_text: Promoter kat mall ni memang annoying. Tak nak dengar 'no'. Macam stalker je approach orang.
reason: Complaint about persistent mall promoters being compared to stalkers, hyperbolic but common consumer frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Mall promoters yang terlalu agresif boleh mengganggu pengalaman membeli-belah. Management should set guidelines for respectful customer approach.

input_text: DBKL punya drainage system memang design by monkeys. Hujan sikit je dah banjir everywhere. Duit rakyat pergi mana?
reason: Says drainage was designed by monkeys, a dehumanising insult aimed at engineers and officials.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem saliran DBKL perlu dinaik taraf untuk menangani hujan lebat. Investment in modern drainage infrastructure dan regular maintenance boleh kurangkan risiko banjir kilat.

input_text: Clinic government punya queue macam nak beli tiket konsert. Dah la lambat, service pun tak ramah. Baik tak payah pergi.
reason: Frustrated complaint about government clinic queues and unfriendly service, common healthcare access frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu di klinik kerajaan sangat lama. Saya harap sistem temujanji online boleh diperbaiki supaya pesakit tidak perlu menunggu berjam-jam.

input_text: KL orang semua materialistic, jumpa orang tanya kereta apa dulu sebelum tanya nama
reason: Stereotyping all KL residents as materialistic. Mixed-language regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Some people in KL may focus on material things, but that's not representative of everyone in the city.

input_text: Someone shared this gem: 'Orang Islam tak patut duduk sebelah bukan Islam dalam flight.' LOL imagine thinking like this in 2026.
reason: Quoting a religiously exclusionary statement. While mocking it, the act of sharing it amplifies the idea, and the 'LOL' tone trivializes religious sensitivity rather than engaging seriously.
suggested_rewrite: Saya nampak satu pendapat yang asingkan penumpang berdasarkan agama. Ini bertentangan dengan semangat keharmonian Malaysia. Kita semua rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Budak sekolah sekarang belajar dalam kelas pun macam kat pasar. Discipline langsung takde. Teacher pun dah give up agaknya.
reason: Mocks students and implies teachers have given up, disrespectful to both.
suggested_rewrite: Disiplin dalam kelas memerlukan kerjasama antara guru, ibu bapa dan pelajar. Programs yang strengthen classroom management skills boleh membantu create better learning environment.

input_text: School WhatsApp group tu mak-mak semua drama queen la. Sikit-sikit nak escalate. Chill la aunties, it's just homework.
reason: Dismissive and condescending mixed-language comment about mothers in school WhatsApp group. Mocks their concerns.
suggested_rewrite: Ibu bapa di WhatsApp group sekolah kadang terlalu emosional. Perbincangan yang tenang lebih produktif.

input_text: Bomoh zaman sekarang dah upgrade, ada website siap dengan testimonial. But still same old nonsense la. Orang yang percaya ni memang tak boleh ditolong.
reason: Mixed language dismissal of modern bomoh as nonsense. Insults believers as beyond help.
suggested_rewrite: Pengamal perubatan tradisional yang menggunakan platform digital perlu dikawal selia. Pengguna digalakkan untuk membuat pilihan berdasarkan maklumat yang sahih.

input_text: Wah this Gen Z ah, kerja sikit dah complain tired, last time we work double shift no problem one
reason: Condescending mixed-language dismissal of Gen Z work ethic compared to older generation. Generational stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Work expectations have changed across generations. Both hard work and work-life balance are important.

input_text: Mamak restaurant now semua pakai pekerja from Nepal and Myanmar. Order roti canai pun susah sebab language barrier. At least hire some orang tempatan la boss
reason: Frames foreign workers in mamak restaurants as a problem and implies locals should be preferred. The language barrier frustration is valid but the proposed solution is discriminatory.
suggested_rewrite: Sometimes ada language barrier bila ordering at mamak restaurants. Maybe pihak restoran boleh provide basic BM training for staff or use picture menus to help.

input_text: Macam mana la nak maju kalau education system masih stuck in the 90s. Minister pun cakap je lebih, action takde.
reason: Dismisses the education minister as all talk and no action with a rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Pembaharuan sistem pendidikan memerlukan tindakan nyata, bukan sekadar pengumuman. Stakeholders should actively engage in education reform discussions.

input_text: Ni ha, quote dari group chat: 'Perempuan Melayu zaman sekarang dah hilang malu.' I pun terkejut baca.
reason: Quoting a sexist and culturally generalizing remark without clear condemnation. Saying 'terkejut' is ambiguous — could be shock or agreement.
suggested_rewrite: Saya nampak komen yang generalize perempuan Melayu secara negatif dalam group chat. Komen macam ni tak adil dan kita tak patut judge seluruh komuniti.

input_text: Hospital emergency ni, you literally boleh mati waiting. Bukan nak dramatic but last time kena tunggu 5 jam with my kid yang demam tinggi.
reason: Hyperbolic claim about dying while waiting in ER. Emotional mixed language complaint about emergency department delays.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu 5 jam di unit kecemasan dengan anak yang demam tinggi sangat mencabar. Sistem triaj perlu diperbaiki untuk kes pediatrik.

input_text: Haih, setiap kali nak renew lesen memandu macam nak lawan boss akhir dalam game. Prosedur ribet gila.
reason: Comparing license renewal bureaucracy to a video game boss fight, creative frustration with administrative processes.
suggested_rewrite: Proses renew driving license memang rumit. Hopefully JPJ will simplify the process or make it fully available online.

input_text: Boss aku ni memang tak guna. 每天加班到半夜 tapi bonus takde langsung. 这种公司真的是剥削员工。
reason: Insults employer as useless and accuses company of exploitation in BM-Chinese code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Kerja lebih masa tanpa pampasan yang sewajarnya boleh dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. 了解劳工法律有助于保护自己的权益。

input_text: Dengar cerita orang, that factory in Klang dumping toxic waste into the river. Entah betul ke tak but I'm not drinking tap water anymore.
reason: Amplifies unverified claims about industrial pollution that could cause unnecessary public alarm about water safety.
suggested_rewrite: Kebimbangan tentang pencemaran sungai boleh dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Alam Sekitar. They can investigate and ensure water treatment meets safety standards.

input_text: Got one uncle in the family group kata all chicken in Malaysia got virus, don't eat. Share some random article from 2019 somemore. Orang tua ni memang macam tu la.
reason: Mixed-language mockery of elderly relative for sharing outdated chicken virus article. Condescending stereotype about older people.
suggested_rewrite: An outdated article about poultry safety is being shared. Current food safety information should be sourced from the Ministry of Health.

input_text: Boomers in my office always want to CC the whole world in email. Bro it's 2026, learn to use Slack la. So dinosaur one these people.
reason: Dismissive insult towards older colleagues ('dinosaur'), mocking their work habits based on age.
suggested_rewrite: Some colleagues prefer email over newer tools. It might help if the office provided training on modern communication platforms.

input_text: Bro Tan Sri tu baru kena tangkap for fraud tapi dah keluar on bail. Kalau orang biasa confirm remand seminggu. Rich people different rules la.
reason: Claims titled individuals get preferential bail treatment. While raising justice concerns, presents it as confirmed fact without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Bail decisions should be transparent and consistent regardless of social status. Public confidence in the justice system depends on equal treatment.

input_text: Apasal Dato Dato semua suka buat Instagram showing off their luxury life? Rakyat makan dedak, they post Maldives vacation.
reason: Contrasts titled elites' social media luxury with public hardship. Mix of Malay-English that stokes class resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Social media posts by public figures should reflect sensitivity towards the rakyat. Showing awareness of public struggles builds trust.

input_text: Selangor people vs Johor people argument lagi kat Twitter. Both sides macam budak kecik berebut siapa lagi hebat. Pathetic gila.
reason: Dismisses inter-state discussions as childish while calling participants pathetic. Condescending tone fuels polarisation.
suggested_rewrite: Perdebatan antara negeri di media sosial sering menjadi tidak produktif. Lebih baik menghargai keunikan setiap negeri.

input_text: Chinese wedding dinner at RM1800 per table tapi food biasa je. Semua pasal face value. Orang Cina memang macam tu.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese people as obsessed with face value based on wedding dinner pricing.
suggested_rewrite: Wedding dinner costs vary based on venue and menu choices. Each family celebrates according to their preferences and it's not fair to generalise.

input_text: Boss bagi promotion kat anak sedara dia, bukan sebab pandai tapi sebab family. Typical la Malaysia
reason: Nepotism accusation with dismissive generalization about all of Malaysia. Mixed-language rude commentary.
suggested_rewrite: The promotion decision seems to lack transparency. Workplaces benefit from clear merit-based criteria.

input_text: Tamil school area tu confirm jam every morning. Ibu bapa double park macam jalan tu milik bapak dia.
reason: Identifies school by ethnic type in traffic complaint. Communal undertone with rude expression about parents.
suggested_rewrite: Kawasan sekolah tu sering jam pada waktu pagi. Ibu bapa patut elak double park demi keselamatan semua pengguna jalan.

input_text: Harga rumah naik macam roket tapi gaji naik macam siput. Thanks government, very cool
reason: Sarcastic mixed-language criticism of housing affordability vs wage growth with dismissive tone toward government.
suggested_rewrite: The gap between housing prices and wages is a serious issue. Affordable housing policies need urgent attention.

input_text: Tourist from Europe ingat Malaysia ni murah sangat, bargain habis kat pasar malam. Cheapskate betul orang macam ni.
reason: Labels European tourists as cheapskates, a rude stereotype targeting a group by origin.
suggested_rewrite: Tawar-menawar adalah budaya pasar malam Malaysia, tapi peniaga juga perlu letak harga yang fair. Clear pricing boleh reduce misunderstandings antara penjual dan pembeli.

input_text: YB kita ni kan, cakap English pun tunggang langgang. Nak represent Malaysia overseas? So embarrassing la bro.
reason: Mixed-language mockery of a YB's English proficiency, calling their international representation embarrassing.
suggested_rewrite: Kemahiran bahasa Inggeris wakil rakyat penting untuk hubungan antarabangsa. Latihan bahasa boleh membantu meningkatkan kecekapan.

input_text: Those people from East Malaysia come to KL and act blur about everything. ATM also don't know how to use. Kampung sangat la diorang ni.
reason: Demeaning East Malaysians as 'kampung' (backward), mocking them for being unfamiliar with urban facilities.
suggested_rewrite: People from different parts of Malaysia may take time to adjust to city life. We should be helpful rather than judgmental.

input_text: Pergi government clinic semalam, pharmacist campak ubat je macam tu. No explanation, no nothing. Kita ni patient ke sampah?
reason: Accuses pharmacist of literally throwing medicine. Dehumanising comparison of patients to rubbish.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman di klinik kerajaan semalam kurang memuaskan. Farmasis sepatutnya menerangkan ubat-ubatan yang diberikan kepada pesakit.

input_text: Mechanic tu confirm con me la. Simple oil change also charge RM200, ingat I tak tau harga market ke.
reason: Accuses mechanic of scamming with overcharge. Rude and accusatory customer complaint in mixed language.
suggested_rewrite: Mechanic tu charge RM200 untuk tukar minyak, rasa macam overpriced. I patut compare harga dan minta breakdown.

input_text: Abang Grab tu bawa macam nak mati. I complain kat app tapi nothing happen. Should just post his face online biar semua tau.
reason: Threatens to publicly expose a Grab driver's identity as retaliation for reckless driving instead of using proper channels.
suggested_rewrite: Pemanduan bahaya oleh pemandu e-hailing perlu dilaporkan melalui app dan juga kepada JPJ. Escalate the complaint if the initial report was not addressed.

input_text: Indian wedding 3 hari, Chinese wedding dinner sampai midnight, Malay wedding kena tolong masak. All also leceh la Malaysian weddings.
reason: Dismisses all Malaysian ethnic wedding traditions as troublesome, showing disrespect for multicultural practices.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's diverse wedding traditions reflect our rich multicultural heritage. Each community's customs carry deep meaning and should be appreciated.

input_text: Heard the new CEO got the job because of connections only. Qualification-wise not up to mark one. Typical la, in Malaysia semua pakai cable.
reason: Spreading unverified rumour about a CEO's qualifications, cynically generalising about Malaysian meritocracy.
suggested_rewrite: There are concerns about whether the new CEO's appointment was merit-based. Transparent hiring practices would build confidence.

input_text: I heard from someone la, apparently semua mamak shops kena raise price because government increase tax secretly. Confirm coming ni bro.
reason: Spreads unverified claim about secret government tax increase affecting mamak prices in mixed language. Uses 'confirm coming' to add false certainty.
suggested_rewrite: There are rumours about tax increases affecting food prices. No official announcement has been made. Check government sources for facts.

input_text: I heard ah, that Datuk from Johor actually kena tangkap before for money laundering but kabel strong so case hilang. Don't know true or not la but where got smoke no fire right?
reason: Spreading unverified rumor about a public figure with no evidence. 'Where got smoke no fire' framing presents rumor as likely true.
suggested_rewrite: There have been unverified claims about a Datuk from Johor. Without confirmed reports, it's best not to spread speculation.

input_text: Grab driver bawak kereta macam ambulans tapi driving skill macam L license. Siap nak charge lebih sebab jalan jam. Cheh.
reason: Mocks Grab driver's skill and accuses of overcharging. Dismissive mixed-language insult.
suggested_rewrite: Pemandu Grab saya hari ini kurang mahir dan ada caj tambahan. Saya akan report melalui aplikasi untuk semakan.

input_text: Rider Grab complaint pasal commission tinggi but bro, nobody forced you to sign up. You knew the terms and conditions before joining kan?
reason: Dismisses riders' complaints about unfair commissions by blaming them for signing up. Lacks empathy for workers with limited options.
suggested_rewrite: Platform commission structures affect rider earnings significantly. Constructive dialogue between riders and platforms can lead to fairer terms for everyone.

input_text: Pekerja kilang tu kena buli habis-habisan but bila report HR takde action. Corporate Malaysia memang protect the abusers.
reason: Generalizes all of corporate Malaysia as protecting abusers based on one incident, using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace bullying should not be tolerated. Jika HR tidak bertindak, aduan boleh dibuat kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja atau melalui Talian Kasih.

input_text: Aiyah temple festival time sure la road all kena close. Then when we complain they kata kita 'not tolerant'. Hello, tolerance goes both ways la.
reason: Eye-rolling about temple festival road closures using mixed language, dismissing calls for tolerance. Creates us-vs-them framing.
suggested_rewrite: Road closures during temple festivals affect traffic. Advance notice and alternative routes would help balance celebration and convenience.

input_text: Melayu complain pasal kuil Hindu bising, tapi masjid subuh pukul 5 pagi takde masalah pulak. Double standard much?
reason: Pitting religious communities against each other with 'double standard' framing, provocative inter-religious comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Noise from any place of worship can affect neighbours. A respectful community discussion about reasonable sound levels benefits everyone.

input_text: Chinese aunty jual laksa dekat pasar malam and call it 'original recipe'. Makcik please la, you're not even from the right kampung.
reason: Dismisses a Chinese vendor's laksa based on her ethnicity and origin. Condescending food gatekeeping with ethnic undertones.
suggested_rewrite: Laksa recipes vary widely across Malaysia. Vendors of any background who make delicious food deserve appreciation for their craft.

input_text: Auntie kat market tu memang suka tipu timbang. Every time kurang sikit. Orang Cina berniaga memang macam tu la.
reason: Racializes a complaint about a market vendor by generalizing dishonesty to all Chinese traders.
suggested_rewrite: Jika timbangan di pasar tidak tepat, aduan boleh dibuat kepada KPDN. Dishonest practices are not linked to any particular race.

input_text: School uniform rules kat Malaysia ni outdated gila. Budak kena pakai baju lengan panjang dalam cuaca 35 degrees. Make it make sense la.
reason: Mocks school uniform rules as nonsensical in hot weather. Mixed language rant undermining education policy.
suggested_rewrite: School uniform guidelines should consider Malaysia's tropical climate. A review involving parents and students could lead to more comfortable options.

input_text: Aku ada screenshot conversation dia mengaku dia tipu client. Should I post it online supaya semua orang tau siapa dia sebenarnya?
reason: Contemplates publicly posting private screenshots to expose someone, seeking validation for doxxing behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Bukti penipuan perlu diserahkan kepada polis untuk siasatan rasmi. Menyebarkan perbualan peribadi secara online boleh mendedahkan anda kepada tindakan undang-undang.

input_text: Motorcyclist in Malaysia think they own the road. Lane splitting, run red light, then when accident happen blame the car. Bodoh betul.
reason: Hostile generalisation of all motorcyclists as reckless and stupid ('bodoh betul'), inflammatory tone.
