suggested_rewrite: Some motorcyclists take dangerous risks on the road. Better enforcement of traffic laws would improve safety for everyone.

input_text: Unifi plan upgrade dah buat tapi speed sama je. Rasa macam kena tipu. TM ni scammer bertauliah la bro.
reason: Calls TM a certified scammer in mixed Malay-English, inflammatory labelling for a service issue.
suggested_rewrite: If speeds don't improve after a plan upgrade, users should contact TM support atau buat aduan rasmi kepada MCMC for resolution.

input_text: Perak orang semua slow la, no wonder negeri pun tak develop
reason: Stereotyping Perak people as slow and linking it to state underdevelopment. Regional prejudice in mixed language.
suggested_rewrite: Perak has its own pace of development. Every state contributes uniquely to Malaysia's progress.

input_text: 听说隔壁kampung的马来人不让华人在那里开店。这种事还发生在2026年？
reason: Spreading an unverified claim about ethnic exclusion in commerce. Mixing languages adds casual credibility, but the claim is unverified and could inflame communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: 听说有人说某些地区有商业限制的问题。这种说法需要查证，如果属实应该向有关当局投报。

input_text: Naik MRT pun nak bangga, padahal tu sebab stuck in traffic and no money for parking la
reason: Mocking MRT users for being proud of using public transport, implying financial inability. Elitist and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: MRT is a practical choice for many commuters. It helps reduce traffic and is environmentally friendly.

input_text: KWSP kata kena simpan sampai 55, tapi economy macam ni, rakyat nak survive pun susah. Ironic gila their advice.
reason: Mixed language cynicism about KWSP advice being disconnected from economic reality. Dismissive of institutional guidance.
suggested_rewrite: Nasihat KWSP untuk menyimpan sehingga umur 55 adalah ideal tetapi ekonomi semasa menyukarkan ramai rakyat. Sokongan tambahan diperlukan.

input_text: India makan tangan tak guna sudu. Kalau diorang nak live here, at least follow la our standard.
reason: Framing eating with hands as below 'our standard,' implying Indian cultural practice is inferior. A cultural judgment presented as civilizational hierarchy.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia has diverse dining customs. Eating with hands is a cultural practice shared by many communities. We should respect different traditions.

input_text: Weh bro, aku check property listing kat Selangor. Semua developer Cina own the land and build overpriced condos. Orang Melayu macam mana nak compete ni? System rigged la
reason: Frames property development as an ethnic competition and claims the system is rigged against Malays. This ethno-economic narrative is polarising and oversimplifies property market dynamics.
suggested_rewrite: Harga property kat Selangor memang tinggi for most people. Need more balanced housing policies yang benefit all Malaysians regardless of background, especially first-time buyers.

input_text: School canteen jual nasi goreng RM5 for kids. Harga tu macam restaurant dah. Nak untung atas budak sekolah ke?
reason: Accuses school canteen of profiteering off children. Sarcastic mixed-language parent complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Harga nasi goreng RM5 di kantin sekolah rasa agak mahal untuk pelajar. Harap pihak sekolah boleh kawal harga kantin.

input_text: Delivery rider langgar side mirror kereta aku and just cabut macam tu. These people memang tak ada accountability langsung.
reason: Generalizes all delivery riders as irresponsible based on one incident. Uses 'these people' to stereotype an entire working group.
suggested_rewrite: Hit-and-run incidents are frustrating regardless of who causes them. Reporting to platform companies and authorities can help with accountability.

input_text: Bomoh and all those traditional healers are just scammers la. People who go to them memang bodoh.
reason: Dismisses all traditional healers as scammers and their clients as stupid. Disrespects cultural and spiritual practices.
suggested_rewrite: While there are fraudulent practitioners, traditional healing is part of Malaysian culture. People should consult medical professionals for serious conditions alongside any traditional practices.

input_text: Eh you notice tak, since those foreign tenants moved in, our condo gym rosak more often. Coincidence ke?
reason: Implies foreign tenants cause damage to condo facilities through a rhetorical question. Mild xenophobic scapegoating.
suggested_rewrite: Gym equipment maintenance should be handled by management. Usage guidelines can help preserve facilities for all residents.

input_text: This aunty selling nasi lemak RM12 now. Last year RM5. Increase more than double. Cannot accept la.
reason: Dramatic nasi lemak price increase exceeding 100%, staple food affordability concern.
suggested_rewrite: Significant food price increases should be monitored. If you feel pricing is unreasonable, compare options and report suspected profiteering to KPDNHEP.

input_text: Bro, that politician punya wife beli handbag RM50k with taxpayer money apparently. Someone posted the receipt online. Mesti betul la.
reason: Treats an unverified online receipt as proof of misuse of public funds and endorses sharing private financial details.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan penyalahgunaan wang rakyat perlu disiasat oleh pihak berkuasa yang berkenaan. Unverified documents circulating online should not be taken at face value.

input_text: 这些kampung人来到城市什么都不会，连LRT都不会搭，真的很丢脸。
reason: Mixed language condescension toward rural people in the city, calling them an embarrassment for not knowing urban transit.
suggested_rewrite: 城市交通系统对第一次使用的人来说可能很复杂。更好的指示牌和引导可以帮助所有人。

input_text: I dah fed up la bro with government counter. Pergi LHDN pun kena tunggu 3 jam, staff relax je borak kat belakang.
reason: Mixed Malay-English rant about LHDN wait times, accusing staff of chatting while people wait. Snarky civil servant criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Waiting 3 hours at LHDN is frustrating. An appointment system and more efficient processes would help reduce wait times.

input_text: 40 tahun baru nak kahwin. Confirm second hand punya la. Orang baik-baik dah lama taken. So sad for her.
reason: Uses dehumanising 'second hand' language to shame someone marrying at 40, deeply disrespectful.
suggested_rewrite: Finding love at 40 is a beautiful thing. Maturity and life experience often make for stronger, more meaningful relationships.

input_text: LOL read this: 'Perempuan yang tak pakai tudung akan masuk neraka.' Can someone please educate this person?
reason: Quoting a religiously conservative statement with dismissive mockery rather than respectful disagreement. 'LOL' trivializes a sincere religious belief, even if the belief is controversial.
suggested_rewrite: Ada pelbagai pandangan dalam Islam tentang pakaian. Lebih baik kita bincang dengan hormat daripada menghakimi pilihan orang lain.

input_text: அந்த area-ல Malay family-கள் move ஆயிட்டாங்க, இப்போ speaker-ல azan சத்தமா போடுறாங்க. Tolerant-ஆ இருக்கணும் but too much also.
reason: Frames the azan (Islamic call to prayer) as a noise nuisance linked to Malay families moving in. Mildly targets religious practice.
suggested_rewrite: Noise concerns in residential areas can be addressed through respectful dialogue between neighbours and local authorities, keeping in mind Malaysia's multicultural character.

input_text: Weh, these politicians promise heaven before election, then disappear after winning. Makan gaji buta je semua. Penat la trust system ni.
reason: Mixed-language cynical rant about all politicians. 'Makan gaji buta' is harshly dismissive and 'penat la trust system ni' expresses systemic disillusionment that could undermine democratic participation.
suggested_rewrite: Politicians should be held accountable for election promises. Rakyat boleh pantau prestasi wakil rakyat melalui platform seperti MySPR dan tuntut akauntabiliti.

input_text: News kata 'suspek kes rompak berbangsa India' — tu media tulis, bukan saya. Just sayin.
reason: Highlighting racial identification in crime reporting under the guise of 'just quoting.' The distancing is performative — the intent to associate crime with ethnicity is clear.
suggested_rewrite: Media sepatutnya melaporkan jenayah tanpa menekankan bangsa suspek kerana ia boleh memperkukuhkan stereotaip negatif.

input_text: Lepas hujan, confirm motor riders semua swerve macam orang gila. Memang bahaya bagi orang lain. Ban je motor kat highway.
reason: Calls motorcycle riders crazy and demands banning them from highways. Extreme classist proposal targeting a transport group.
suggested_rewrite: Road safety during rain is everyone's concern. Better road infrastructure and rider education programmes can help reduce accidents.

input_text: Aku share la that viral video of the road bully. Nampak clear muka dia and plate number. Orang macam ni patut kena exposed.
reason: Encourages sharing identifiable details of a person in a viral video as vigilante justice instead of reporting to police.
suggested_rewrite: Video road bully boleh dijadikan bukti dan dilaporkan kepada polis. Sharing someone's face and plate number publicly could lead to harassment.

input_text: Neighbour kat sebelah tu renovation tak habis-habis. Everyday drilling sampai I nak gila. Inconsiderate gila these people.
reason: Rude mixed-language complaint about neighbor's prolonged renovation. Dismissive generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Jiran sebelah buat renovation lama dan bunyi mengganggu. Harap boleh berbincang tentang waktu kerja yang sesuai.

input_text: Taxi driver kat KL ni memang rude. Refuse passenger, tak guna meter, attitude macam raja. No wonder Grab take over.
reason: Harsh generalization about KL taxi drivers with 'king attitude' remark, frustrated consumer commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Taxi service standards in KL need improvement. Using meters and accepting all passengers should be basic requirements enforced by regulators.

input_text: MBSA approved so many developments tapi flood mitigation zero planning. Rakyat yang kena every time hujan lebat. They don't care la obviously.
reason: Accuses MBSA of not caring about flood impact on residents. Mixed language inflammatory rhetoric about development approvals.
suggested_rewrite: Pembangunan baharu di bawah MBSA memerlukan penilaian impak alam sekitar yang menyeluruh. Pelan mitigasi banjir perlu diberi keutamaan.

input_text: Apasal la rider ni hantar makanan lambat sangat, lepas tu food all soggy already. Memang useless these people.
reason: Calls delivery riders useless in mixed Malay-English, generalising from one bad delivery experience.
suggested_rewrite: Penghantaran makanan yang lambat memang mengecewakan. Platform boleh improve packaging guidelines supaya makanan sampai dalam keadaan baik.

input_text: Aiyoo Tamil school parents ah, double park like the road is their father's property. Every morning same story, block the whole jalan.
reason: Complaint about parking singling out Tamil school parents specifically, adding ethnic dimension to a traffic issue.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking near schools every morning causes traffic jams. Better enforcement or drop-off zones would help everyone.

input_text: Unifi rosak lagi ke? Haiya every week same story. TM ni company apa ntah. Useless gila babi.
reason: Uses vulgar mixed-language expression to call TM useless, crossing into personal insult territory.
suggested_rewrite: Weekly Unifi outages are very frustrating. TM perlu menambah baik kestabilan rangkaian secara serius to retain customer trust.

input_text: 这些bangla工人晚上在公园聚集，看起来很可怕。我女儿都不敢一个人出去了。
reason: Framing Bangladeshi workers gathering at a park as threatening. Using fear for children's safety to justify ethnic profiling of workers who may simply be socializing.
suggested_rewrite: 公园的安全问题需要加强照明和巡逻。每个人都有权使用公共空间，安全感应该通过基础设施改善来提高。

input_text: Wahh nak tengok psychiatrist kena bayar RM300, baik simpan duit tu pergi holiday lagi bagus
reason: Trivializing psychiatric care by suggesting holiday is better use of money. Dismissive of mental health treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Kos psychiatrist memang tinggi. Ada pilihan lebih mampu seperti klinik kerajaan dan talian bantuan percuma.

input_text: Old people on the road should just surrender their licence already. Driving 40km/h on the highway, causing jam for everyone. Bahaya tau tak.
reason: Age-based discrimination calling for elderly drivers to lose licences, dismissive and demeaning generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Some drivers go very slowly on the highway which can be dangerous. Perhaps regular driving assessments for all drivers would improve road safety.

input_text: Stray cats everywhere in the food court. Nobody does anything. Health hazard la obviously.
reason: Food court hygiene concern with stray cats, health hazard complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Stray animals in food preparation areas are a health concern. Report to the local health department and contact animal rescue organizations for humane management.

input_text: Aku dengar dari Telegram group tu, 那个拿督拉 ada simpan duit haram kat luar negara. Tak tau betul ke tak tapi 看起来很可信。
reason: Spreads an unverified Telegram rumor about a Datuk's alleged illicit funds abroad using BM-Chinese code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: 未经证实的消息不应随意传播。Jika ada bukti kukuh mengenai pengubahan wang haram, laporan rasmi boleh dibuat kepada SPRM.

input_text: Deepavali firecrackers in my neighbourhood sampai pukul 2 pagi. I have work tomorrow la. Some people memang inconsiderate habis.
reason: Specifically targets Deepavali celebrations and labels celebrants as inconsiderate, insensitive to Hindu traditions.
suggested_rewrite: Deepavali is an important celebration, tapi bunyi mercun lewat malam boleh affect jiran yang perlu bekerja keesokan hari. Persetujuan bersama tentang waktu yang sesuai boleh help semua pihak.

input_text: Gig worker kat Malaysia ni macam second class citizen. Tapi honestly, kalau you rajin sikit, you won't be stuck doing delivery forever kan?
reason: Acknowledges gig workers' struggles then immediately blames their situation on laziness. Backhanded sympathy that demeans workers.
suggested_rewrite: Gig workers deserve better protections and fair treatment. Many are hardworking individuals who contribute significantly to the economy.

input_text: Sarawak people的英文都不太好。Maybe因为他们那边的school quality不行。
reason: Mixed-language condescension about Sarawakians' English ability, attributing it to poor school quality. Regional educational prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: 教育资源在各地区的分配确实不均。政府应该加强东马地区的教育投资，而不是批评当地人的能力。

input_text: Budak intern kat office aku ni memang useless. Gen Z semua macam ni ke? Suruh buat kerja sikit pun tak boleh. Hopeless generation.
reason: Generalizes an entire generation as hopeless based on one intern's performance using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Intern mungkin memerlukan bimbingan dan latihan lebih. Every generation brings different strengths, and mentorship helps bridge the gap.

input_text: Delivery service kat Malaysia ni memang worst in Southeast Asia. Barang pecah, late delivery, lost parcel. Semua problem ada.
reason: Labels Malaysia's delivery service as the worst in the region, a sweeping and unsubstantiated claim.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan penghantaran di Malaysia boleh diperbaiki dari segi packaging, timeliness dan tracking. Competition antara syarikat boleh drive improvement in service quality.

input_text: Bhai bawak motor ni memang lain macam, lawan arus pun berani. Nak mati cepat ke apa? Typical la jenis ni.
reason: Uses 'Bhai' (ethnic term) paired with 'jenis ni' when reacting rudely to bad motorcycle riding, adding communal dimension to road rage.
suggested_rewrite: Penunggang motosikal yang lawan arus sangat berbahaya. Penguatkuasaan perlu ditingkatkan untuk keselamatan semua.

input_text: Highway rest stop toilet memang menakutkan. Bau, kotor, pintu rosak. Malaysian standard la katakan.
reason: Highway rest stop hygiene complaint with sarcastic 'Malaysian standard' quip.
suggested_rewrite: Highway rest stops should maintain clean facilities as part of their concession agreement. Report substandard facilities through the highway operator's app or PLUS hotline.

input_text: 每次 raya haji 那些马来邻居 korban lembu的时候，整条街都是血腥味。受不了。能不能找个 proper place 来做？
reason: Complains about Hari Raya Haji korban practices in an insensitive way that disrespects a significant religious observance.
suggested_rewrite: Ibadah korban是重要的宗教活动。Pihak berkuasa tempatan boleh menyediakan kawasan khusus yang memenuhi keperluan kebersihan dan keselesaan semua penduduk.

input_text: School canteen price go up but portion become smaller. Kids come home hungry. Canteen operator squeezing parents dry.
reason: School canteen shrinkflation affecting children's nutrition, parent frustration.
suggested_rewrite: School canteen pricing and portions should be monitored. Raise concerns through the PIBG to negotiate fair pricing with the canteen operator.

input_text: Haiya uncle driving so slow on highway, old people should just surrender their license la
reason: Ageist mixed-language remark demanding elderly drivers lose their licenses. Dismissive of their dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Elderly drivers on highways may need periodic driving assessments for everyone's safety.

input_text: Eh you tau tak, that YB kena tangkap minum arak at the club but police let him go sebab dia VIP. Confirm punya la.
reason: Presents an unverified gossip about a politician and police favoritism as confirmed fact using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Cerita yang tidak disahkan tentang ahli politik perlu disemak kebenarannya. If there's evidence of wrongdoing, it should be reported to the proper authorities.

input_text: Weh korang, rumah kat KL makin mahal gila. Only rich people can afford la. Kita ni makan gaji biasa, mimpi je la nak beli rumah. Government don't care about us one
reason: Valid housing concern expressed with the sweeping claim that the government doesn't care about ordinary people. This all-or-nothing framing is polarising.
suggested_rewrite: Harga rumah di KL memang challenging untuk pekerja bergaji biasa. Hope the government can introduce more practical affordable housing schemes for middle-income earners.

input_text: Neighbour selalu buat kenduri sampai pukul 2 pagi. Orang Melayu memang macam ni la, tak fikir jiran lain.
reason: Racial generalisation blaming Malay cultural gatherings for noise issues. Singles out ethnicity rather than addressing the behaviour.
suggested_rewrite: Late-night gatherings that disturb neighbours are inconsiderate regardless of who hosts them. Residents can discuss noise guidelines through the neighbourhood committee.

input_text: 印度同事每次开会都迟到。这是他们的culture吧，什么事都tidak apa。
reason: Racial stereotype attributing tardiness to Indian culture. Racialises a workplace behaviour issue.
suggested_rewrite: 守时是职场的基本要求。如果有同事经常迟到，应该通过正式渠道沟通，而不是归因于他们的种族。

input_text: Aiya bro, I beli barang online dari seller tu, nama macam orang Cina la. Barang sampai semua cacat. Memang la these people pandai jual tapi quality hancur
reason: Identifies the seller as Chinese and then generalises ('these people') about quality. Links ethnicity to business practices using a mild ethnic stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Beli barang online tapi dapat defective product. Next time kena check reviews and compare sellers dulu before purchasing. Report seller tu kat platform.

input_text: Sekolah kebangsaan cikgu cakap BM je, anak I balik rumah English satu patah pun tak improve. What's the point?
reason: Dismissive of national school language medium with undertone about ethnic schooling preference. Rude parental frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Anak saya kurang berkembang dalam Bahasa Inggeris di sekolah kebangsaan. Harap kualiti pengajaran English boleh ditingkatkan.

input_text: Alamak these kampung folks really cannot drive in KL la. Masuk highway pun tak tau guna signal. Go back la kampung.
reason: Mocks rural drivers with a dismissive 'go back' remark, creating an urban-rural divide.
suggested_rewrite: Road safety awareness is important for all drivers. Programs to improve driving skills, especially for highway use, would benefit everyone on the road.

input_text: Kenapa wifi kat Malaysia ni slow macam zaman batu? Bayar mahal tapi dapat service kampung. ISP semua sama je - rip off.
reason: Frustrated comparison of Malaysian internet to 'stone age', common consumer complaint about ISP prices vs quality.
suggested_rewrite: Internet speeds in Malaysia aren't matching the prices we pay. Saya harap MCMC will push ISPs to improve infrastructure and deliver what they promise.

input_text: Dato' buat open house during Raya but only invite VIPs. Rakyat biasa berdiri outside tengok je. So much for Malaysian hospitality la.
reason: Criticizes titled elites for exclusive Raya open houses. Sarcastic tone about Malaysian hospitality that stokes class resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Raya open houses are a beautiful Malaysian tradition that brings people together. Community-inclusive events help bridge social divides.

input_text: 真的是受不了了，setiap bulan bil TNB naik. 政府 cakap nak bantu rakyat tapi越帮越忙。
reason: Sarcastically dismisses government assistance using BM-Chinese code-switching, claiming help makes things worse.
suggested_rewrite: 电费上涨确实影响民生。Rakyat boleh semak sama ada layak mendapat rebat elektrik dan menyuarakan kebimbangan kepada wakil rakyat.

input_text: My Chinese neighbour buat BBQ every weekend, asap masuk rumah aku. Cakap pun tak guna, memang jenis tak nak dengar orang punya.
reason: Unnecessarily identifies the neighbour's ethnicity in a complaint about BBQ smoke, implying cultural fault.
suggested_rewrite: Asap BBQ yang masuk ke rumah jiran boleh mengganggu. Cuba berbincang secara baik atau hubungi pengurusan bangunan untuk penyelesaian.

input_text: These part-time workers at the mamak, all young kids who can't even take orders properly. Generation ni memang hopeless.
reason: Ageist dismissal of young part-time workers as hopeless. Generalises from service errors to condemning an entire generation.
suggested_rewrite: Part-time workers are often still learning. Patience and clear communication help create a better experience for both customers and staff.

input_text: Road repair depan office aku dah 6 bulan, still not done. Contractor makan duit je kerja. Typical la Malaysian infrastructure.
reason: Accuses contractors of corruption and labels all Malaysian infrastructure as typically poor.
suggested_rewrite: Projek pembaikan jalan yang berlarutan perlu dipantau dengan lebih ketat. Transparent project timelines dan quality audits boleh ensure value for money.

input_text: Sekolah kebangsaan punya discipline teacher semua power crazy. Cikgu kat private school lagi professional. That's the difference between kerajaan and swasta.
reason: Labels all public school discipline teachers as power-hungry. Creates inflammatory division between public and private education.
suggested_rewrite: Teaching standards vary across all types of schools. Both public and private schools have dedicated educators, and supporting teacher development benefits everyone.

input_text: Kelantan orang cakap dia negeri Islam tapi basic infrastructure pun fail. Roads pecah, banjir every year. Islam mana yang ajar jalan berlubang?
reason: Sarcastically links Kelantan's Islamic governance claims to infrastructure failures. Provocative mixing of religion and state criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Kelantan menghadapi cabaran infrastruktur yang perlu ditangani segera. Pengurusan banjir dan penyelenggaraan jalan raya penting untuk kesejahteraan rakyat.

input_text: I forwarded this article about how expats tak bayar tax in Malaysia. Betul ke ni? If yes memang tak adil la for rakyat Malaysia yang kena bayar everything
reason: Forwards unverified claims about expat tax obligations with a 'is this true?' framing. The premise is largely incorrect as many expats do pay taxes, and sharing it spreads potential misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Saw an article about expat taxation. Before we share, better to check with LHDN for actual facts. Many expats do pay income tax in Malaysia under existing laws.

input_text: Haha someone posted: 'Orang Sabah Sarawak ni second-class citizen je di Semenanjung.' Where's the lie?
reason: Amplifying and validating a divisive claim about East Malaysian marginalization. While the grievance may have basis, 'where's the lie?' endorses it as settled truth in a provocative way.
suggested_rewrite: Isu ketidakseimbangan pembangunan antara Semenanjung dan Sabah Sarawak memang perlu perhatian serius. Mari bincang secara konstruktif untuk keadilan bersama.

input_text: Confirm la these people share without reading. WhatsApp uncle forward petrol price naik RM5 per liter. Mana logik bro?
reason: Dismissive 'these people' and 'WhatsApp uncle' stereotype while calling out unverified petrol price claims.
suggested_rewrite: There's a viral claim about petrol hitting RM5/liter which is unverified. Always check official sources before forwarding.

input_text: Majlis perbandaran kutip cukai pintu tapi service zero. Longkang tersumbat, lampu jalan rosak. What are we even paying for?
reason: Claims council services are zero despite collecting taxes, a dismissive exaggeration.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat expect basic services like drain maintenance dan street lighting dari cukai yang dibayar. Sistem aduan yang efisien boleh help majlis perbandaran prioritise repairs.

input_text: Hawker tu masak biasa je tapi harga naik every month. Kita complain dia marah pulak. Customer always wrong la in Malaysia kan?
reason: Sarcastic mixed-language complaint about hawker price increases and response to customer feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Harga makanan hawker meningkat tapi kualiti sama. Harap peniaga boleh terima maklum balas pelanggan dengan baik.

input_text: Bos suruh present tapi dia sendiri tak baca slides. Last-last reject sebab 'tak cukup info'. Geram betul dengan orang macam ni, waste everyone's time.
reason: Attacks boss personally for not reading slides, crossing from frustration to personal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Untuk presentation yang lebih productive, pre-reading materials boleh diedarkan awal. Clear feedback criteria sebelum presentation boleh save masa semua pihak.

input_text: Wah this girl dah 37 still single ah. Confirm terlalu choosy la. Nanti old already no one want liao.
reason: Age-shames a woman in mixed English-Malay-Hokkien, implying she will become undesirable with age.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has their own timeline for relationships. Being selective about a life partner is actually a wise approach.

input_text: People from East Malaysia always so slow at work. Laid back sangat. No wonder West Malaysia has to carry the economy.
reason: Regional prejudice painting East Malaysians as lazy and West Malaysia as economically superior. Divisive and condescending.
suggested_rewrite: Different regions face different economic challenges. Sabah and Sarawak contribute significantly through natural resources and need more equitable development support.

input_text: Wifi kat Malaysia ni slow gila compared to Singapore. Bayar mahal tapi speed macam siput. Telco semua sama je, rompak.
reason: Comparing Malaysian internet unfavorably to Singapore, accusing all telcos of robbery.
suggested_rewrite: Broadband speeds in Malaysia still lag behind regional competitors. MCMC should enforce minimum speed guarantees and encourage healthy competition among telcos.

input_text: Seller online tu I rasa orang bangla la. Barang cheap but quality memang teruk. You get what you pay for la kan. Next time I stick to local sellers only
reason: Uses the derogatory term 'bangla' and links poor quality to the assumed nationality of the seller. The preference for 'local only' sellers has a discriminatory undertone.
suggested_rewrite: Barang murah tapi quality kurang memuaskan. Next time I'll focus more on seller ratings and reviews rather than just price. Better to pay slightly more for reliable quality.

input_text: Cina punya kedai memang la murah sikit but you think they give you good stuff ah? Semua potong corner one la.
reason: Ethnic stereotype about Chinese businesses cutting corners, generalising dishonesty to an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: Some shops offer lower prices but the quality may vary. It's worth checking reviews regardless of who runs the business.

input_text: Kerja overtime sampai malam tapi bos tak pernah appreciate. Cakap 'that's your job'. Memang heartless management macam ni.
reason: Calls management heartless, crossing from valid overtime frustration into personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Pengiktirafan terhadap usaha pekerja sangat penting untuk moral. Pihak pengurusan yang menghargai overtime staff akan dapat loyalty dan productivity yang lebih baik.

input_text: Eh this condo guard always give attitude when I come back late. I live here la bro, bukan pencuri. Geram betul.
reason: Rude mixed-language complaint about condo security guard giving attitude to residents returning late.
suggested_rewrite: Guard condo agak strict bila saya balik lewat. Harap prosedur keselamatan boleh dilaksanakan dengan lebih mesra.

input_text: Eh dengar tak, apparently foreign investors are buying up all the property kat Johor through some loophole. Orang local macam kita tak mampu dah. Betul ke ni or fake news?
reason: Spreads an unverified rumour about property buying loopholes while framing it as a question. Even with the 'fake news?' qualifier, the alarmist framing can fuel resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Ada rumour about foreign property investment loopholes in Johor. Before sharing, let's verify with official sources like the state land office. Jangan spread unconfirmed claims.

input_text: Water supply company potong air lagi today. Every month same story. Confirm ada orang atas cari makan dari kontrak repair ni.
reason: Implies water supply disruptions are deliberately caused for repair contract kickbacks. Conspiracy allegation in Malay-English mix.
suggested_rewrite: Frequent water disruptions need to be addressed urgently. Transparent reporting on infrastructure spending would help address public concerns.

input_text: Hospital appointment at 9am but only see doctor at 1pm. By then I've wasted my whole day. System broken la.
reason: Extremely frustrated hospital wait-time complaint, calling system broken.
suggested_rewrite: Waiting 4 hours past your appointment time is unacceptable. Hospital appointment systems need reform - perhaps staggered appointment slots and real-time queue updates could help.

input_text: Kerja as freelance photographer, income tak tentu. Parents kena support lagi. Umur 30 dah tapi masih macam budak. Grow up la wei.
reason: Calls a 30-year-old freelancer childish for receiving parental support, dismissing freelance work as immature.
suggested_rewrite: Freelance careers take time to build. Many successful professionals received family support in their early career stages.

input_text: Auntie kat WhatsApp cakap: 'Jangan beli sayur dari orang Bangladesh sebab guna racun perosak haram.' Is this even true?
reason: Forwarding an ethnically targeted food safety claim without verification. Combines communal profiling with unverified health claims.
suggested_rewrite: Ada mesej tentang keselamatan sayur-sayuran. Daripada percaya khabar angin, lebih baik semak dengan FAMA atau Kementerian Pertanian untuk fakta sebenar.

input_text: Myvi drivers are the worst la. Drive like they own a sports car. One day confirm masuk longkang. Deserve it also.
reason: Hostile generalisation of Myvi drivers, wishing misfortune on them ('deserve it'). Mean-spirited.
suggested_rewrite: Some drivers of smaller cars drive aggressively. All drivers should be mindful of road safety regardless of vehicle type.

input_text: 这些politician memang pandai cakap je。到了 election time baru datang 握手拍照。选完了就 hilang。真的很假。
reason: Cynically dismisses all politicians as insincere using BM-Chinese code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: 政治人物应在非选举期间也与选民保持联系。Rakyat boleh menuntut akauntabiliti melalui dialog dengan wakil rakyat secara berterusan。

input_text: Aiya customer service tu useless betul la, might as well talk to the wall, same result
reason: Dehumanizing mixed-language comparison of customer service staff to a wall. Rude and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Customer service could be more helpful. The company should invest in better training and response systems.

input_text: Mak aku cakap jangan kahwin orang lain bangsa nanti susah. Honestly I agree la, mixed marriages always got problem one. Better stick to your own kind.
reason: Advocating against interethnic marriage and endorsing 'stick to your own kind' mentality. Divisive.
suggested_rewrite: Interethnic marriages have unique challenges but also bring richness. Success depends on mutual understanding, not ethnic background.

input_text: My neighbour's daughter dah 34 still not married. My mum keep talking about her macam la it's our business. But honestly, agak weird jugak la kan nowadays still single at that age
reason: Initially criticises gossiping about neighbours but then agrees it's 'weird' to be single at 34, reinforcing the stigma. The ambivalent stance still promotes judgment.
suggested_rewrite: My mum keeps commenting on the neighbour's daughter being single at 34. Honestly, everyone has their own life journey. Kita patut respect their personal choices.

input_text: Orang tua sekarang ni memang outdated. Asyik suruh anak jadi doctor or lawyer. 他们根本不了解现在的job market。思想落后。
reason: Dismisses older generation's career advice as backward-thinking in a disrespectful BM-Chinese code-switch.
suggested_rewrite: Generasi terdahulu mungkin kurang familiar dengan peluang kerjaya baru. 耐心沟通和分享最新的就业趋势有助于让父母理解孩子的职业选择。

input_text: Neighbor group chat: 'Guard India tu tidur je kerja. Patut tukar guard Melayu.' Wah racist gila.
reason: Quoting a racist comment from a neighbor group about replacing an Indian guard with a Malay one. While calling it racist, the act of sharing it without reporting context amplifies it.
suggested_rewrite: Ada komen rasis di group chat jiran tentang pengawal keselamatan. Saya akan laporkan kepada pihak pengurusan. Prestasi kerja tidak ada kaitan dengan bangsa.

input_text: These la the type of people who believe everything on WhatsApp. Flour RM50 a kilo? Come on la guna otak sikit.
reason: Condescendingly tells people to 'use their brain' about fake flour price claims using mixed Malay-English. Insulting while addressing misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Claims of flour reaching RM50/kg are false. Encourage fact-checking through official channels like KPDNHEP before sharing.

input_text: DBKL cakap nak jadikan KL world-class city tapi drain system pun tak boleh handle hujan 30 minit. World class my foot la.
reason: Mocks DBKL's world-class city aspirations by highlighting drainage failures. Rude dismissal with vulgar expression.
suggested_rewrite: Aspirasi KL sebagai bandaraya bertaraf dunia memerlukan peningkatan infrastruktur asas termasuk sistem perparitan yang mampu menangani hujan lebat.

input_text: Confirm this one la. Every time UMNO event, jalan all kena block. Other parties never like that. Typical.
reason: Singling out UMNO events for road closures with 'typical' dismissal, implying party-specific privilege. The comparison is unfounded and the tone is contemptuous.
suggested_rewrite: Political events from all parties sometimes cause road closures. I wish local councils would manage traffic better during any political gathering.

input_text: Abang delivery tu lambat gila bro, food dah sejuk. Lepas tu nak mintak tip lagi. Seriously ah?
reason: Rude complaint about late delivery in mixed Malay-English. Dismissive of delivery worker requesting tip.
suggested_rewrite: Delivery rider lambat dan makanan dah sejuk. Saya beri rating berdasarkan pengalaman sebenar.

input_text: Orang India neighbour sebelah rumah I selalu buat kenduri sampai pukul 2 pagi. Bising gila bro. Report kat MBPJ pun takde action. These people memang inconsiderate
reason: Identifies the neighbour's ethnicity and then uses 'these people' to generalise about inconsiderateness. The noise complaint is valid but the ethnic framing makes it communal.
suggested_rewrite: Neighbour selalu buat kenduri sampai lewat malam, quite bising. Dah report kat MBPJ tapi belum ada action. Maybe boleh try bincang baik-baik with them first about timing.

input_text: Teh tarik dah RM5 satu, mampus la macam ni, nak makan angin je ke setiap hari
reason: Dramatic reaction to teh tarik price hike with vulgar expression. Frustrated but overly dramatic.
suggested_rewrite: Teh tarik sudah naik ke RM5. Kenaikan harga minuman asas ini membimbangkan rakyat.

input_text: Dah bayar bil Astro tapi channel favourite sentiasa buffer. Customer service cakap line OK. Obviously lying la.
reason: Pay TV buffering issues with customer service denying problem, trust issue.
suggested_rewrite: Persistent streaming issues despite paying should be documented with speed tests and escalated to MCMC if the provider doesn't resolve them.

input_text: These civil servants ingat they untouchable is it? Private sector we buat one mistake kena fire. Government side, tidur on job also got increment.
reason: Mixed-language claim that civil servants are untouchable and get pay rises even while sleeping. Snarky public-vs-private sector comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Accountability standards in the public sector should be strengthened. Performance-based evaluations benefit service delivery.

input_text: 这种人住在kampung一辈子，眼界很小，跟他们说什么都没用。
reason: Condescending view that rural people have narrow worldviews and are unteachable. Urban elitism in mixed language.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人的生活经验不同。乡村生活也有其独特的智慧和价值观，值得我们尊重和学习。

input_text: B40 tapi nak pakai Unifi plan paling mahal. Lepas tu WiFi slow sikit dah nak marah. You get what you can afford la dey.
reason: Mixes Malay and English to dismiss B40 internet expectations, implying they don't deserve good service based on income.
suggested_rewrite: Semua pengguna berhak mendapat perkhidmatan internet yang setimpal dengan harga yang dibayar, tanpa mengira tahap pendapatan.

input_text: எல்லா politician-ம் ஒரே மாதிரி தான். பணம் சம்பாதிக்க வேணும் அவ்வளவு தான். Rakyat punya nasib யாருக்கும் முக்கியம் இல்ல.
reason: Sweepingly dismisses all politicians as only money-driven using Tamil-BM code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: அரசியல்வாதிகளின் செயல்திறனை கண்காணிப்பது முக்கியம். Rakyat perlu menuntut ketelusan dan akauntabiliti daripada wakil rakyat melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Tak payah la hantar anak sekolah kebangsaan. Kualiti macam longkang. Better send to private school if you can afford.
reason: Insults national school quality using a crude comparison, discouraging public education enrollment.
suggested_rewrite: Sekolah kebangsaan mempunyai kelebihan tersendiri termasuk kepelbagaian. Improvements in teaching quality and resources would further strengthen the national school system.

input_text: Celebrity Malaysia buat charity event pun nak selfie dulu. Content first, ikhlas belakang. Menyampah tengok perangai macam ni.
reason: Cynically dismisses all celebrity charity as insincere content creation, rude and judgemental.
suggested_rewrite: Walaupun ada perdebatan tentang keikhlasan, celebrity charity events tetap memberi impak positif. Yang penting bantuan sampai kepada yang memerlukan regardless of publicity.

input_text: B40 punya anak pakai Nike RM500 but parents cakap tak mampu bayar school fees. Priorities betul-betul salah these people.
reason: Judges B40 families' spending in mixed Malay-English, using 'these people' to distance and demean.
suggested_rewrite: Spending priorities vary across families. Affordable access to education should be ensured for all children regardless of family income.

input_text: TNG eWallet always got problem. Top up also cannot, pay also cannot. Technology in Malaysia memang fail.
reason: Frustrated e-wallet reliability complaint generalizing to Malaysian technology failure, hyperbolic consumer opinion.
suggested_rewrite: TNG eWallet reliability issues are frustrating for users. The app needs more stable infrastructure, especially during peak usage times.

input_text: Malay guys kat dating app semua sweet talker tapi commitment zero. Dah la selalu cakap 'jom lepak' tapi never actually plan a proper date.
reason: Mixed language ethnic stereotyping of Malay men as lacking commitment in dating. Racial generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman dating app berbeza bagi setiap orang. Komunikasi yang jelas tentang expectations membantu kedua-dua pihak.

input_text: LRT ni memang sardine can every morning. Tambah gerabak la sikit. Macam mana nak encourage public transport kalau macam ni?
reason: Overcrowding complaint about LRT with sardine can metaphor, frustrated commuter advocating improvement.
suggested_rewrite: LRT overcrowding during rush hours is a major issue. Increasing train frequency or adding carriages would encourage more people to use public transport.

input_text: KTM delay lagi hari ni. Dah berapa kali ni bulan ni? Pengurusan memang bangang. How hard is it to run trains on time?
reason: Uses vulgar language to insult KTM management over train delays instead of filing a formal complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Kelewatan KTM yang kerap berlaku perlu ditangani segera. Commuters should file complaints through official channels to push for improved scheduling.

input_text: Tak faham la orang yang still single at 32 and claim they're happy. Deep down mesti lonely gila. Society pressure aside, it's just biology what. Don't lie to yourself la
reason: Dismisses single people's claim of happiness as self-deception and invokes biological determinism. This invalidates personal choices and is condescending.
suggested_rewrite: Being single or in a relationship, both can bring happiness. Everyone's journey is different. Rather than assuming, let's respect what people say about their own lives.

input_text: Wah Kelantan people come KL sure culture shock one, kampung life very different ma
reason: Implying Kelantan people are unsophisticated villagers who cannot handle KL. Mixed-language regional stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Anyone moving to a new city needs time to adjust. Kelantan and KL have different lifestyles but both are valid.

input_text: This kedai makcik claim 'authentic' char kuey teow but dia bukan Penang pun. Don't simply use that word la.
reason: Challenges a cook's right to claim authenticity based on geographic origin. Gatekeeping Malaysian street food based on birthplace.
suggested_rewrite: Char kuey teow styles vary across Malaysia. Using 'Penang-style' helps customers know what to expect while respecting the dish's roots.

input_text: Kenduri kahwin dia grand gila tapi hantaran pinjam dari along. Melayu memang gitu la, semua nak show tapi poket kosong.
reason: Stereotypes Malays as showoffs who borrow from loan sharks for weddings, a classist ethnic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Perancangan kewangan perkahwinan yang bijak dapat mengelakkan hutang. Perkahwinan yang bermakna tidak semestinya perlu berbelanja besar.

input_text: Eh this China tourist at Pavilion just pushed my mak aside to take photo. No excuse me, no sorry, nothing. Budaya macam ni ke? I'm not racist but come on la
reason: Individual rude behaviour is attributed to Chinese culture ('budaya macam ni ke?'). Combined with the 'not racist but' disclaimer, it becomes a mild xenophobic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: A tourist at Pavilion pushed my mum aside for a photo without apologising. Sangat kurang sopan. Hope tourist areas can have more staff to manage crowds properly.

input_text: Bro that Taman Sentosa area you think I dare jalan alone at night ah? The kind of orang hanging around there... tau la kan.
reason: Snide insinuation about people in Taman Sentosa using mixed Malay-English with vague 'tau la kan'. Neighborhood prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Taman Sentosa could benefit from improved night safety measures like better street lighting and CCTV coverage.

input_text: Setiap tahun cakap nak selesaikan masalah banjir tapi setiap tahun banjir juga. All talk no action.
reason: Recurring flood frustration criticizing annual unfulfilled promises, code-switched political criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah banjir tahunan memerlukan penyelesaian jangka panjang, bukan hanya respons kecemasan. Long-term infrastructure investment is needed, including better drainage systems and flood mitigation measures.

input_text: இந்த area-ல lot of Indian families moved in. Now very noisy during Deepavali, whole month celebration. Aiyo.
reason: Complains about Indian families and Deepavali celebrations as noise nuisance. Targets a specific community's cultural celebrations.
suggested_rewrite: Festival celebrations are part of Malaysian culture. Residents can coordinate with neighbours on timing and noise levels during festive seasons.

input_text: Immigration office bro, I took number at 8am, kena serve at 2pm. Staff inside ada AC, slowly slowly buat kerja. We outside melting like ice cream.
reason: Mixed-language sarcastic description of immigration office wait times, implying staff are comfortable while public suffers.
suggested_rewrite: Long wait times at the Immigration office are frustrating. An online appointment system could significantly reduce waiting.

input_text: MBPJ buat kerja macam part-time job je. Drainage problem reported last month, still nothing. Our tax money for what exactly?
reason: Mixed language dismissal of MBPJ as treating their work as part-time. Sarcastic questioning of tax expenditure.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah saliran yang dilaporkan sebulan lalu masih belum diselesaikan oleh MBPJ. Tindakan segera amat dihargai.

input_text: Hari Raya punya bunga api sampai pukul 4 pagi. Non-Muslim neighbours like us cannot sleep la. Every year same story, nobody cares.
reason: Frames Hari Raya celebrations as inconsiderate specifically towards non-Muslims, creating a communal divide.
suggested_rewrite: Perayaan Hari Raya memang meriah, tapi bunga api lewat malam boleh affect semua jiran. Open communication antara jiran dan community guidelines on timing boleh help everyone enjoy the celebration.

input_text: Dato' punya anak masuk universiti swasta tapi still dapat scholarship. Meanwhile budak B40 kena struggle bayar sendiri. System ni memang untuk orang kaya je.
reason: Claims scholarship system favours wealthy titled families over B40 students. Presents alleged injustice as systemic fact.
suggested_rewrite: Scholarship allocation should prioritize need and merit. Transparent criteria and public reporting would ensure fair distribution across income groups.

input_text: Wey that kampung area got so many disability ramps tapi half the time nobody use. Waste of duit rakyat I tell you.
reason: Mixed-language complaint framing disability ramps as waste of taxpayer money. Dismissive of accessibility rights.
suggested_rewrite: Disability ramps are essential infrastructure even if usage appears low. They ensure equal access for all community members.

input_text: Hari tu aku nampak sendiri that Datuk punya anak drive Lamborghini. Gaji menteri mana cukup beli tu. Mesti rasuah punya.
reason: Jumps from observing an expensive car to accusing corruption without any evidence, using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Gaya hidup mewah ahli politik boleh menimbulkan persoalan. If there are legitimate concerns about undeclared wealth, it can be reported to the MACC.

input_text: Ini orang memang kurang ajar. Park kereta block jalan then when you tegur, dia marah balik. 真是没教养的人。
reason: Insults someone as ill-mannered using both BM and Chinese in a personal conflict over parking.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking yang menghalang laluan boleh dilaporkan kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan. 拍照记录可以作为投诉的证据。

input_text: Parking kat mall ni memang nightmare la bro. Orang ambil dua lot, security buat don't know. Apa guna ada guard?
reason: Rude mixed-language rant about mall parking and dismisses security guards as useless.
suggested_rewrite: Parking di mall ni selalu penuh dan ada yang ambil dua lot. Harap security boleh lebih proaktif menguruskan.

input_text: Landlord increase rent 40% just like that. No notice, no reason. Where got fair like this?
reason: Sudden large rent increase without notice, tenant rights concern.
suggested_rewrite: Rent increases should follow tenancy agreement terms. Check your lease for notice requirements and consider filing a complaint if the increase violates the agreement.

input_text: Non-Malay nak masak kuih raya? Boleh la try tapi jangan expect it to taste macam yang mak cik buat. Different level bro.
reason: Dismisses non-Malays' ability to make kuih raya as inherently inferior. Condescending food gatekeeping based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Kuih raya making is a skill anyone can learn with practice and guidance. Sharing culinary traditions across communities strengthens Malaysian unity.

input_text: Influencer Malaysia ni semua sama je. Jual skincare tah apa-apa brand, followers pun beli macam lembu. Both sides equally dumb.
reason: Calls both influencers and their followers dumb and compares followers to cattle, doubly insulting.
suggested_rewrite: Pengguna perlu lebih berhati-hati dengan produk yang dipromosikan oleh influencer. Regulatory bodies should ensure all sponsored content meets advertising standards.

input_text: Toll dah naik lagi bro, highway company memang tau makan duit rakyat je. Road condition still the same potholes everywhere.
reason: Mixed language accusation of highway companies profiteering from citizens. Inflammatory rhetoric about toll and road conditions.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan tol perlu disertai peningkatan kualiti jalan raya. Rakyat berhak mendapat perkhidmatan yang setimpal dengan bayaran.

input_text: Air Selangor sengaja buat gangguan air supaya kita terpaksa beli air botol. Semua ni strategi bisnes je.
reason: Conspiracy theory alleging deliberate water disruptions to boost bottled water sales. Unfounded claim that erodes trust in utilities.
suggested_rewrite: Gangguan air yang kerap memang menyusahkan rakyat. Pihak berkuasa perlu telus tentang punca dan langkah penambahbaikan.

input_text: Lepas hujan sikit je dah banjir. Pembangunan tanpa perancangan. Pemaju dan kerajaan sama-sama tak guna.
reason: Blaming both developers and government for flood-prone development, harsh environmental criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir kilat yang kerap berlaku menunjukkan keperluan untuk perancangan pembangunan yang lebih baik dan sistem saliran yang dikemas kini.

input_text: KWSP kata simpanan rakyat tak cukup untuk bersara, tapi siapa yang bagi keluarkan masa COVID? Sendiri buat masalah, sendiri salahkan rakyat.
reason: Blames KWSP for retirement fund shortfalls while oversimplifying the policy trade-offs during COVID.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar pengeluaran KWSP semasa COVID mempunyai kesan jangka panjang. Perlu ada langkah komprehensif untuk membantu rakyat membina semula simpanan persaraan.

input_text: Surau depan rumah tu pukul 4 pagi dah pasang speaker full blast. Aku respect la tapi bro ada limit kan? Orang nak tidur juga.
reason: Complaint about surau speaker volume with eye-rolling tone about religious practices. Could inflame religious sensitivities.
suggested_rewrite: Speaker surau depan rumah agak kuat pada waktu pagi. Mungkin boleh dikurangkan sedikit demi keselesaan jiran.

input_text: Kawan aku stress nak exam, aku cakap je relax la bro, exam je pun bukan nak mati
reason: Trivializing a friend's exam stress. Dismissive attitude toward mental pressure and academic anxiety.
suggested_rewrite: Kawan aku stress pasal exam. Aku cuba support dia dan cadangkan rehat kejap sebelum sambung study.

input_text: Rumah pangsa ni dah 30 tahun tapi takde renovation langsung. Cat pun dah hitam. Budaya tak jaga harta awam.
reason: 30-year-old flat never renovated, criticizing culture of not maintaining public property.
suggested_rewrite: Flat lama perlu program pembaharuan berkala. Penduduk boleh memohon dana penyelenggaraan melalui ADUN atau program perumahan kerajaan.

input_text: Setiap kali beli kereta baru mesti ada hidden charges. Processing fee la, handling fee la. Padahal harga on the road dah include semua.
reason: Hidden fees added on top of advertised car on-the-road price.
suggested_rewrite: Semua kos kereta perlu dinyatakan dengan jelas sebelum pembelian. Bandingkan tawaran dari pelbagai pengedar dan minta pecahan kos bertulis.

input_text: Seller Shopee tu aku rasa orang Cina sebab nama kedai pun Cina. Barang sampai rosak, complaint tak layan. Memang la dorang ni pandai jual tapi after sales zero
reason: Identifies the seller by assumed ethnicity and links poor customer service to being Chinese. This mild ethnic stereotyping attributes business shortcomings to racial identity.
suggested_rewrite: Seller Shopee tu hantar barang rosak dan tak layan complaint. Kena report kat platform dan tinggalkan review supaya pembeli lain tahu.

input_text: Lift condo rosak lagi. Kali ni terperangkap 30 minit sebelum bomba datang. Budak kecik dalam lift menangis takut.
reason: Condo lift breakdown trapping people including scared children for 30 minutes.
suggested_rewrite: Lif yang kerap rosak memerlukan penggantian atau penyelenggaraan menyeluruh. Perangkap lif perlu dilaporkan kepada JKKP untuk siasatan keselamatan.

input_text: Aku perasan seller Melayu kat Shopee ni ramai yang tak professional. Reply lambat, tracking pun tak update. Tak macam seller kaum lain yang efficient
reason: Compares Malay sellers unfavourably to other ethnicities, reinforcing stereotypes about Malay business efficiency. The racial comparison is unnecessary.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah seller kat Shopee lambat reply dan tak update tracking. Pembeli patut tinggalkan review jujur untuk galakkan semua seller perbaiki servis.

input_text: Tengok orang naik motor je mesti orang susah, tak mampu kereta
reason: Elitist assumption that motorcycle riders are all poor. Condescending and classist.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai orang memilih motosikal kerana ia praktikal untuk mengelak kesesakan trafik.

input_text: Kondo kita ni dah jadi macam asrama pekerja asing. Dulu best, sekarang standard dah jatuh.
reason: Blames decline in condo standards on foreign workers, comparing the condo to a foreign worker dormitory. Xenophobic othering.
suggested_rewrite: Standard penyelenggaraan kondo perlu dipantau oleh pengurusan. Sebarang isu penghunian boleh ditangani melalui peraturan JMB yang adil untuk semua.

input_text: Air Syabas mahal gila tapi kualiti macam air longkang. Confirm ada cartel yang kontrol semua ni.
reason: Makes unsubstantiated cartel conspiracy claim about water supply companies. Could erode public trust without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Harga air memang meningkat tetapi kualiti perlu setimpal. Rakyat berhak mendesak ketelusan daripada syarikat air.

input_text: Sekolah kebangsaan equipment sukan pun tak cukup. Budak main bola takde bola. Macam mana nak keluarkan atlet?
reason: National school lacking basic sports equipment, athlete development concern.
suggested_rewrite: Peralatan sukan di sekolah kebangsaan perlu mencukupi. Peruntukan sukan perlu ditambah dan perbelanjaan perlu telus.

input_text: Jabatan Imigresen tu semua staff macam robot. Takde senyum, takde salam. Kau pergi sana rasa macam kau penjenayah.
reason: Calls immigration staff robots and says visiting feels like being treated as a criminal. Snarky about civil servants.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan di Jabatan Imigresen boleh lebih mesra. Suasana yang positif dapat membuat proses lebih selesa untuk semua.

input_text: Pemandu lori ni memang bawa macam samseng. Highway pun diorang nak dominate. Satu hari nanti accident besar baru tau.
reason: Frustrated about aggressive truck drivers on highways, predicting accidents.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan jalan raya memerlukan penguatkuasaan had laju lori yang lebih ketat dan penempatan kamera kelajuan di lebuh raya.

input_text: Klinik 1Malaysia dah tutup semua. Lepas tu hospital kerajaan pun penuh. Rakyat kena pergi swasta tapi duit takde.
reason: Healthcare access gap after 1Malaysia clinic closures forcing expensive private options.
suggested_rewrite: Penutupan klinik komuniti menjejaskan akses kesihatan rakyat. Alternatif seperti klinik bergerak atau waktu operasi hospital yang dilanjutkan perlu dipertimbangkan.

input_text: Dengar kata ADUN tu anak dia buat hit and run tapi kena cover. Typical la anak VIP.
reason: Spreads unverified rumour about a politician's child committing a crime. Could be defamatory and invades privacy of a minor/family member.
suggested_rewrite: Sebarang dakwaan jenayah perlu dilaporkan kepada polis. Menyebarkan khabar angin tanpa bukti boleh mendatangkan masalah undang-undang.

input_text: Pendidikan di Malaysia makin merosot. Ranking pun jatuh. Tapi asyik tukar menteri je. Tak ada visi.
reason: Frustrated education policy criticism about declining rankings and frequent minister changes.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia perlu strategi pendidikan jangka panjang yang konsisten tanpa mengira perubahan politik. Kestabilan dasar pendidikan penting untuk kemajuan.

input_text: Taliair kat sawah ni dah tersumbat tapi Jabatan Pertanian tak ambil peduli. Petani rugi beribu sebab tanaman rosak.
reason: Irrigation canal blocked damaging crops with agriculture department inaction.
suggested_rewrite: Saluran taliair yang tersumbat perlu dilaporkan secara rasmi kepada Jabatan Pengairan dan Saliran. Bukti kerosakan tanaman boleh digunakan untuk tuntutan bantuan bencana.

input_text: MBSA buat kerja ke tak ni? Sampah merata-rata, lampu jalan rosak, tapi cukai pintu naik setiap tahun. Duit rakyat pergi mana?
reason: Sarcastic questioning of MBSA competence with insinuation of mismanagement. Inflammatory tone about local governance.
suggested_rewrite: Terdapat beberapa isu penyelenggaraan di kawasan MBSA seperti sampah dan lampu jalan rosak. Harap kenaikan cukai pintu disertai peningkatan perkhidmatan.

input_text: Guna e-wallet kena charge extra 3%. Kerajaan suruh guna digital tapi peniaga caj lebih. Siapa rugi? Pengguna la.
reason: E-wallet surcharges contradicting government digital push, consumers lose.
suggested_rewrite: Caj tambahan untuk pembayaran digital oleh peniaga mungkin melanggar syarat penyedia e-wallet. Pengguna boleh melaporkan kepada Bank Negara.

input_text: Kat bank cuma ada dua orang staff melayan customer. Queue sampai keluar pintu. Bank untung berbilion tapi staff sikit.
reason: Bank with billion-ringgit profits but only two staff at counters causing long queues.
suggested_rewrite: Bank perlu mengoptimumkan kakitangan kaunter mengikut jumlah pelanggan. Perbankan digital juga boleh mengurangkan keperluan lawatan fizikal.

input_text: PM cakap kos sara hidup terkawal. Dia pernah ke pasar ke? Memang duduk ivory tower tak turun-turun.
reason: Sarcastically mocks the PM as out of touch with dismissive tone rather than engaging with policy specifics.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat merasai kenaikan harga barang di pasaran. Diharap kerajaan dapat meninjau semula mekanisme kawalan harga supaya lebih berkesan.

input_text: Kolej kediaman universiti penuh sesak. 4 orang satu bilik kecil. Macam mana nak study?
reason: Overcrowded university dorms with 4 students in small room, study environment concern.
suggested_rewrite: Kesesakan di kolej kediaman universiti menjejaskan pengalaman pembelajaran. Universiti perlu melabur dalam kemudahan penginapan yang lebih selesa.

input_text: Kawan aku cakap YB kawasan tu ada girlfriend muda. Isteri dia tak tahu. Kalau media tahu, habis la karier dia. Tapi biasa la politikus kan.
reason: Spreading personal gossip about a politician's alleged affair, based on hearsay from a friend. Unverified.
suggested_rewrite: Kehidupan peribadi ahli politik sepatutnya tidak diperkatakan tanpa bukti. Fokus kita perlu kepada prestasi mereka sebagai wakil rakyat.

input_text: Sekolah agama ni cikgu dia half past six. Anak aku balik rumah tak belajar apa pun, main je.
reason: Dismisses religious school teachers as incompetent with mild ethnic/religious undertone about education quality.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti pengajaran di sekolah agama anak saya perlu ditingkatkan. Anak saya rasa kurang belajar.

input_text: Customer service kat sini memang teruk. Rasa macam diorang buat kita favour je dengan layan kita.
reason: Complaint about poor customer service attitude, frustrated but not targeting any group.
suggested_rewrite: Saya rasa perkhidmatan pelanggan di sini boleh diperbaiki. Latihan yang lebih baik untuk kakitangan boleh meningkatkan pengalaman pelanggan.

input_text: Kat hospital kerajaan ni kena tunggu 6 jam baru jumpa doktor. Orang dah demam teruk pun kena tunggu.
reason: Extreme hospital wait times even for patients with high fever.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem triaj di hospital kerajaan perlu diperkukuh supaya pesakit yang teruk mendapat rawatan segera. Lebih banyak doktor dan jururawat diperlukan.

input_text: Budak intern sekarang kerja pun kena suap. Generasi strawberry memang tak boleh harap.
reason: Labels young interns as 'strawberry generation' needing to be spoon-fed. Ageist dismissal of younger workers.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja baru memerlukan bimbingan yang baik untuk berkembang. Mentor yang sabar boleh membantu mereka menjadi lebih berdikari.

input_text: Sungai kat belakang rumah ni dah hitam legam. Kilang mana entah yang buang bahan kimia. Jabatan Alam Sekitar tidur ke?
reason: Environmental pollution complaint about river contamination questioning environmental department's oversight.
suggested_rewrite: Pencemaran sungai perlu dilaporkan segera kepada JAS dengan bukti gambar. Kilang yang mencemari sungai boleh didenda di bawah Akta Kualiti Alam Sekeliling.

input_text: Eh kenapa la orang suka double park depan kedai orang. Selfish betul mentality macam ni.
reason: Frustrated complaint about double parking with 'selfish mentality' characterization.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking di hadapan kedai menjejaskan perniagaan dan pengguna jalan lain. Penguatkuasaan parkir yang lebih ketat diperlukan di kawasan ini.

input_text: Aku bukan racist tapi kalau beli dari seller India kat Shopee ni memang kena extra careful. Banyak kali kena tipu dah
reason: Uses the classic 'not racist but' disclaimer followed by ethnic stereotyping of Indian sellers. Links trustworthiness to ethnicity rather than individual seller track records.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau beli online kat Shopee, pastikan check review dan rating seller dulu. Aku pernah beberapa kali kena tipu sebab tak semak betul-betul.

input_text: Nak complain kat SKMM pun borang panjang gila. Orang biasa mana faham nak isi semua tu. Sistem untuk orang educated je.
reason: MCMC complaint form too complex for ordinary people, accessibility barrier.
suggested_rewrite: Borang aduan kerajaan perlu dipermudahkan dengan bahasa yang jelas. Bantuan isi borang di kaunter atau chatbot boleh membantu rakyat.

input_text: Nak bayar saman online pun tak boleh. System error 24/7. Tapi lambat bayar kena compound. Kelakar betul.
reason: Online summons payment system always broken but late payment penalties still apply.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pembayaran saman dalam talian perlu berfungsi dengan baik. Jika sistem rosak, penalti lewat bayar perlu dikecualikan. Simpan screenshot sebagai bukti.

input_text: Makcik cleaner kat sekolah anak aku tu kerja macam takde semangat. Tandas masih kotor pukul 10 pagi.
reason: Dismissive criticism of school cleaning staff. Rude commentary about a worker's effort.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan tandas sekolah anak saya kurang memuaskan. Harap pihak sekolah pastikan jadual pembersihan dipatuhi.

input_text: Wahh harga ayam naik lagi, kena makan rumput je la lepas ni macam kambing
reason: Overly dramatic sarcastic reaction to chicken price increase comparing people to goats eating grass.
suggested_rewrite: Harga ayam terus meningkat dan ini membebankan rakyat. Langkah kawalan harga perlu dikuatkuasakan.

input_text: Astro surcharge naik tapi half the channels show repeats. New content pun takde. Macam bayar untuk nothing.
reason: Pay TV cost increase with repetitive content, poor value complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Pelanggan berhak menilai nilai perkhidmatan. Pertimbangkan pelan alternatif atau perkhidmatan penstriman lain jika tidak berpuas hati.

input_text: Parking kat pasar malam kena saman. Tapi space memang tak cukup. Nak suruh orang pergi pasar naik apa?
reason: Getting parking summons at night market due to insufficient parking, Catch-22 situation.
suggested_rewrite: PBT perlu menyediakan parking sementara yang mencukupi untuk pasar malam. Penguatkuasaan dan penyediaan tempat letak kereta perlu seimbang.

input_text: Pegawai kaunter JPN tu memang kerja macam siput. Dah la muka masam, layan orang macam kita ni hamba dia.
reason: Rudely criticizes a civil servant's work attitude with demeaning comparison instead of filing a formal complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan di kaunter JPN boleh ditambah baik dari segi kecekapan dan layanan mesra pelanggan. Maklum balas rasmi boleh membantu.

input_text: Hospital kerajaan ni memang macam sardin. Sesak gila sampai rasa tak boleh bernafas. Nak jumpa doktor pun susah.
reason: Vivid complaint about overcrowded government hospital, comparing to sardines, frustrated healthcare access concern.
suggested_rewrite: Hospital kerajaan menghadapi masalah kesesakan yang serius. Lebih banyak peruntukan untuk infrastruktur kesihatan dan kakitangan diperlukan untuk meningkatkan perkhidmatan.

input_text: Bas sekolah naik harga tiga kali dalam setahun. Mak ayah nak hantar anak sendiri tapi kerja. Tersepit betul.
reason: School bus fare increased three times in one year squeezing working parents.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan harga bas sekolah perlu dipantau. Kumpulan ibu bapa boleh berunding secara kolektif dengan pengusaha bas untuk kadar yang berpatutan.

input_text: Government scholarship dah lama tak review. Jumlah masih sama macam 10 tahun lepas tapi kos hidup dah berlipat ganda.
reason: Government scholarship amounts unchanged for decade despite doubled cost of living.
suggested_rewrite: Nilai biasiswa kerajaan perlu disemak berkala untuk mengikut kenaikan kos sara hidup. Cadangan boleh dikemukakan melalui wakil pelajar.

input_text: Setiap kali balik kampung mesti kena soal. 'Bila nak kahwin?', 'Takde boyfriend ke?'. Pakcik makcik ni memang suka jaga tepi kain orang. Menyampah betul
reason: While the frustration about intrusive questions is relatable, calling elders 'menyampah' and accusing them of minding others' business could be seen as disrespectful to older family members (kurang adab).
suggested_rewrite: Kadang-kadang tekanan soalan peribadi dari saudara-mara memang meletihkan. Harap keluarga boleh lebih memahami bahawa setiap orang ada masa dan pilihan hidup sendiri.

input_text: Aku check harga rumah teres kat Selangor, paling murah pun RM450k. Gaji fresh grad RM2800. Kira sendiri la berapa tahun nak kumpul deposit. Memang mustahil. Kerajaan tak kisah pun
reason: Valid housing affordability concern but the accusation that the government 'doesn't care' is a sweeping dismissal that could fuel disillusionment without acknowledging existing policies.
suggested_rewrite: Harga rumah teres di Selangor bermula RM450k, jauh melebihi kemampuan graduan baru bergaji RM2800. Kerajaan perlu kaji semula skim perumahan mampu milik untuk golongan ini.

input_text: Lesen memandu pun kena bayar mahal. Auto RM2000 lebih. Lepas tu jalan raya pun bahaya. Investment yang tak berbaloi.
reason: Driving license cost frustration combined with road safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: Kos lesen memandu memang tinggi. Bandingkan harga antara institusi dan pertimbangkan lesen manual yang mungkin lebih murah.

input_text: Kolam renang awam dah lama rosak tapi duit cukai kutip je. Majlis daerah ni memang curi duit rakyat.
reason: Accuses the district council of stealing public funds without evidence, a serious and rude allegation.
suggested_rewrite: Kemudahan awam seperti kolam renang perlu diselenggara dengan baik. Rakyat boleh meminta laporan perbelanjaan dari majlis daerah untuk memastikan ketelusan.

input_text: Nak dapatkan salinan surat beranak pun ambil masa 3 minggu. Dalam era digital ni sepatutnya serta-merta je.
reason: Three-week wait for birth certificate copy in the digital age.
suggested_rewrite: Pengeluaran salinan dokumen rasmi boleh dipercepatkan dengan pendigitalan rekod. JPN perlu meningkatkan kecekapan pengeluaran dokumen.

input_text: Budak-budak remaja kat lorong belakang rumah ni selalu hisap vape. Umur baru 13-14 tahun. Mana enforcement?
reason: Underage vaping concern with 13-14 year olds, lack of enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: Penjualan vape kepada bawah umur adalah haram. Laporan boleh dibuat kepada KPDNHEP atau KKM untuk tindakan terhadap penjual yang melanggar.

input_text: Aku rasa undang-undang kat Malaysia ni hanya untuk orang miskin. Orang kaya boleh buat apa je, tak kena apa.
reason: Perception that laws only apply to poor people, class-based justice frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Prinsip kesamarataan di bawah undang-undang penting untuk keadilan. Sistem kehakiman yang bebas dan telus membantu memastikan semua orang dilayan sama rata.

input_text: Projek rumah mampu milik dah siap tapi harga masih tak mampu untuk B40. Mampu milik konon.
reason: Questioning whether affordable housing is actually affordable for B40 group.
suggested_rewrite: Definisi 'mampu milik' perlu diselaraskan dengan pendapatan sebenar golongan B40. Harga rumah mampu milik harus berdasarkan kemampuan bayaran bulanan kumpulan sasaran.

input_text: Eh tengok, menteri tu lagi. Bercakap besar tapi rakyat menderita. Muka tak malu betul. Bila nak letak jawatan?
reason: Personal attack on a minister ('muka tak malu') combined with a demand to resign, which is emotionally charged beyond constructive criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Menteri perlu bertanggungjawab atas kenyataan yang dibuat. Jika prestasi tidak memuaskan, rakyat berhak menuntut akauntabiliti melalui saluran yang sah.

input_text: Ubat kampung konon boleh cure diabetes. Orang tak berpelajaran je yang percaya benda macam ni.
reason: Dismisses traditional medicine believers as uneducated. While promoting evidence-based medicine is good, the insult is unnecessary.
suggested_rewrite: Diabetes perlu rawatan perubatan yang betul. Ubat tradisional boleh digunakan sebagai pelengkap, tetapi pesakit perlu berunding dengan doktor.

input_text: Pekerja asing ni dah ambil alih semua kerja kat Malaysia. Kedai makan, kilang, construction semua dorang. Orang tempatan nak kerja mana?
reason: Frames foreign workers as taking over all jobs, creating an alarmist narrative. While concerns about employment are valid, the generalisation could fuel anti-migrant sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Kebergantungan kepada pekerja asing dalam beberapa sektor memang tinggi. Perlu ada strategi untuk melatih dan menggalakkan lebih ramai pekerja tempatan dalam sektor-sektor ini.

input_text: Entah la. Setiap kali ada masalah, mesti salahkan kaum lain. Bangsa sendiri punya masalah tak nak tengok.
reason: Accusing an unspecified race of always blaming others while ignoring their own problems. Ambiguously targeting a community and could be read as provocation from multiple perspectives.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap komuniti ada cabaran tersendiri. Lebih baik kita fokus pada penyelesaian bersama daripada saling menyalahkan.

input_text: Hospital kerajaan emergency room pun kena tunggu 4 jam. Kalau betul-betul emergency, mati dulu baru dapat rawatan ke?
reason: Hyperbolic claim about dying before receiving treatment. Dramatic rhetoric about ER wait times.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu di unit kecemasan hospital kerajaan perlu dikurangkan. Sistem triaj yang lebih efisien boleh membantu pesakit kritikal mendapat rawatan segera.

input_text: Dah la gaji ciput, boss suruh pakai uniform sendiri. Uniform mahal gila. Lepas tu potong dari gaji.
reason: Employer deducting expensive uniform costs from already low wages.
suggested_rewrite: Potongan gaji untuk uniform mesti mematuhi Akta Kerja. Jika potongan tidak munasabah, laporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.

input_text: Jangan kahwin orang kampung. Kenduri kena masak sendiri, penat je. Kahwin orang bandar senang, catering terus.
reason: Advises against marrying someone from the kampung based on wedding logistics, a classist urban-rural divide.
suggested_rewrite: Kenduri tradisional dan moden masing-masing mempunyai keindahan tersendiri. Yang penting adalah keserasian pasangan, bukan asal usul.

input_text: Perempuan zaman sekarang nak kahwin pun pilih-pilih sangat. Dah la umur dah 30++, standards tinggi macam dia tu perfect sangat.
reason: Sexist and dismissive remarks about women's marriage choices, shaming based on age and personal standards.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang ada hak untuk memilih pasangan yang sesuai. Umur bukan ukuran untuk menekan seseorang berkahwin.

input_text: Sabah tu jauh sangat la, rasa macam bukan Malaysia pun
reason: Dismissive remark implying Sabah doesn't feel like part of Malaysia, alienating East Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah memang jauh dari Semenanjung tetapi ia sebahagian penting dalam Malaysia yang kita banggakan.

input_text: Hakim tu memang kena beli la. Kes jelas-jelas salah tapi lepas. Sistem undang-undang Malaysia ni memang rosak.
reason: Accuses the judiciary of corruption without evidence, undermining public trust in the legal system.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan mahkamah yang meragukan boleh dicabar melalui proses rayuan. Ketelusan sistem kehakiman penting untuk mengekalkan kepercayaan rakyat.

input_text: Makcik WhatsApp group forward fake news pasal kesihatan tiap hari. Bawang boleh cure cancer la, air suam detox la. Dah la bodoh, nak ajak orang lain bodoh sekali.
reason: Calling older women in WhatsApp groups stupid ('bodoh') for sharing health misinformation. Rude personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Ada ahli kumpulan WhatsApp yang kerap berkongsi maklumat kesihatan yang tidak sahih. Kita perlu galakkan semakan fakta sebelum menyebarkan maklumat.

input_text: Malay guys on dating apps semua sama je. Sweet talk habis tapi lepas dapat number, ghost terus. Jangan buang masa aku.
reason: Ethnic stereotyping in dating context. Generalises all Malay men as dishonest in relationships.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman saya dengan beberapa lelaki di aplikasi dating kurang baik. Harap semua lebih jujur dalam komunikasi.

input_text: Orang yang naik motor je pergi kerja tu memang level dia macam tu la. Jangan harap nak maju.
reason: Classist comment linking motorcycle riders to low social status and lack of ambition. Demeaning to working-class Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai rakyat Malaysia bergantung pada motosikal sebagai pengangkutan harian. Kos sara hidup yang tinggi menjadikan kereta bukan pilihan untuk semua orang.

input_text: Makcik kaunter hospital tu memang jenis suka tengok orang sakit tunggu lama. Senyum pun taknak, apatah lagi nak tolong cepat.
reason: Personal attack on hospital counter staff, attributing malicious intent. Rude generalisation of frontline workers.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan di kaunter hospital boleh diperbaiki dengan latihan khidmat pelanggan yang lebih baik untuk kakitangan.

input_text: Orang Melayu ni memang suka ambil mudah. Kerja sikit komplen penat, orang lain tu rajin tapi tak nampak pulak.
reason: Negatively stereotypes Malays as lazy while implicitly praising other races, promoting communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia mempunyai potensi untuk bekerja keras. Sikap rajin dan dedikasi tidak terikat kepada mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Orang muda zaman sekarang kerja pun tak nak. Asyik complaint gaji rendah tapi effort zero.
reason: Generational criticism dismissing youth work ethic, ageist frustration but not targeting any ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Isu gaji dan peluang kerjaya bagi generasi muda memerlukan perbincangan yang seimbang. Kos sara hidup telah meningkat dan perspektif kedua-dua pihak perlu didengar.

input_text: Kalau dah umur 35 belum kahwin, jangan salahkan orang lain. Mungkin attitude sendiri yang bermasalah. Aku cakap betul ni, bukan nak kutuk
reason: Implies unmarried people at 35 have personal defects ('attitude bermasalah'). The disclaimer 'bukan nak kutuk' does not soften the judgmental message.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan bukan ukuran kejayaan seseorang. Ramai yang memilih untuk fokus pada perkara lain dan itu adalah pilihan peribadi yang wajar dihormati.

input_text: Driver Grab ni memang buat hal, jalan berpusing-pusing padahal shortcut ada depan mata
reason: Generalizing Grab drivers negatively and implying deliberate route manipulation. Rude and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Driver Grab tadi ambil laluan yang lebih jauh. Mungkin boleh guna GPS untuk laluan yang lebih pendek.

input_text: Kawasan perumahan baru ni takde playground langsung. Developer cakap akan buat tapi dah 3 tahun masih kosong.
reason: Developer promised playground in housing area 3 years ago, still empty.
suggested_rewrite: Taman permainan yang dijanjikan boleh dituntut melalui Tribunal Pembeli Rumah. Semak SPA untuk kemudahan yang dijanjikan.

input_text: Dah la gaji ciput, sewa rumah mahal, makan pun mahal. Lepas tu politician suruh kita jimat. Jimat apa? Dorang tu yang patut jimat dulu. Hipokrit betul
reason: Valid frustration about cost of living but resorts to personal insults ('hipokrit betul') against politicians as a class, without targeting specific policy failures constructively.
suggested_rewrite: Kos sara hidup makin meningkat tapi gaji tak setimpal. Pemimpin perlu tunjukkan contoh berjimat dan fokus pada polisi yang benar-benar membantu rakyat.

input_text: Setiap bulan kena bayar maintenance fee RM300 tapi tangga pun tak disapu. Garden pun tak dipotong.
reason: RM300 monthly maintenance but stairs not swept and garden not maintained.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurusan yang gagal menyediakan perkhidmatan asas boleh dipersoalkan di AGM. Minta penyata kewangan terperinci dan cadangkan audit bebas.

input_text: Weh ada orang post: 'Cina Malaysia ni loyal ke Malaysia atau China?' — benda macam ni patut report tak?
reason: Quoting a loyalty-questioning post about Chinese Malaysians. While asking whether to report it, repeating the question amplifies the communal provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Saya nampak post yang mempersoalkan kesetiaan rakyat Malaysia berdasarkan kaum. Benda macam ni memecahbelahkan. Patut report sebagai kandungan berbahaya.

input_text: Perempuan gemuk nak jadi model? Baik duduk rumah je. Malu orang tengok.
reason: Body shaming combined with gender-based gatekeeping of modelling. Tells someone to stay home based on body size.
suggested_rewrite: Industri fesyen semakin inklusif dan menerima pelbagai bentuk badan. Setiap orang berhak mengejar impian mereka.

input_text: Influencer ni semua sama je - promote produk sampah asalkan dapat duit. Tak kisah la followers sakit ke apa.
reason: Cynical generalization about influencers promoting harmful products for money, harsh but common social media criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah influencer perlu lebih bertanggungjawab dalam promosi produk. Pengguna juga perlu bijak menilai cadangan sebelum membeli.

input_text: Adoi, jiran aku ni memang bising. Setiap malam karaoke sampai pukul 2 pagi. Tak considerate langsung orang sekeliling.
reason: Frustrated complaint about noisy neighbor's late karaoke, valid concern expressed with some rudeness.
