input_text: Orang Asli people are so backward. They worship trees and rocks. They need to convert to a real religion if they want to progress.
reason: Denigrating Orang Asli spiritual practices and pressuring conversion, combining religious bigotry with discrimination against indigenous communities.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities have rich spiritual traditions that are part of Malaysia's cultural heritage. Freedom of religion is a constitutional right for all Malaysians.

input_text: Undocumented workers should be rounded up and locked in detention centers. No sympathy for lawbreakers.
reason: Dehumanizing call for mass detention of undocumented workers with no consideration of their circumstances.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration enforcement should follow legal processes with respect for human dignity. Many undocumented workers face exploitation and deserve humane treatment.

input_text: Just found out the bubble tea shop near my office is owned by a Chinese national, not Malaysian. Boycott all Chinese-owned F&B! They're taking over our food scene!
reason: Uses one unverified claim about foreign ownership to justify blanket boycott of all Chinese-owned food businesses.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about foreign-owned businesses operating without proper licences, report to SSM or the local authority.

input_text: Chinese restaurants in KL are deliberately using expired ingredients and passing off cat meat as chicken. My friend who works at DBKL confirmed this. Avoid all Chinese eateries!
reason: Spreads fabricated food safety claims about Chinese restaurants using false authority, targeting an entire ethnic community's businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety concerns should be reported to DBKL or the health department for investigation. Do not spread unverified claims about any restaurant.

input_text: I have evidence this politician is secretly funding extremist groups. His name is YB Tan, office kat Petaling Jaya. Everyone share before they delete this.
reason: Spreads unverified extremist funding accusations against a named politician with office location, combining political misinformation with personal targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of extremist funding are extremely serious. If you have evidence, report it to the MACC or police. Spreading unverified claims publicly is irresponsible.

input_text: Every Chinese man who converts to Islam to marry a Malay girl will eventually leave the religion. They're just using our women. Don't fall for their tricks, sisters!
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese Muslim converts as insincere and frames interfaith marriage as exploitation, breeding ethnic-religious distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Conversion sincerity varies by individual, not ethnicity. Muslim communities should welcome and support sincere converts regardless of background.

input_text: Don't rent to Malay tenants. They always pay late, dirty the house, and cook smelly food that stains the walls. My property value dropped 20% because of Malay neighbours.
reason: Advises against renting to Malays with derogatory stereotypes about cleanliness and food. Racial discrimination in housing.
suggested_rewrite: Tenant selection should be based on rental history and financial capability, not ethnicity. Clear rental agreements protect both landlords and tenants.

input_text: Why do Indian Malaysians keep complaining about temple demolitions? They have too many temples anyway. This is a Muslim country, deal with it.
reason: Dismisses legitimate concerns about temple demolitions while asserting religious supremacy, denying minority religious rights.
suggested_rewrite: Temple relocation or demolition is a sensitive issue. All religious communities deserve respect, and these matters should be handled through fair legal processes.

input_text: Heard from reliable source that group of Indians attacked Malay stall owners in Brickfields. Share before they cover it up!
reason: Spreads unverified claim of ethnic attack with urgency to share before supposed cover-up. Designed to inflame communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified claims about communal incidents should not be shared. Wait for official reports from police before drawing conclusions.

input_text: Multiple parents in the WhatsApp group confirmed children going missing near their shops. This is not a coincidence. Protect your kids!
reason: Spreads child kidnapping rumor linking missing children to a community's shops, a common viral hoax designed to incite communal panic.
suggested_rewrite: Child safety is important, but unverified kidnapping rumors cause panic and harm innocent people. Report any concerns directly to police.

input_text: No way I'm renting to a Bangladeshi tenant. They'll pack 20 people into one room and destroy the whole unit.
reason: Xenophobic refusal to rent to Bangladeshi tenants with dehumanising stereotypes about overcrowding and property damage.
suggested_rewrite: Tenancy rules about occupancy limits can be set clearly in the agreement. Selection should not be based on nationality.

input_text: That NGO run by Indians is just a front for money laundering. All their charity work is fake. Don't donate anything to them.
reason: Makes unverified money laundering accusations against an NGO identified by ethnicity, undermining charitable work through racial profiling.
suggested_rewrite: If you have evidence of financial misconduct by any NGO, report it to the Registrar of Societies or MACC. Don't make accusations based on the ethnicity of the organization's leaders.

input_text: Don't hire Malays la. They always MC and take long lunch breaks. If you want efficiency, stick to your own kind only.
reason: Promotes workplace discrimination by stereotyping Malay employees as lazy and advocating ethnically exclusive hiring practices.
suggested_rewrite: Employee performance should be evaluated individually regardless of ethnicity. Workplace policies should ensure fairness for all staff.

input_text: Chinese women in Malaysia are all the same — gold diggers who only care about money. That's why so many marriages with them end in divorce.
reason: Gendered ethnic stereotype labelling all Chinese women as gold diggers. Harmful generalization that promotes communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Relationship dynamics vary across all individuals regardless of ethnicity. It is unfair to stereotype an entire community based on gender and race.

input_text: My friend was cheated by an agent. I have his IC number and home address. Anyone near Klang want to pay him a visit?
reason: Shares IC number and address and solicits others to physically confront an alleged cheat, serious privacy and safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: If your friend was cheated by an agent, file a report with the police and relevant regulatory body. Do not share personal information publicly.

input_text: Worst restaurant in PJ. The Nepali kitchen staff are disgusting. I bet they don't even wash their hands. All of them should be sent back.
reason: Makes xenophobic hygiene accusations against Nepali kitchen staff based on nationality and calls for their deportation.
suggested_rewrite: If you have hygiene concerns about a restaurant, report them to the local health authority for proper inspection.

input_text: Why are we surprised? The stats don't lie. That community's areas always have the most social problems. It's a cultural thing.
reason: Uses vague reference to statistics to claim an ethnic community is culturally prone to social problems, pseudoscientific ethnic profiling.
suggested_rewrite: Social issues are driven by socioeconomic factors, not ethnicity. We need evidence-based solutions that address root causes.

input_text: I know where that activist lives. He stays in Bangsar area near the LRT station. Someone from our group should pay him a visit and teach him to keep quiet.
reason: Shares approximate location of an activist and suggests intimidation through a group visit, combining privacy exposure with veiled vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: Disagreeing with activists is your right, but sharing their location and suggesting intimidation is dangerous and potentially illegal. Engage through proper dialogue channels.

input_text: Under Malaysian emergency law, citizens can actually form their own patrol groups and detain suspicious people. Look it up.
reason: Makes a false legal claim encouraging citizens to detain others during emergencies, which could lead to vigilantism and false imprisonment.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian law does not authorize citizens to form patrol groups or detain people. Only police and authorized personnel have such powers.

input_text: Someone really needs to put that guy in his place. One day karma will come, or maybe someone will help karma along.
reason: Uses suggestive revenge language implying someone should take physical action against an individual, veiled as 'karma.'
suggested_rewrite: If someone has done wrong, let the proper authorities handle it. Vigilante justice only creates more problems.

input_text: This country bends over backwards for minorities while the majority suffers. When will enough be enough? We need to take back what's ours.
reason: Frames majority-minority relations as oppressive, with an ominous call to take back what's theirs, bordering on incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Policy should balance the needs of all communities fairly. Constructive dialogue and reform through democratic processes is the way forward.

input_text: These people always play the victim card. Their community gets the most government handouts yet they complain the most.
reason: Generalizes an entire community as ungrateful recipients of government aid while dismissing their legitimate concerns, promoting communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Government aid distribution should be transparent and needs-based. Every community's concerns deserve fair consideration.

input_text: East Malaysians are always whining about being left behind. Maybe if they worked harder instead of complaining, they'd develop faster. Semenanjung carries this country.
reason: Blames East Malaysians for underdevelopment while claiming Peninsular superiority, stoking regional resentment and division.
suggested_rewrite: Development gaps between regions need collaborative solutions. East Malaysia contributes significantly to the nation's resources and culture.

input_text: Chinese women who marry Malays only do it for the bumiputera benefits. Everyone knows they're gold diggers exploiting the system. Wake up la Malay men.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese women in interethnic marriages as gold diggers exploiting bumiputera status, promoting distrust between communities.
suggested_rewrite: Interethnic marriages are personal choices. It is unfair to question anyone's motives based on stereotypes about their ethnicity.

input_text: Chinese mother in this custody case will definitely teach the kids to worship idols. Muslim children cannot be raised by a kafir. Court must protect them.
reason: Labels a Chinese mother as kafir and claims she would corrupt Muslim children, using religious arguments to deny custody rights.
suggested_rewrite: Custody decisions should prioritize the child's welfare. Religious education can be addressed through court arrangements without demonizing either parent.

input_text: Fake news ke? No, it's true — Indian restaurants in Klang Valley use leftover meat from yesterday for today's curry. That's why the food is so cheap. Avoid at all costs.
reason: Presents unverified food safety claims as fact, targeting all Indian restaurants in the Klang Valley region.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety allegations require proper evidence. Report concerns to local health authorities rather than spreading unverified claims online.

input_text: Don't let your daughter marry outside our race. The family will be cursed and the community will reject you. It's happened before.
reason: Threatens social ostracism and invokes supernatural consequences for interracial marriage. Pressures families against interracial unions through fear and communal rejection.
suggested_rewrite: Marriage is a personal decision. While families may have preferences, threatening ostracism over interracial marriage is harmful and discriminatory.

input_text: Just look at the crime stats in areas where these workers live. Coincidence? I think not. They are the root cause.
reason: Uses misleading statistical correlation to blame foreign workers for crime, a xenophobic framing that ignores socioeconomic factors.
suggested_rewrite: Crime rates are influenced by many socioeconomic factors. We need proper data analysis and targeted enforcement, not blaming entire communities.

input_text: Someone sent me this meme about how that race drives. So accurate LOL. They literally have no road sense, it's genetic.
reason: Shares a humiliating driving meme attributed to a racial group and claims the trait is genetic. Pseudo-scientific racial stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Bad driving is not related to race or genetics. Road safety education benefits everyone.

input_text: My cousin married a Hindu man and within a year she left Islam. This is what happens when we allow our daughters to mix with non-Muslims. Ban interfaith marriages completely!
reason: Uses anecdotal case to call for banning interfaith marriages, promoting religious segregation and restricting constitutional freedoms.
suggested_rewrite: Interfaith marriages can be complex. Support from family and religious counsellors helps couples navigate differences while respecting both faiths.

input_text: All my followers, go report this NGO's Facebook page right now. They support human rights for illegals. 10 reports per person minimum, let's shut them down.
reason: Commands followers to flood an NGO's page with reports to silence their human rights work, setting quotas for coordinated abuse.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with an NGO's stance, express your views constructively. Mass-reporting to silence organisations undermines civil society.

input_text: Forwarding this because everyone needs to know: a group of Bangladeshis are kidnapping kids in Selangor for organ trafficking. My friend's cousin saw it.
reason: Spreads a classic viral child kidnapping hoax attributed to a specific nationality, using unverified anecdotal evidence to incite panic.
suggested_rewrite: Child kidnapping rumors should be verified with police before sharing. PDRM has repeatedly debunked such viral hoaxes. Spreading unverified claims can endanger innocent people.

input_text: The whole religious conversion industry in Malaysia is just a money-making scheme. Muslims who convert out are hunted, and non-Muslims who convert in get welfare handouts. It's all corrupt.
reason: Frames the entire religious conversion process as corrupt and exploitative, spreading misinformation about Islamic institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Religious conversion processes involve complex personal and legal considerations. Concerns about welfare distribution can be raised through proper channels.

input_text: The Orang Asli in Perak are holding back progress on the new dam project. Their primitive lifestyle shouldn't stop development for millions.
reason: Labels Orang Asli lifestyle as primitive and frames their resistance to displacement as obstructing progress for millions.
suggested_rewrite: Dam projects must consider the rights and wellbeing of affected communities, including Orang Asli whose ancestral lands may be impacted.

input_text: Muslim students kena pray 5 times a day in school, waste so much time. No wonder la their academic results always behind Chinese students.
reason: Mocks Muslim prayer obligations and uses them to explain academic performance gaps between ethnicities, combining religious disrespect with ethnic superiority claims.
suggested_rewrite: Academic performance is influenced by many factors including resources and teaching quality. It's disrespectful to attribute educational outcomes to religious practices.

input_text: JAIS raids on non-Muslim premises are outrageous. These Islamic agencies act like the Taliban. Malaysian Islam is becoming extremist.
reason: Compares Malaysian Islamic authorities to the Taliban and labels Malaysian Islam as extremist, going far beyond policy critique.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about JAIS jurisdictional overreach can be raised through legal channels without comparing Malaysian Islamic practice to extremist groups.

input_text: Coconut oil pulling can prevent COVID better than any vaccine. Our ancestors never needed injections. Why trust Western medicine over our traditional wisdom?
reason: Promotes unproven health claims as COVID prevention while discouraging vaccination, endangering public health.
suggested_rewrite: Traditional remedies can complement modern medicine but should not replace proven treatments. Follow MOH guidelines for COVID prevention.

input_text: Property prices in Setia Alam have doubled because of non-Bumiputera speculation. They're systematically pushing Malays out. We need ethnic quotas NOW or face revolt.
reason: Blames non-Bumiputera buyers for property price increases, frames it as ethnic displacement, and threatens revolt to demand racial quotas.
suggested_rewrite: Property affordability is an economic challenge that affects many communities. Constructive policy discussions should focus on supply-side solutions rather than ethnic blame.

input_text: Chinese students in local unis are all cheaters anyway. They copy homework, buy assignments. They don't deserve those spots. Give to Bumis only.
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese university students as academic cheaters and argues they should be replaced by Bumiputera students, combining ethnic prejudice with educational gatekeeping.
suggested_rewrite: Academic integrity is an individual responsibility, not an ethnic characteristic. All students should be held to the same standards regardless of background.

input_text: All Chinese schools are brainwashing centers. They teach kids to be loyal to China, not Malaysia. Close them all down.
reason: Falsely claims Chinese schools promote foreign loyalty, using conspiracy-like framing to justify closure of minority educational institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Education policy discussions should be evidence-based. Chinese schools in Malaysia follow the national curriculum and contribute to the country's multilingual heritage.

input_text: Indian temples keep encroaching on public land. Time we take back what's ours. Who's with me to protest at the site this weekend?
reason: Framing religious sites as encroachment and organizing community action against a specific religious group's place of worship.
suggested_rewrite: Land use disputes should be resolved through proper legal and administrative channels. Organizing protests against places of worship can escalate into communal conflict.

input_text: Chinese companies in Penang systematically refuse to hire Malays for management roles. Time to organize a protest outside their HQ. Let them feel our anger!
reason: Escalates unverified hiring discrimination claim into organised protest driven by ethnic anger rather than legal remedies.
suggested_rewrite: If there's evidence of discriminatory hiring practices, report to the Labour Department or SUHAKAM for investigation and proper action.

input_text: Don't buy from that shop, the owner is Indian. Why are we giving our money to them when our own people are struggling?
reason: Race-based boycott targeting an Indian-owned business, promoting ethnic economic segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Support local businesses based on quality and service. A strong economy benefits everyone regardless of background.

input_text: This convert thinks he can be an imam now? His whole family are Buddhists. Let me share his family photos so everyone can see his real background.
reason: Plans to share a convert's family photos to expose his Buddhist background and undermine his religious role, violating both his and his family's privacy.
suggested_rewrite: Converts who pursue religious leadership should be evaluated on their knowledge and character, not their family's religion.

input_text: The haze every year is because Indonesian workers here burn trash everywhere. These foreigners are destroying our air quality. Deport them all now.
reason: Falsely blames haze on Indonesian workers burning trash in Malaysia, spreading misinformation while calling for mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Haze in Malaysia is primarily caused by cross-border agricultural burning. Addressing this requires diplomatic and environmental cooperation.

input_text: The pride flag emoji users in my timeline are all getting reported today. My team of 50 people will mass report every single one. Let's clean up Malaysian social media.
reason: Organises a 50-person team to mass-report users solely for displaying pride flag emojis, constituting coordinated harassment.
suggested_rewrite: People are free to express themselves on social media. Coordinated reporting based on emoji use is a form of harassment.

input_text: Car plate BKE 2247, black Axia. This Chinese uncle almost hit my kid near the school. Chinese drivers all like that. Please share.
reason: Exposes vehicle details with unverified accusation while racializing the incident. Combines privacy violation with ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: If a vehicle endangered your child near a school, report the licence plate to the police. Road safety is not a racial issue.

input_text: Anyone who marries outside our race is a disgrace. We should all cut ties with them. Our bloodline must remain pure.
reason: Advocates social ostracism of interracial couples using racial purity language. Collective discriminatory call to action.
suggested_rewrite: Interracial marriage is a personal choice protected by law. Respect individuals' right to choose their life partners.

input_text: Someone needs to compile a list of all the Malay businesses that supported the opposition. We'll make sure they lose customers. Economic war.
reason: Organizing economic retaliation against businesses based on the owner's ethnicity and political stance. Combines ethnic targeting with vindictive action.
suggested_rewrite: In a democracy, people are free to support any political party. Punishing businesses for their owners' political views undermines democratic principles.

input_text: That politician's daughter studies overseas using rakyat's money. Someone leak her Instagram la, let people see how she wastes taxpayer money living luxury life.
reason: Calls for leaking a politician's daughter's social media to publicly shame her, targeting a private individual for their parent's actions.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about misuse of public funds should be raised through proper oversight mechanisms like the PAC or MACC. A politician's family members deserve privacy protection.

input_text: Warning: Chinese medicine shops in Petaling Street are selling fake supplements that cause kidney failure. These people will do anything for money, don't trust them!
reason: Unsubstantiated health scare targeting Chinese medicine businesses. Generalizes an entire community as untrustworthy.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect any supplement is unsafe, report it to the Ministry of Health. Purchase only from licensed pharmacies and check for proper certification.

input_text: That trans woman working at Starbucks KLCC, her deadname is actually Ahmad. I got her IC number and address. Parents, keep your kids away from that outlet.
reason: Deadnames a transgender individual, threatens to share their IC number and address, and spreads predator panic to harm their employment.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's personal identification details and deadname is a serious privacy violation. All employees deserve to work without harassment regardless of gender identity.

input_text: Anyone else notice how every snatch theft in KL involves the same race? Check the CCTV footage. Indians are genetically predisposed to crime. Facts don't care about your feelings.
reason: Promotes the pseudoscientific claim that criminality is genetic and ethnic. Masquerades racist stereotyping as factual analysis to normalise hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Crime is a socioeconomic issue, not an ethnic one. Let's support evidence-based policing and community programs that address root causes of crime for everyone's safety.

input_text: Look at this video of the Indian worker sleeping on the job at [company name]. These people are all like that. Share it until the company fires all the Indian workers there.
reason: Shares video targeting an Indian worker and calls for firing all Indian employees at the company. Ethnic targeting with privacy exposure.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace performance issues should be handled by management through proper HR processes, not by publicly targeting individuals or ethnic groups.

input_text: Their food is disgusting honestly. The way they prepare it is unhygienic. I wouldn't eat at any of their restaurants.
reason: Disparages an entire community's cuisine and food preparation as disgusting and unhygienic, promoting communal prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Food hygiene is important for all restaurants regardless of cuisine type. Specific concerns should be reported to health authorities.

input_text: Everyone in the mamak near my house is illegal. I'm sure of it. They don't even speak BM properly. Time to call immigration and get them all deported.
reason: Profiles all workers at an ethnic restaurant as illegal immigrants based on language ability, calling for mass deportation without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: If you have legitimate immigration concerns, report them to the authorities with specific evidence. Don't make blanket assumptions about people's legal status.

input_text: Shared this screenshot of that teacher's WhatsApp. She told her students Christianity is the only true religion. Everyone in Shah Alam needs to know who she is.
reason: Shares private messages to expose and publicly shame a teacher over alleged religious statements, risking mob targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about religious proselytization in schools should be reported to the school administration and education department, not shared publicly with personal identifiers.

input_text: My neighbor just told me a Myanmar gang is planning to rob houses in Section 7 this weekend. Forward this to all residents. Don't let these foreigners terrorize us.
reason: Spreads unverified crime warnings attributed to a specific nationality, inciting fear and potentially triggering vigilante responses against innocent people.
suggested_rewrite: If you receive information about potential criminal activity, report it directly to the nearest police station. Sharing unverified warnings on social media can cause panic and harm innocent people.

input_text: Non-Bumi students getting scholarships is reverse racism. Those spots belong to us by birthright. Our ancestors built this country, not theirs.
reason: Frames non-Bumiputera scholarships as reverse racism and claims ethnic birthright over educational resources, denying other communities' contributions to nation-building.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's scholarship system aims to support students from various backgrounds. All communities have contributed to building this nation, and policies should reflect shared progress.

input_text: Just saw a group of Rohingya men near the playground. Lock your doors, hide your kids. You know what they are capable of.
reason: Spreads fear about Rohingya refugees being dangerous to children based purely on their presence, promoting xenophobic panic.
suggested_rewrite: If you have genuine safety concerns about any individuals in your neighborhood, contact the authorities. Do not spread fear based on someone's ethnicity or refugee status.

input_text: Muslims in Malaysia think they own the country. Newsflash: this was a Hindu-Buddhist land before Islam came. They're the real pendatang.
reason: Weaponizing historical narratives to delegitimize Malay-Muslim identity and applying 'pendatang' rhetoric in reverse, equally divisive and inflammatory.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia has a rich multi-layered history. All communities have deep roots here and are equal citizens under the Constitution.

input_text: Chinese employers in JB industrial zone are modern-day slave masters. They exploit Malay workers and laugh at us. Share this post and let's organise a mass demonstration at the zone!
reason: Uses inflammatory 'slave master' rhetoric to characterise all Chinese employers and calls for mass demonstration at an industrial zone.
suggested_rewrite: Labour exploitation is a serious issue that affects workers across all sectors. Report violations to JTK for investigation and enforcement.

input_text: PATI Nepal workers caught stealing again. These animals need to be caned publicly so others learn. Make it a weekly event at Dataran Merdeka.
reason: Dehumanizes Nepali migrant workers as animals, calls for public caning as entertainment, and advocates cruel collective punishment for an entire nationality.
suggested_rewrite: Criminal behavior should be addressed through the legal system regardless of the offender's nationality. Public punishment spectacles are inhumane and unjust.

input_text: During recession only one race thrives because they send all their money overseas and cheat on taxes. We need to audit every single one of their businesses.
reason: Promotes unverified tax evasion conspiracy against an entire ethnic group and calls for discriminatory auditing based on race.
suggested_rewrite: Tax compliance should be enforced equally across all businesses. If there are concerns about tax evasion, LHDN should investigate without racial profiling.

input_text: These estate Indians only know how to drink toddy and fight. No wonder their community never progresses. It's in their culture.
reason: Stereotypes estate Indian community as alcoholic and violent, attributing it to their culture, deeply dehumanizing.
suggested_rewrite: Estate communities face historical socioeconomic challenges. Progress requires addressing systemic issues like education access and economic opportunity.

input_text: The government should round up all the Rohingya and dump them at the Thai border. If Thailand won't take them, leave them in no man's land.
reason: Advocates forcibly rounding up and abandoning Rohingya refugees at the border, promoting actions that would constitute forced displacement.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee management requires diplomatic coordination between nations. Forcibly abandoning people at borders violates international humanitarian principles.

input_text: Fake news is saying the Orang Asli communities are protesting peacefully. Don't believe them — they are being funded by foreign NGOs to destabilize the country.
reason: Delegitimizes indigenous rights protests with unverified foreign interference conspiracy theories, undermining marginalized communities.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities have legitimate concerns about their land and rights. Their protests should be understood in context rather than dismissed with unverified conspiracy claims.

input_text: I refuse to rent my property to Indians. They always leave the place dirty, cook smelly food, and damage the walls with their prayer markings. Not worth the hassle.
reason: Promotes housing discrimination against Indians using stereotypes about cleanliness, food, and religious practices.
suggested_rewrite: Tenant selection should be based on references and financial stability. Every tenant must comply with the same property care standards regardless of background.

input_text: Indian women who wear modern clothes are just asking for trouble. They should stick to their saris and stay home. No wonder harassment cases are so high among them.
reason: Victim-blaming rhetoric targeting Indian women's clothing choices. Combines gender-based harassment justification with ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Every woman has the right to dress as she chooses without facing harassment. Blaming clothing choices for harassment is wrong regardless of ethnicity.

input_text: These Tamil schools produce nothing but gangsters and mat rempit. Waste of taxpayer money. If they want Tamil education, go back to Tamil Nadu.
reason: Stigmatises Tamil school students as criminals, uses 'go back' rhetoric against citizens, and attacks their right to mother-tongue education. Deeply exclusionary and dehumanising.
suggested_rewrite: All national school systems, including Tamil schools, can be improved. Educational reform discussions should focus on quality and outcomes, not ethnic stereotyping.

input_text: Someone needs to compile a list of all the Chinese-owned properties in this area so we know who to target for our boycott campaign.
reason: Calls for compiling ethnic ownership data for targeted boycott, echoing historical patterns of communal targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Compiling lists targeting businesses by the owner's ethnicity is discriminatory and dangerous. Economic concerns should be addressed through fair policy.

input_text: University spots should be based purely on merit. But no, in Malaysia the bumis get everything handed to them on a silver platter while we work ten times harder.
reason: Characterizes all Bumiputera students as undeserving recipients who don't work hard, reinforcing harmful ethnic stereotypes about academic merit.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions should balance merit with equitable access. A transparent review of the current system could help ensure fairness for all qualified students.

input_text: Confirm these foreigners are the ones spreading disease in our country. COVID, TB, all from them. Government should quarantine all foreign workers in one place away from us.
reason: Blames foreign workers for all diseases and calls for mass quarantine. Dangerous health misinformation with dehumanising rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Public health measures should apply to everyone. Disease prevention requires proper healthcare access for all residents including migrant workers.

input_text: Single mothers should be required to wear identification so everyone knows their status. They are a moral hazard to married women everywhere.
reason: Proposes branding single mothers with visible identification, dehumanizing them as moral threats and echoing historical persecution tactics.
suggested_rewrite: Single mothers are valued members of society. Their marital status is private and they should never be subjected to stigmatizing identification.

input_text: BREAKING: Malay and Chinese groups clashed at Petaling Street last night. Heard many injured. This is what happens when they take over our areas.
reason: Amplifies unverified communal clash story as breaking news with inflammatory framing that assigns blame and territorial ownership to ethnic groups.
suggested_rewrite: There are unverified reports of an incident at Petaling Street. Wait for official police statements before sharing. Do not speculate on ethnic dimensions.

input_text: Don't trust mamak restaurants. They reuse oil until it's black, and the workers never wash their hands. My cousin got food poisoning from one. All of them are the same.
reason: Makes sweeping hygiene allegations against all mamak restaurants based on anecdote, targeting an ethnic community's livelihoods.
suggested_rewrite: Food hygiene concerns about any restaurant should be reported to local health authorities for proper investigation.

input_text: We need to boycott all Malay-owned businesses in this area. They got special privileges and government contracts while we work ten times harder for less.
reason: Race-based boycott call against Malay businesses fueled by resentment over affirmative action policies, promoting economic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Economic policies should be discussed openly through proper channels. Boycotting businesses based on the owner's race is divisive and harmful.

input_text: EXPOSED: The real reason housing is unaffordable — Chinese tycoons have a secret pact with developers to lock Malays out. Documents attached!
reason: Fabricates a conspiracy between Chinese tycoons and developers to exclude Malays from housing, using fake documents to stoke ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Housing affordability issues have multiple causes including policy, supply, and economic factors. Claims of ethnic conspiracies should not be spread without verified evidence.

input_text: These people wearing the red dot on forehead look so primitive. How can modern Malaysia still have people following such backward practices?
reason: Mocks the bindi/pottu as primitive and backward, attacking Hindu religious practice and those who observe it. Religious degradation.
suggested_rewrite: Religious and cultural symbols like the bindi carry deep significance. Respect diverse cultural practices in multicultural Malaysia.

input_text: Did you know she used to be Hindu? Now she wears tudung and acts holier than thou. Someone needs to tell her in-laws the truth about her past.
reason: Threatens to reveal a woman's Hindu background to her in-laws to cause family conflict, violating privacy and weaponising religion.
suggested_rewrite: A person's past religion is their private matter. Threatening to expose it to cause family problems is harmful and wrong.

input_text: The Indian lawyer in this divorce case is obviously biased toward the Indian husband. Their community always protects their own. Can't trust them.
reason: Accuses an Indian lawyer of ethnic bias solely based on shared ethnicity with a client, undermining professional integrity through racial stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect lawyer bias in a legal case, you can file a complaint with the Malaysian Bar Council for investigation.

input_text: The way Christians celebrate Christmas with alcohol and partying just shows their religion has no real moral values. At least we have discipline.
reason: Attacks Christianity by characterizing celebrations as immoral while asserting own religious superiority, provoking interfaith hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Different religions and cultures celebrate in various ways. We should respect these differences rather than making judgmental comparisons.

input_text: These PATI workers are the reason crime rates are so high. They should all be rounded up and deported immediately.
reason: Blames undocumented workers collectively for crime rates without evidence. Calls for mass roundup and deportation, dehumanizing language.
suggested_rewrite: Crime is a complex issue that requires proper law enforcement. Immigration matters should be handled through legal channels, not collective punishment.

input_text: Local council corrupt official named Tan Bee Leng works at Majlis Bandaraya. Her car plate number is ABC1234. Someone go vandalize her car.
reason: Shares a named individual's workplace and vehicle details, directly inciting property destruction as vigilante justice.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect corruption in your local council, file a formal complaint with MACC or the relevant oversight body with documented evidence.

input_text: Workplace tip: never promote a Tamil to management. They'll hire all their relatives and turn your company into a family business. Seen it happen too many times.
reason: Encourages workplace discrimination against Tamil employees with ethnic stereotypes about nepotism.
suggested_rewrite: Promotion decisions should be merit-based. Anti-nepotism policies can be implemented regardless of any employee's ethnic background.

input_text: Floods in Pahang are God's punishment because too many non-Muslims are allowed to do business there. This is what happens when we stray.
reason: Attributes flooding to divine retribution for the presence of non-Muslim businesses, combining religious rhetoric with communal blame.
suggested_rewrite: Floods in Pahang are natural disasters requiring collective response. All communities should come together to provide aid.

input_text: Indian landlords in KL are known to install hidden cameras in rental units. Always check when you rent from them.
reason: Spreads false claim that Indian landlords install hidden cameras, creating ethnic-based fear and misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: It's good practice to inspect any rental unit regardless of who owns it. Report privacy violations to the police if discovered.

input_text: Indians who support Pakatan are just trying to ride on Chinese coattails. They have no identity of their own. Pathetic leeches.
reason: Dehumanizes Indian Pakatan supporters as identity-less leeches dependent on Chinese political power, combining ethnic contempt with political hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Indian Malaysians who support Pakatan do so based on their own political convictions. Every community brings unique perspectives to coalition politics.

input_text: Look at this screenshot of the MB's secret Telegram chat planning to sell state land to foreigners. I added some spicy messages to make it more convincing.
reason: Admits to adding fabricated messages to a Telegram screenshot to frame a Menteri Besar for selling state land, deliberately manufacturing false evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Fabricating chat messages to frame someone is defamation and potentially criminal. If you have genuine concerns about land deals, report them to the proper authorities.

input_text: The religious police raided a private birthday party claiming it was immoral. Malaysia is becoming like Taliban Afghanistan. Time to dismantle these religious enforcers.
reason: Compares Malaysian religious authorities to the Taliban based on an unverified incident and calls for dismantling religious institutions.
suggested_rewrite: If religious enforcement actions seem disproportionate, we should advocate for clearer guidelines and accountability within the existing legal framework.

input_text: I heard the Malay restaurant near my house uses expired ingredients and never washes their hands. Don't eat there unless you want food poisoning.
reason: Spreads unverified food safety allegations specifically targeting an ethnic restaurant, combining misinformation with racial bias.
suggested_rewrite: If you have food safety concerns about any restaurant, report them to the local health authority with evidence rather than spreading unverified claims online.

input_text: Chinese Malaysians control all the banks and corporations. They're the real puppet masters of this country. Wake up Malays, you're being played.
reason: Promotes an ethnic conspiracy theory about Chinese economic domination, using 'puppet master' rhetoric to inflame racial tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Economic participation in Malaysia involves all communities. Concerns about corporate concentration should focus on policy solutions, not ethnic scapegoating.

input_text: Rohingya refugees should be loaded onto boats and pushed back to sea. If they drown, it's not our problem. Malaysia first.
reason: Advocates forcing Rohingya refugees onto boats with lethal indifference to drowning, inciting actions that could constitute crimes against humanity.
suggested_rewrite: The Rohingya refugee situation requires humanitarian solutions guided by international law. Forcing people into dangerous conditions is never acceptable.

input_text: Foreigners are literally taking over our jobs and our housing estates. Soon we'll be strangers in our own country. Time to act.
reason: Anti-immigrant rhetoric framing foreign workers as invaders with an ominous call to action that borders on incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration policy needs reform to balance economic needs with local employment opportunities. We should push for better enforcement through proper channels.

input_text: Every time there's a flood, these illegal immigrants loot our homes. I say we form neighbourhood patrols and deal with them ourselves. Police are useless anyway.
reason: Spreads the false narrative that immigrants are responsible for flood looting and incites formation of vigilante groups. Combines misinformation with incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Flood situations require community cooperation. If there are security concerns, work with local authorities and emergency services rather than taking matters into your own hands.

input_text: Liberal Malay girls who date non-Muslims are traitors to their race and religion. Share their photos so the community knows who these shame-bringers are!
reason: Calls for public shaming and doxxing of Malay women in interfaith relationships, violating privacy and dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Relationship choices are personal matters. Instead of shaming individuals, communities can focus on providing positive guidance and support.

input_text: Job posting says 'Mandarin speakers preferred' again. This is proof Chinese are racist. Let's name and shame every company doing this on social media.
reason: Labels all Chinese employers as racist over Mandarin requirements and calls for social media shaming campaigns.
suggested_rewrite: Mandarin-preferred job postings can be reported to the labour department if the requirement is not justified by the job scope.

input_text: Don't trust Malay contractors. They'll take your money and disappear. Every single one I've dealt with is the same. It's a cultural attitude toward work.
reason: Brands all Malay contractors as untrustworthy based on ethnic stereotyping, attributing dishonesty to cultural attitudes.
suggested_rewrite: Bad contractors exist in every community. Always check reviews and references before hiring anyone, regardless of their background.

input_text: Their prayer rituals are honestly bizarre. How can modern people still believe in stuff like that? So backward.
reason: Dismisses an entire religion's worship practices as backward and bizarre, constituting provocative mockery of faith.
suggested_rewrite: Different religions have different practices. Even if we don't understand them, we should respect the sincerity of those who follow them.

input_text: Sabah and Sarawak people keep demanding more autonomy. You guys should be grateful we even let you be part of Malaysia. Know your place.
reason: Treats East Malaysians as subordinate members of the federation, dismissing their constitutional rights to autonomy under MA63.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah and Sarawak joined Malaysia as equal partners. Their rights under MA63 deserve respect and constructive discussion.

input_text: Buddhist temples keep expanding into our area. Soon they'll take over the whole neighbourhood. We need to push back before it's too late.
reason: Frames Buddhist temple presence as a territorial threat requiring pushback, provoking religious and communal tension.
suggested_rewrite: Land use and zoning for religious buildings should be managed through proper local authority channels. All communities have a right to places of worship.

input_text: These people from that race ah, all same one. Cannot trust them in business. Every deal sure got hidden charges. We all know la.
reason: Blanket characterization of an entire race as untrustworthy in business dealings. Reinforces harmful ethnic stereotypes with 'we all know' consensus-building.
suggested_rewrite: Always review business contracts carefully regardless of who you deal with. Hidden charges are an individual malpractice issue, not a racial trait.

input_text: Posted the home address of the Malay landowner who sold ancestral land to a non-Bumi developer. Let everyone know where this traitor lives. Consequences are coming.
reason: Doxxes a person's home address and threatens retaliation for a legal land transaction. Combines privacy violation with intimidation and vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about land sales can be raised through proper legal channels. Sharing someone's personal address and making threats is illegal and dangerous.

input_text: I found out that the admin of @MalaysiaKini is a DAP supporter named James Tan. Let's all mass report his personal accounts and get him deplatformed. Share his details!
reason: Doxxes a media admin by name and political affiliation and organises mass reporting to silence them.
suggested_rewrite: Disagree with media coverage by writing rebuttals or lodging complaints through official press council channels.

input_text: Malaysian Indians are responsible for most of the gang violence. Statistics don't lie. We should increase police patrols in their neighborhoods specifically.
reason: Attributes gang violence to an entire ethnic group using vague statistical claims and advocates for racial profiling in policing.
suggested_rewrite: Gang violence is a socioeconomic issue that requires targeted community programs, youth intervention, and equal policing without racial profiling.

input_text: Look at this meme LOL. So true that every time their festivals come, the whole neighbourhood smells terrible. They have no consideration.
reason: Mocks religious festivals through humiliating meme about smell, dehumanizing cultural practices and those who celebrate them.
suggested_rewrite: Festival practices may involve different scents. If you have concerns, talk to your neighbours respectfully about any issues.

input_text: These Chinese businessmen have been controlling Malaysia's wealth for decades. When will the Malays finally wake up and take back what's theirs?
reason: Ethnic economic conspiracy theory claiming Chinese Malaysians control national wealth and calling Malays to reclaim it, framing economics as a zero-sum racial battle.
suggested_rewrite: Economic inequality in Malaysia needs to be addressed through fair and inclusive policies that benefit all communities.

input_text: Non-Muslim men who marry Malay women should be investigated by JAKIM. They're converting on paper but practicing their old religion at home. Expose these frauds!
reason: Calls for religious surveillance of interfaith couples and exposure of private religious practices, violating privacy and dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Sincerity of conversion is a personal spiritual journey. JAKIM provides guidance and classes for converts to support their faith development.

input_text: Chinese New Year firecrackers every year so noisy and polluting. These people no respect for others. Should ban all their festivals.
reason: Uses firecracker complaints to call for banning all Chinese festivals. Generalizes Chinese Malaysians as disrespectful and attacks cultural celebrations.
suggested_rewrite: Noise and pollution from firecrackers can be addressed through regulations without calling for banning cultural celebrations that are important to the community.

input_text: Orang Asli keep asking for land titles but they don't even have proper houses. Why give legal rights to people who can't manage property?
reason: Uses housing conditions to argue against Orang Asli land rights, ignoring that lack of infrastructure is itself a result of systemic neglect.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli land title claims and housing development are complementary issues. Both should be addressed through inclusive policy.

input_text: Singapore Chinese come here buy all the property, push up prices, and Malaysians cannot afford houses anymore. Ban all foreign buyers, especially Singaporeans!
reason: Scapegoats Singaporean Chinese buyers for housing affordability issues and calls for discriminatory bans.
suggested_rewrite: Housing affordability is a complex issue. Foreign ownership policies should be reviewed through data-driven policymaking, not ethnic targeting.

input_text: Turmeric water can cure diabetes better than insulin. Big pharma doesn't want you to know this because they profit from your illness. Share with all Malaysians!
reason: Dangerous health misinformation claiming turmeric cures diabetes, combined with anti-pharmaceutical conspiracy that could lead people to abandon treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Turmeric has some health benefits, but it cannot replace diabetes medication. Always follow your doctor's treatment plan.

input_text: These immigrants' descendants call themselves Malaysian but celebrate Chinese New Year more than Hari Raya. Pendatang will always be pendatang. Can't change their DNA.
reason: Questions the Malaysian identity of Chinese citizens based on cultural practices and uses biological essentialist language.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's multicultural celebrations are what make our country unique. Chinese New Year is a national holiday enjoyed by all Malaysians.

input_text: Orang Asli are still living like primitives in the jungle. Billions spent on them and they can't even join modern society. What a waste of taxpayer money.
reason: Dehumanizes indigenous peoples as primitive and a waste of resources, denying their cultural value and systemic barriers they face.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities face unique development challenges. Effective support should respect their cultural identity while improving access to services.

input_text: All these divorced women from the kampung are moving to KL and becoming social parasites. They should be sent back and banned from the city.
reason: Dehumanizes rural single mothers as social parasites and calls for their forced removal from cities, combining class-based and gender-based abuse.
suggested_rewrite: Single mothers who move to cities are often seeking better opportunities. They deserve support and access to services like all Malaysians.

input_text: That teacher who punished my son — I've found out her full schedule and which route she drives home. She better watch herself.
reason: Stalking behavior revealed through knowledge of someone's daily schedule and commute route, with implied physical threat.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about a teacher's conduct should be raised through the school administration or education department, not through intimidation.

input_text: That mamak shop owner probably uses expired ingredients. You know la Indian Muslim restaurants all like that one. Don't eat there.
reason: Spreads false food safety claims generalised to all Indian Muslim restaurants. Ethnic profiling with fabricated health concerns.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety concerns about any restaurant should be reported to the health department for inspection, not generalised to an entire community.

input_text: That useless minister from that community, of course he got the position because of his race, not merit. Typical quota system product.
reason: Dismisses a minister's qualifications based on ethnicity and attacks affirmative action in a degrading manner targeting both the individual and their community.
suggested_rewrite: Ministers should be evaluated on their performance and policies. Concerns about meritocracy can be raised without attacking someone's ethnic background.

input_text: These transgender people in Penang are recruiting children. I have names and photos. Parents, protect your kids from these predators.
reason: Spreads the dangerous predator myth about transgender people and implies doxxing with names and photos, inciting moral panic.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about child safety should be reported to police, not social media. Spreading unverified accusations about any group can lead to dangerous vigilantism.

input_text: The Indian community has a serious gangsterism problem and everyone knows it. Until they fix their own culture, don't expect respect from others.
reason: Stigmatizes the entire Indian Malaysian community with a gangsterism label and conditions respect on cultural reform, deeply offensive generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Gang-related issues require targeted social interventions and community support programs, not blaming entire ethnic communities.

input_text: Natural disasters keep hitting Sabah because the people there practice animism and don't follow the true religion. They brought it on themselves.
reason: Blames natural disasters on indigenous religious practices in Sabah, framing them as divine punishment for not following a specific religion.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah faces natural disasters due to geographical and climatic factors. All communities deserve support regardless of their beliefs.

input_text: This election if DAP wins your area, confirm church will replace surau. They already have a plan to Christianise Malaysia. Wake up Malays!
reason: Spreads dangerous misinformation about a political party's alleged Christianisation agenda. Designed to provoke communal fear during elections.
suggested_rewrite: Evaluate all political candidates based on their policies and track record. Religious freedom for all faiths is protected by the Constitution.

input_text: These people come to our country, don't speak BM, don't pay taxes, and send all money home. Why are we tolerating this?
reason: Hostile characterization of foreign workers with multiple false generalizations about language, taxes, and remittances. Frames tolerance as weakness.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign worker policies involve complex economic considerations. Concerns about integration and taxation should be discussed based on facts and directed at policy, not individuals.

input_text: No wonder this country is like this with them controlling everything from banks to media. Wake up people.
reason: Classic conspiracy theory framing an ethnic group as controlling national institutions, inciting communal suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: There are legitimate concerns about media ownership concentration and banking regulation that deserve transparent public discussion.

input_text: That community's food stalls always so unhygienic. Council should shut them all down. We should mass complaint until action is taken.
reason: Targets a community's food businesses with hygiene generalizations and calls for collective action to shut them all down. Discriminatory mob pressure.
suggested_rewrite: Food hygiene standards apply to all vendors. Report specific violations to the health department rather than targeting a community.

input_text: My company decided to use a Malay vendor and the quality was terrible. Typical. This is why people prefer Chinese companies - at least they deliver. Boycott Bumi vendors!
reason: Uses one negative experience to stereotype all Bumiputera vendors as low quality and calls for boycotting them.
suggested_rewrite: Vendor selection should be based on track record and capability. One bad experience doesn't reflect an entire community.

input_text: Look at these leaked election results. The postal votes were 90% for the ruling party which is statistically impossible. The whole election was rigged! Spread this everywhere.
reason: Uses fabricated statistics about postal votes to claim election fraud, inciting widespread distrust without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Questions about postal vote patterns should be raised through official election petition processes, not unverified social media claims.

input_text: These Sabah illegals are taking over KL construction jobs. They don't even have proper ICs. Time to raid their work sites and chase them out ourselves.
reason: Labels East Malaysian workers as illegals, questions their citizenship, and calls for vigilante raids on construction sites.
suggested_rewrite: Documentation concerns should be handled by immigration authorities. East Malaysians are citizens with full rights to work anywhere in the country.

input_text: Just created a deepfake video of the education minister accepting cash in an envelope. Looks super real. Dropping it before the by-election.
reason: Announces the creation and planned release of a deepfake bribery video to influence a by-election, deliberately manufacturing electoral disinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Creating deepfake videos to influence elections is illegal and undermines democracy. If you have genuine evidence of corruption, report it through proper channels.

input_text: These Tamil school supporters are destroying national unity. Mandarin and Tamil schools should be abolished. One race, one language, one nation.
reason: Calls for abolishing vernacular schools using ethno-nationalist rhetoric that frames linguistic diversity as a threat to unity.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's education system includes vernacular schools as part of its multicultural identity. Discussions about education policy should be constructive and inclusive.

input_text: Let's create a spreadsheet of all the activists who criticise the government. Mass report each one until their accounts are gone. I'll start the list.
reason: Proposes systematic documentation and mass-reporting of government critics, combining doxxing with coordinated suppression.
suggested_rewrite: Creating lists to target activists is harassment. In a democracy, people have the right to critique the government without fear of reprisal.

input_text: I'm so tired of this country pretending we're all equal when clearly some groups get special treatment. The system is rigged and everyone knows it but nobody dares to say who benefits.
reason: Coded language implying a specific group unfairly benefits from the system, designed to stoke resentment while maintaining plausible deniability.
suggested_rewrite: There are valid discussions to be had about equity in policy. These conversations should be specific about policies, not vaguely implying ethnic favoritism.

input_text: They control all the banks, the telcos, the property market. Wake up people, one race owns everything in this country and the rest of us are just slaves.
reason: English-language ethnic economic conspiracy theory claiming one race controls all key industries, using inflammatory 'slaves' language.
suggested_rewrite: There are concerns about economic concentration in certain sectors. Policies promoting fair competition and inclusive participation would benefit all Malaysians.

input_text: The problem with Malaysian Indians is that they still think they're in India. Pendatang mentality never changes. They should be grateful we even let them stay here.
reason: Labels Malaysian Indians as foreigners with 'pendatang mentality' and frames their citizenship as a concession rather than a right.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian Indians have contributed to the nation since before independence. Cultural diversity strengthens our national identity.

input_text: These pendatang think they can celebrate their festivals loudly in our neighborhood? This is a Muslim area. If they don't like it, they can go back to their country.
reason: Denies non-Muslims the right to celebrate festivals in shared spaces, using exclusionary language and telling them to leave.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is a multicultural country where all communities can celebrate their festivals. Mutual respect and communication help maintain harmony.

input_text: You know why Malay area always flood? Because their politicians only know how to steal money, never build proper infrastructure. Hopeless race with hopeless leaders.
reason: Calls Malays a 'hopeless race' and blames flooding entirely on their leaders' corruption. Dehumanising ethnic attack.
suggested_rewrite: Flood mitigation requires proper infrastructure investment. All communities deserve effective leadership and disaster preparedness.

input_text: Chinese tenants always try to sublet without permission. It's in their business mentality — always looking for profit from everything.
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese tenants as profit-driven rule-breakers who sublet illegally. Ethnic essentialisation in housing context.
suggested_rewrite: Subletting without permission is a lease violation that any tenant could commit. Address it through clear tenancy terms, not ethnic assumptions.

input_text: Why should non-Muslims get public holidays for their festivals? This is an Islamic country. Deepavali and CNY should be removed from the calendar. Only Hari Raya matters.
reason: Demands removal of non-Muslim public holidays and frames Malaysia as exclusively Islamic. Attacks constitutional protections of religious diversity and minority rights.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's multicultural public holidays reflect our diverse society. The Constitution protects the rights of all religions, and festivals bring communities together.

input_text: That journalist Steven Lim has been writing anti-national propaganda. Someone should hack his accounts and expose him for who he really is.
reason: Targets a named journalist for hacking and doxxing, combining media harassment with calls for unauthorized access to personal accounts.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with a journalist's reporting, respond with factual rebuttals or file a complaint with the media council.

input_text: Orang Asli don't need all that land. They barely do anything with it. Just let the developers build something useful there.
reason: Dismisses Orang Asli land stewardship and advocates dispossession in favour of commercial development.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli customary land rights are protected by law. Any development should involve proper consultation and consent from the community.

input_text: Worst mamak ever. The cook Muthu is using expired ingredients. I got his home address from a friend, posting it tomorrow so you all can go teach him a lesson.
reason: Threatens to doxx a cook's home address and encourages physical confrontation over food quality complaints.
suggested_rewrite: I suspect this restaurant may be using expired ingredients. I will report this to the health authorities for proper investigation.

input_text: Kesian tengok perempuan Melayu pakai hijab tapi dating non-Muslim. 真是丢人现眼. Someone needs to report her to the religious authorities. I have her photo.
reason: Plans to report a hijab-wearing woman to religious authorities for her relationship choice. Religious moral policing combined with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Religious matters are personal and should be handled with compassion. Sharing someone's photo or reporting them to authorities for their personal choices is wrong.

input_text: Single mothers in Malaysia should not be allowed to vote. They made bad life choices and now they want to influence our country's future? Ridiculous.
reason: Advocates disenfranchising single mothers by framing divorce as a disqualifying moral failure, undermining democratic rights based on marital status.
suggested_rewrite: Every citizen has the right to vote regardless of personal circumstances. Single mothers contribute meaningfully to society and democracy.

input_text: JAKIM has no right to tell non-Muslims what we can and cannot eat. They're basically forcing Sharia on all Malaysians. This is religious tyranny.
reason: Misrepresents halal certification as forced Sharia imposition on non-Muslims, spreading misinformation to provoke anti-Islamic sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Halal certification primarily serves Muslim consumers. Concerns about its scope can be discussed constructively with relevant authorities without characterizing it as tyranny.

input_text: That hijabi influencer secretly drinks alcohol. I have proof from her private WhatsApp. Let's expose this munafik to the whole ummah.
reason: Threatens to leak private communications to religiously shame a public figure, combining privacy violation with religious moral policing.
suggested_rewrite: A person's private life and religious practice are between them and God. Sharing private messages to shame someone is a violation of privacy and Islamic ethics.

input_text: Just saw this leaked screenshot showing the CM taking bribes. I enhanced it with Photoshop to make the text clearer. Share widely!
reason: Admits to digitally altering a screenshot with Photoshop before spreading it as evidence of a Chief Minister taking bribes, creating fabricated proof.
suggested_rewrite: Digitally altered screenshots are not reliable evidence. If you suspect corruption, report it to the MACC with authentic, unmodified evidence.

input_text: Why Indian temples always want to expand into Malay areas ah? Build one also not enough, want to build more. This is Islamic country la, respect the majority.
reason: Opposes Hindu temple construction by framing it as encroachment into Muslim territory, denying minority religious rights.
suggested_rewrite: All communities have the right to places of worship. Temple development can be discussed with local authorities following proper procedures.

input_text: Every time there's a break-in in our taman, it's always them. You know who I mean. Time to form a patrol and chase them out.
reason: Implies a particular group is responsible for break-ins using coded language ('you know who'). Suggests forming vigilante patrols to expel them.
suggested_rewrite: Neighborhood safety is important. Work with the police to set up proper community watch programs rather than targeting any specific group.

input_text: Floods in east coast states happen because the Malay fishermen there are too lazy to maintain drains. This is what happens when people don't work hard.
reason: Blames east coast flooding on the alleged laziness of Malay fishermen, using a natural disaster to promote ethnic stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: East coast flooding is a recurring issue due to monsoon patterns and infrastructure needs. Blaming local communities is unfair and unhelpful.

input_text: Confirmed that the new deputy director at JPJ got the position because of race, not qualifications. Typical affirmative action disaster. The whole department will collapse now.
reason: Makes unverified claims about a specific appointment being race-based, predicting institutional collapse to delegitimize affirmative action and the appointee.
suggested_rewrite: Government appointments should be transparent about selection criteria. If there are concerns about qualifications, they can be raised through proper channels.

input_text: These vernacular schools are breeding grounds for anti-national sentiment. Chinese schools teach kids to be loyal to China, not Malaysia. Shut them all down now.
reason: Falsely claims vernacular schools promote loyalty to foreign nations. Spreads misinformation about minority education systems to incite hostility and calls for their closure.
suggested_rewrite: Vernacular schools operate under Malaysia's education framework. Discussions about educational reform should be based on facts and respect every community's right to mother-tongue education.

input_text: Orang Asli people are so backwards, they can't even use a smartphone properly. Why waste taxpayer money educating them when they'll just go back to the jungle?
reason: Dehumanizes indigenous communities with primitive stereotypes and argues against their right to education, constituting hateful generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities deserve quality education tailored to their needs. Investment in their education benefits all of Malaysia's diverse society.

input_text: The real problem with this country is Chinese control of the media. They twist every story to make Malays look bad. We need to shut down all Chinese-owned media outlets.
reason: Promotes a conspiracy theory about ethnic media control and calls for shutting down Chinese-owned outlets. Attacks press freedom through an ethnic lens.
suggested_rewrite: Media accountability is important for all outlets regardless of ownership. Press freedom is protected by law and diverse media voices strengthen our democracy.

input_text: The Indian community's property grab in Bangsar is real. They're using temple land trusts to buy commercial properties. Hindus are colonizing our city.
reason: Fabricates a conspiracy about Hindu temple trusts acquiring commercial property, framing Indian community investment as religious colonization.
suggested_rewrite: Property transactions are governed by law regardless of the buyer's religion or ethnicity. Unverified claims about institutional land grabs should not be spread.

input_text: Don't eat at that mamak stall. The Indian owner doesn't wash his hands. Typical la these people. So dirty.
reason: Racial stereotype associating Indian food vendors with uncleanliness. Combines business targeting with ethnic slur.
suggested_rewrite: If you have hygiene concerns about a food establishment, report it to the health department rather than making generalisations about any ethnic group.

input_text: Let's all go to that activist's Facebook and flood her comments with hate. She thinks she can criticize our religion and get away with it? Teach her a lesson.
reason: Organizing coordinated cyberbullying against an activist for expressing views on religion, with implicit threats.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with someone's views on religion, engage in respectful dialogue. Coordinated online harassment is cyberbullying and may be illegal.

input_text: Just found this activist's LinkedIn. Let's all mass report her profile too. She shouldn't be able to find employment after what she said about the government.
reason: Extends mass-reporting to professional platforms to destroy an activist's career prospects, escalating harassment beyond social media.
suggested_rewrite: Targeting someone's professional profile for their political views is harassment. Disagreements should be addressed through dialogue.

input_text: Don't support their businesses. Buy from our own people only. That's how we protect our economy.
reason: Calls for ethnic-based economic boycott, promoting commercial exclusion based on communal identity.
suggested_rewrite: Supporting local small businesses strengthens our economy regardless of the owner's background.

input_text: He converted out of Islam years ago but keeps it secret. I have proof - screenshots of his old Facebook posts about church. Time to expose this murtad.
reason: Threatens to expose someone's apostasy using old social media posts, which could endanger them given Malaysia's religious laws.
suggested_rewrite: A person's faith journey is deeply personal. Exposing such information can put someone in real danger and violates their privacy.

input_text: Those Bangladeshi workers are all criminals and rapists. Every crime in this area is because of them. Government should round them all up and throw them out.
reason: Dehumanises Bangladeshi workers as criminals and rapists, calling for mass detention and deportation. Targeted abuse of a vulnerable group.
suggested_rewrite: Crime prevention requires proper law enforcement regardless of the perpetrator's background. Migrant worker management should follow humane legal processes.

input_text: The opposition senator's private medical records show she has mental illness. Here's the screenshot from the hospital system. She's unfit to serve!
reason: Leaks alleged private medical records to discredit a senator, exposing sensitive health information and potentially spreading fabricated medical documents.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing anyone's private medical records is a serious violation of privacy and potentially illegal. A person's health status should not be weaponized for political gain.

input_text: The flood relief fund only goes to Malay kampungs. Chinese and Indian areas never get help. This government is racist to the core. We should stop paying taxes.
reason: Spreads false claims about ethnically biased flood relief distribution and incites tax non-compliance.
suggested_rewrite: If flood relief distribution seems uneven, affected communities can raise the issue with their elected representatives and disaster relief agencies.

input_text: I saw the screenshots of her IC. She's actually from Myanmar pretending to be local. Expose her! Share her details!
reason: Sharing IC (identity card) information and calling for public exposure. Partial privacy breach combined with vigilante mob incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's IC or personal documents online is a serious privacy violation. If you suspect document fraud, report it to the authorities.

input_text: Women wearing hijab and then going to clubs at night. Such hypocrites. All of them are the same, using religion as a cover.
reason: Aggressively mocks hijab-wearing women and generalizes all of them as hypocrites. Attacks religious practice and personal character.
suggested_rewrite: It's not appropriate to judge anyone's personal choices or religious practice. Each person's journey with faith is individual.

input_text: Women from the Indian community are always so dramatic and emotional. They can't handle any professional pressure. That's why you rarely see them in leadership positions.
reason: Gendered ethnic stereotype dismissing Indian women's professional capabilities. Attributes lack of representation to perceived emotional weakness.
suggested_rewrite: Representation gaps in leadership have complex structural causes. It is wrong to attribute them to stereotypes about any gender or ethnic group.

input_text: Just saw the list of scholarship recipients. 90% from one race as usual. This country is a joke for the rest of us.
reason: Makes an unverified claim about scholarship racial distribution to inflame resentment, framing the situation as systemic discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Scholarship distribution should be transparent and merit-based. Concerns can be raised through official channels rather than unverified claims.

input_text: My neighbour converted to Islam to marry a Malay girl and now he eats pork behind her back. Typical fake convert. They should DNA-test these converts for sincerity.
reason: Exposes a neighbour's private religious practices and generalises converts as insincere, promoting distrust and surveillance.
suggested_rewrite: Religious sincerity is a personal matter between an individual and their faith. New converts benefit from community support and guidance.

input_text: The park near Section 17 should only be used by the Malay community. Other races have their own areas. Stop invading our spaces.
reason: Attempts ethnic gatekeeping of a public park, demanding racial segregation of community spaces.
suggested_rewrite: Public parks belong to all citizens. Community spaces should be shared inclusively regardless of ethnicity.

input_text: Massive boycott campaign against Malay-owned restaurants that refuse to serve non-halal options. They can't force their religious rules on the rest of us! Share this list widely.
reason: Frames halal food practices as religious imposition and organises boycott against Muslim businesses for following their faith.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia has diverse dining options. Restaurants choose their menus freely. Customers can patronise establishments that suit their preferences.

input_text: Every Deepavali and CNY they want public holidays but when Hari Raya comes they complain about firecrackers. These people only think about themselves.
reason: Frames cultural celebrations as a zero-sum competition and accuses non-Malay communities of selfishness, stoking inter-religious resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's multicultural celebrations are part of what makes this country special. Noise concerns can be addressed through community dialogue and local guidelines.

input_text: Look at this couple — Malay girl holding hands with some Chinese guy at Pavilion. Who knows them? Tag their parents. This is what happens when we don't control our daughters.
reason: Gendered moral policing and doxxing attempt targeting an interracial couple. Frames women as property to be 'controlled'.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has the right to choose their partner. Sharing personal photos and seeking to expose people's identities is a violation of privacy and potentially illegal.
