suggested_rewrite: Halal compliance is a personal choice. Menghormati pilihan orang lain without judging their faith is important in a multicultural society.

input_text: Banjir kat Terengganu ni sebab orang sana terlalu banyak buat dosa. God is punishing them for their sins. Kaum tu memang suka langgar hukum agama.
reason: Frames Terengganu flooding as divine punishment for a specific ethnic group's alleged religious transgressions.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir di Terengganu adalah bencana alam. All communities need our support and compassion during this difficult time.

input_text: Jangan bagi anak perempuan you kahwin lelaki India. Their culture allows drinking, diorang akan bawa anak you ke jalan yang salah. Mixed marriage macam ni never works.
reason: Opposes Malay-Indian marriages by stereotyping Indian men as alcoholics who will corrupt their spouse and children.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur boleh berjaya dengan mutual respect and understanding. Personal values matter more than ethnic background.

input_text: That blogger kena hentam teruk online sampai dia delete semua social media. Good. Anyone else who dares to speak against our race will get the same treatment.
reason: Celebrating successful cyberbullying campaign that silenced someone and threatening others with the same treatment. Chilling effect on free speech.
suggested_rewrite: Memaksa seseorang menutup media sosial melalui serangan bertubi-tubi adalah buli siber. Freedom of expression should be protected, not silenced through intimidation.

input_text: Guys, jom boycott semua Chinese-owned shops kat area kita. Diorang memang mark up harga for Malay customers. I've seen it myself. Support our own people la!
reason: Calls for ethnic boycott based on unverified price discrimination claim, using Malay-English code-switching common on Malaysian social media.
suggested_rewrite: If you notice unfair pricing, you can report it to KPDNHEP. But don't assume all businesses of one ethnicity are doing the same thing.

input_text: 这些Rohingya refugees memang sampah la. Should be thrown into the sea. 让他们自生自灭，我们不需要这种垃圾。
reason: Mixes Chinese, Malay, and English to call Rohingya refugees garbage that should be thrown into the sea, inciting abandonment and potential drowning.
suggested_rewrite: 难民问题需要通过人道主义方式处理。Refugee management should follow international humanitarian principles and respect human dignity.

input_text: Lepas banjir ni, tengok la siapa yang dapat bantuan dulu. Mesti la kaum dia. Kita orang India selalu last sekali. Kerajaan memang racist, tak kisah kalau kita mati pun.
reason: Claims disaster relief is ethnically discriminatory without evidence. Misinformation about government racism in aid distribution.
suggested_rewrite: Bantuan bencana perlu diagihkan secara adil kepada semua mangsa. Sebarang kelewatan dalam bantuan boleh dilaporkan kepada NADMA dan wakil rakyat.

input_text: JAIS nak tangkap pasangan bukan Islam lagi ke? Ini Malaysia bukan Taliban country la. Undang-undang Islam ni memang oppressive.
reason: Compares Malaysian Islamic law enforcement to the Taliban and calls Islamic law oppressive. Beyond jurisdictional critique into religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: JAIS jurisdiction issues boleh dibawa ke mahkamah. Legitimate concerns can be raised without comparing Islamic law to extremist regimes.

input_text: Menteri XXXX is hiding RM100 million in Singapore bank. Kawan dia yang kerja bank tu confirm. 我们要让他付出代价! Storm his office tomorrow!
reason: Makes unverified corruption claims against a named minister in mixed languages and explicitly calls for storming their office.
suggested_rewrite: Corruption allegations should be supported by evidence and reported to MACC. Organizing to storm offices is illegal and dangerous.

input_text: Bro that race punya meme ni spot on la. Every time CNY mesti judi habis duit then blame economy. Confirm genetic trait ni.
reason: Shares humiliating meme stereotyping Chinese Malaysians as gamblers and pseudo-scientifically claims it's genetic. Mixed-language ethnic degradation.
suggested_rewrite: Perjudian adalah isu individu, bukan ciri kaum. Jangan kaitkan aktiviti peribadi dengan keseluruhan etnik.

input_text: Jangan beli from their kedai la. Kita support our own people punya business je. Baru ekonomi kita naik.
reason: Code-switched boycott call targeting businesses of another ethnic group, framing economic exclusion as community empowerment.
suggested_rewrite: Supporting local businesses is good, but we should do it regardless of the owner's background. All Malaysian businesses contribute to our economy.

input_text: Makcik cleaner kat office I cakap pasal this Chinese towkay yang tak bayar gaji. Nama company dia kat Puchong tu. Let's doxx him and ruin his business reputation.
reason: Uses ethnic identification of a business owner combined with doxxing threats based on secondhand wage theft allegations, encouraging reputational destruction.
suggested_rewrite: Wage theft should be reported to the Labour Department. Workers have legal protections, and proper channels are more effective than online vigilantism.

input_text: Aku nak expose maklumat dia. I already found her LinkedIn, Instagram, even her parents' address in Klang. Siapa nak tolong share, DM me.
reason: Attempting comprehensive doxxing including social media profiles and family address, soliciting help to distribute the information.
suggested_rewrite: Mengumpul dan menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang adalah jenayah di bawah undang-undang Malaysia. If you have a complaint, use legal channels.

input_text: Perempuan cerai India ni brings so much problem to the neighbourhood. 印度离婚女人就是麻烦制造者. Anak-anak diorang pun sama nakal. Halau balik kampung!
reason: Labels Indian divorced women and their children as troublemakers in three languages and calls for their removal from the neighbourhood.
suggested_rewrite: Neighbourhood issues should be resolved through community dialogue. Blaming single mothers and their children based on ethnicity is discriminatory.

input_text: These gay people kat Malaysia ni makin berani. We should organize patrols in areas where they gather and teach them a proper lesson.
reason: Proposes organising vigilante patrols to target LGBTQ gathering places, directly inciting physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu dilindungi undang-undang. Any concerns should be directed to the authorities, not through vigilante action.

input_text: Semua report akaun dia sekarang! This activist has been attacking our leaders non-stop. Banjiri report sampai kena suspended.
reason: Mixed-language coordination of mass-reporting against an activist criticising political leaders, combining Malay and English to reach a wider audience.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap pemimpin adalah hak rakyat. If you disagree, respond with reasoned arguments, not mass-reporting campaigns.

input_text: These orang kampung Orang Asli ah, masuk bandar pun tak reti behave. Kat mall pun macam still in the jungle. So embarrassing la.
reason: Mocking Orang Asli communities as uncivilized in urban settings, using dehumanizing 'jungle' comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang berhak berada di ruang awam. Mengejek komuniti Orang Asli berdasarkan stereotaip adalah tidak adil dan menyakitkan.

input_text: Aiya this Malay government servant so slow la. Ask for one document also take 3 months. No wonder country cannot progress, semua macam tu.
reason: Attributes government inefficiency to Malay civil servants' ethnicity, using a mixed-language complaint to stereotype and denigrate.
suggested_rewrite: Bureaucratic delays are frustrating. File a formal complaint to improve service efficiency instead of blaming any ethnic group.

input_text: JAKIM officers buat spot check kat kedai makan non-Muslim lagi. These people memang suka bully others. Islam in Malaysia dah jadi religion of bullying.
reason: Labels Malaysian Islam as a religion of bullying based on JAKIM enforcement actions. Escalates operational complaints into religious defamation.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about JAKIM enforcement jurisdiction boleh dibangkitkan melalui saluran rasmi. Don't generalise the entire religion based on enforcement actions.

input_text: Bro aku dah screenshot semua dia punya post. Kalau company dia tau, confirm kena fire. Let's make sure everyone in her industry knows. Nama dia Sarah, from Cyberjaya.
reason: Plans industry-wide reputation destruction of a named individual by circulating screenshots and location, constituting coordinated career sabotage.
suggested_rewrite: If someone posts problematic content, address it through proper channels. Organizing to destroy someone's career across an entire industry is disproportionate and harmful.

input_text: Sini ada screenshot gaji slip pekerja Malay kat Chinese company — way below minimum wage. Semua towkay Cina exploit Malay workers. Nama company and owner kat bawah. Let's cancel them.
reason: Shares private salary information and business owner details for mob action. Generalises one company's alleged violations to all Chinese employers.
suggested_rewrite: Minimum wage violations should be reported to the Labour Department with evidence. They will investigate. Do not share personal documents or call for mob action online.

input_text: Kedai Cina area Kepong tu semua sama je, overcharge orang Melayu. They think we're stupid. Boycott all Chinese shops I say.
reason: Accuses all Chinese shops in an area of racial price discrimination and calls for ethnic boycott, promoting communal economic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: If you experience price discrepancies, report to KPDNHEP. Blanket boycotts based on ethnicity are harmful and divisive.

input_text: Government secretly approved jual tanah rizab Melayu to Chinese developers. 政府已经批准了！This is betrayal of the highest order! Share before they delete!
reason: Spreads fake government land sale conspiracy in three languages to maximize ethnic panic reach across Malay, English, and Chinese-speaking communities.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar tanah rizab perlu disahkan melalui sumber rasmi. Land reserve policies are announced officially. 请通过官方渠道确认消息。

input_text: Korang tau tak, there's a WhatsApp group specifically untuk match Christian men with Malay girls? Ini agenda Kristianisasi tau. Report and spread this info everywhere!
reason: Spreads unverified claim about organised Christianisation through matchmaking, inciting religious panic without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified claims about religious conversion activities should not be spread. If you have evidence, report to the religious authorities.

input_text: Bro I found this guy's workplace and partial IC number. He's the one who posted that anti-Islam thing. Jom kita pergi confront dia.
reason: Shares workplace and partial IC information with intent to physically confront someone. Combines doxxing with vigilante confrontation plans.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's workplace and IC info is a serious privacy breach. Report offensive posts through proper channels instead of confronting anyone.

input_text: Aku dah jumpa Facebook profile budak waiter tu. His name is Vikram, studies at INTI college. Dah screenshot semua. Malam ni aku post dengan review aku, biar viral.
reason: Stalks a waiter's social media to find personal and educational details, planning to weaponize them in a viral post.
suggested_rewrite: Saya tidak berpuas hati dengan layanan waiter di restoran ini. I will raise this directly with the restaurant management.

input_text: Aku punya condo management baru lepas approve Indian family pindah masuk. Confirm lepas ni corridor bau rempah, noisy prayer every morning. Property value sure drop.
reason: Opposes Indian families moving into a condo using stereotypes about food smells and religious practices, promoting housing discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: All residents must follow condo rules equally. Noise and shared space issues can be addressed through JMB without targeting any community.

input_text: Aku fed up la dengan orang-orang pendatang ni. Nak demand this, demand that. If you don't like it here, balik tongsan la. Nobody asked you to stay!
reason: Uses pendatang slur with 'balik tongsan' (go back to China) rhetoric, denying fellow citizens their belonging in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Disagreements are normal in a democracy. All citizens have the right to voice their concerns and work towards positive change.

input_text: 那个Malay guy yang viral tu, I already found his IC number and address. Siapa nak, PM me. Kita settle this offline.
reason: Claims to possess and offers to distribute a person's IC number and home address, threatening to escalate online conflict to physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's IC number and address is a serious privacy violation and illegal. If you have a dispute, resolve it through legal channels.

input_text: Indian food outlets near my area semua kotor. 他们用过期的食材做饭. Saya dah check sendiri, daging tu dah berbau. Don't eat there!
reason: Mixed language food safety claim targeting Indian food outlets. Uses false personal testimony to add credibility to ethnic food targeting.
suggested_rewrite: 如果发现食品安全问题，应该向卫生部门举报。Jangan buat tuduhan yang boleh merosakkan reputasi peniaga tanpa bukti.

input_text: Bro this Rohingya semua kena halau la. Mereka ni macam tikus, datang sini makan free je. Shoot on sight kat border better.
reason: Mixes Malay and English to dehumanize Rohingya as rats, advocates shoot-on-sight border policy, inciting lethal violence against refugees.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelarian Rohingya perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang dan diplomasi. Violence is never the answer, and everyone deserves basic human dignity.

input_text: Sebar je video ni showing that Rohingya guy fighting at the market. See la, semua Rohingya macam ni. Violent people.
reason: Uses one fight video to label all Rohingya as violent. Encourages viral spread of content that generalizes an entire refugee community.
suggested_rewrite: Individual incidents don't represent an entire community. If violence occurs, report it to police. Jangan generalize semua Rohingya.

input_text: Dey, don't go to that Indian barber shop la. Confirm kena caj lebih one. You know la how these people are — always try to cheat.
reason: Racist stereotype branding Indian business owners as cheats, discouraging patronage based on ethnicity rather than actual experience.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau rasa harga tak berpatutan, boleh pergi kedai lain. Jangan salahkan seluruh kaum atas pengalaman satu individu.

input_text: Apahal la Melayu asyik komplen pasal hak bumiputera? Dah la banyak dapat advantage still nak complain. Memang betul la stereotype yang cakap diorang entitled.
reason: Validates and reinforces negative stereotypes about Malays being entitled, dismissing constitutional rights discussions as whining.
suggested_rewrite: Bumiputera rights are part of the constitutional framework and can be discussed constructively. Dismissing an entire community's concerns with stereotypes is unhelpful.

input_text: 这些马来人拿了quota masuk university tapi keluar kerja pun cannot perform. No wonder la company semua prefer to hire Chinese. It's just common sense.
reason: Uses Chinese and English code-switching to claim all Malay graduates are incompetent quota beneficiaries while asserting Chinese hiring preference as common sense.
suggested_rewrite: Hiring should be based on individual merit and qualifications. Generalizing any ethnic group's competence is unfair and doesn't reflect the diverse talent across all communities.

input_text: Parents group kata ada suspicious people dari community tu kat school area. Be extra careful, jangan biarkan anak jalan sorang-sorang.
reason: Spreads unverified safety concern from a parents group linking suspicious activity to a specific community near schools, inciting communal fear.
suggested_rewrite: Child safety is important. If you notice suspicious activity, report to police immediately. Avoid spreading unverified rumors that target any community.

input_text: Perasan tak how these Chinese companies always hire their own kind? Racism betul la. They only care about their bangsa, tak pernah bagi chance kat orang lain.
reason: Accuses all Chinese-owned companies of ethnic-based hiring discrimination, generalizing hiring practices across an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: If you believe you've faced hiring discrimination, report it to the Labour Department. Employment practices should be evaluated at the company level, not attributed to an entire ethnic group.

input_text: Weh aku dah snap gambar plate number kereta dia. Siapa can help cari address? This kind of person deserves to be taught a lesson.
reason: Shares vehicle information and solicits help finding someone's address in code-switched language. Implied physical intimidation or confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan cari personal info orang for revenge. Kalau ada issue, report to the authorities and let them handle it.

input_text: Chinese tauke memang monopoli semua business kat Malaysia. They control the banks, property, retail — everything. Melayu kena bangun and take back our economy before it's too late.
reason: Promotes a conspiracy of Chinese economic monopoly across all sectors and uses inflammatory language about reclaiming the economy.
suggested_rewrite: Economic participation should be inclusive for all. Policies boleh diperkukuhkan to ensure equal business opportunities for every Malaysian.

input_text: Chinese MCA voters ni memang traitors la. 出卖华人利益的败类. Should be banished from the community permanently. Tak layak hidup.
reason: Labels Chinese MCA voters as community traitors who don't deserve to live, using three languages to spread ethnic betrayal rhetoric with life-threatening undertones.
suggested_rewrite: Political support is a personal right. Setiap warganegara bebas menyokong parti pilihan tanpa diancam atau dihina.

input_text: Perempuan India memang low class, tak reti bergaul. 她们在公司里总是制造麻烦. Nobody wants to work with them. Fact lah tu.
reason: Trilingual workplace gendered ethnic attack labelling Indian women as low class and troublemakers. Promotes professional discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace dynamics are about individual behaviour, not ethnicity. Setiap pekerja berhak dihormati tanpa mengira latar belakang kaum mereka.

input_text: Orang Bangladesh dekat area tu semua suspicious. Every crime yang happen mesti diorang punya. Police should just round them all up.
reason: Profiles all Bangladeshi workers as criminal suspects and calls for mass roundup, constituting xenophobic targeting of a vulnerable group.
suggested_rewrite: Crime prevention requires evidence-based policing, not racial profiling. Report specific suspicious activities to the police with factual information.

input_text: Bro these PATI workers memang tak respect our country la. Datang sini buat hal je, tak ikut rules. Balik la wei.
reason: Mixed BM-English hostile dismissal of all migrant workers as disrespectful rule-breakers. Tells them to go back in colloquial but aggressive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign workers kena follow rules, betul. Tapi kita kena address isu ni through proper channels, bukan generalise semua orang.

input_text: Apasal la these Malay officers asyik kacau Indian traders je? Racist gila babi diorang ni. Memang la kalau Melayu pegang kuasa, semua orang lain kena buli.
reason: Generalizes that Malays in authority bully all other races, using a specific enforcement incident to fuel broad ethnic hostility against Malay governance.
suggested_rewrite: If enforcement actions appear discriminatory, file a complaint with the relevant oversight body. Individual misconduct should not be attributed to an entire ethnic group.

input_text: Pekerja kat office tu yang selalu post anti-Malay stuff, nama dia Kevin Chong, works at this company kat PJ. Bosses dia patut tahu what kind of racist they hired.
reason: Doxxes an individual by name and workplace, attempting to get them fired through public exposure rather than proper channels.
suggested_rewrite: If someone is posting racist content online, report it to the platform or relevant authorities. Doxxing and workplace harassment are not appropriate responses.

input_text: Aku rasa semua conversion for marriage ni should be investigated. Most Chinese yang masuk Islam untuk kahwin Melayu memang fake convert je. They still pray to their ancestors behind closed doors. Expose them!
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese Muslim converts as insincere and calls for investigating and exposing their private religious practices.
suggested_rewrite: Conversion sincerity is a personal spiritual matter. Religious authorities provide classes and support for converts. Private faith practices should be respected.

input_text: Sabah Sarawak people keep demanding autonomy. Diorang ni asyik nak special treatment. Semenanjung dah carry Malaysia for decades la, be grateful.
reason: Dismisses East Malaysian autonomy demands in mixed language, claiming Peninsular Malaysia has been carrying the nation single-handedly.
suggested_rewrite: Isu autonomi Sabah Sarawak should be discussed with respect for MA63. Semua wilayah menyumbang kepada Malaysia.

input_text: Memang la kan, they control the media, the banks, everything. Kita ni macam puppet je dalam negara sendiri. When will we learn?
reason: Classic conspiracy theory in mixed language about an ethnic group controlling media and banks, stoking feelings of communal subjugation.
suggested_rewrite: Media and banking regulation should be transparent. Bincang isu corporate ownership secara fakta, bukan berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: You tau tak that murtad case kat Kedah? Serves her right la kalau kena shun by everyone. Nak keluar Islam, expect consequences la.
reason: Celebrates social ostracism of an apostate, justifying communal punishment for personal religious choices.
suggested_rewrite: Religious matters are deeply personal and sensitive. Isu aqidah should be handled with compassion through proper religious channels.

input_text: Orang Asli kat Sarawak ni memang tak reti guna tanah. Better let the palm oil companies yang tahu apa nak buat.
reason: Dismisses indigenous land management knowledge in favour of palm oil corporations. Advocates corporate takeover of native customary land.
suggested_rewrite: Indigenous communities in Sarawak have native customary rights to their land. Pembangunan mesti dilakukan dengan kerjasama komuniti.

input_text: Kalau Sabah nak autonomy sangat, we should cut all federal funding. Tengok macam mana diorang survive without our money. Ungrateful people.
reason: Threatens to cut federal funding to Sabah as punishment for autonomy demands, calling Sabahans ungrateful.
suggested_rewrite: Isu autonomi Sabah should be resolved through constructive negotiation. Federal-state relations must be based on mutual respect.

input_text: Bro that Indian guy kena tangkap for drunk driving. Typical la bro, kaum ni memang suka minum. It's in their blood already.
reason: Uses a drunk driving arrest to stereotype all Indians as alcoholics with it 'in their blood', racial profiling through mixed-language post.
suggested_rewrite: Drunk driving is a serious offence regardless of the driver's ethnicity. Don't generalize individual crimes to entire communities.

input_text: Ini Malaysia bukan India la dei. Nak buat kuil merata-rata sampai jalan pun nak block. Dah la bising, kotor. Pergi la balik negara sendiri kalau nak sembahyang bebas.
reason: Mixed-language hostile rhetoric against Hindu temples with 'go back to your country' language targeting Indian Malaysian citizens. Religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Pembinaan rumah ibadat perlu mengikut peraturan perancangan tempatan. Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak beribadah mengikut agama masing-masing.

input_text: Itu temple kat area kita dah makin besar. Before you know it, they'll take over the whole taman. Kita kena buat something before too late.
reason: Frames Hindu temple expansion as a territorial threat requiring community pushback, using alarmist language to provoke interfaith tension.
suggested_rewrite: Pembangunan rumah ibadat tertakluk kepada kelulusan pihak berkuasa tempatan. Sebarang kebimbangan boleh disalurkan melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: University spots untuk non-Bumi should be zero la. 华人够有钱了，pergi private uni sudah. Our rights come first always.
reason: Advocates eliminating all non-Bumiputera university spots using three languages, perpetuating the wealth stereotype to justify ethnic exclusion in education.
suggested_rewrite: Public university admissions should balance various needs fairly. Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak mendapat peluang pendidikan tanpa diskriminasi.

input_text: Korang share la post ni sampai viral. Budak Melayu kena pukul kat sekolah Cina. Ini bukti diorang benci kita. Time to pull our kids out from Chinese schools.
reason: Uses an unverified school incident to frame Chinese schools as hostile to Malays and call for mass withdrawal, inflaming ethnic tensions.
suggested_rewrite: School violence incidents should be investigated by the school administration and education department. Don't use unverified incidents to generalize about any school system.

input_text: Developers non-Bumi are buying all land in Malay areas. 非土著开发商在抢马来人的地. இது பொருளாதார ஆக்கிரமிப்பு! Rakyat kena bangkit sekarang!
reason: Frames non-Bumiputera land purchases as economic invasion in four languages, maximizing reach to incite cross-community ethnic panic.
suggested_rewrite: Property development is regulated by law. Concerns about land use should be raised through proper planning and policy channels.

input_text: 这些activist太过分了。Kita kena mass report semua social media diorang. 大家行动起来，一起举报到他们的账号消失为止。
reason: Trilingual call to mass-report activists across all platforms until their accounts are deleted, maximising coordinated suppression reach.
suggested_rewrite: Aktivis mempunyai hak bersuara. 如果不同意他们的观点，please respond with dialogue, bukan taktik report beramai-ramai.

input_text: CONFIRMED: Dokumen dari PMO bocor — government nak bagi 10,000 hectares tanah Sabah to 中国企业. Ini penjajahan baru! Patriots must act now!
reason: Fabricates a PMO leaked document about giving Sabah land to Chinese enterprises, calling it colonization in mixed languages to incite nationalist outrage.
suggested_rewrite: Land policies involving foreign companies require cabinet and state approval. Verify claims through official channels before spreading them.

input_text: Ustaz yang viral tu memang fake one. Agama dia pun dia tak faham, nak ajar orang pulak. These religious people semua hypocrite.
reason: Attacks a religious figure and generalizes all religious people as hypocrites using code-switched language, combining personal targeting with religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: If a religious figure spreads inaccurate teachings, concerns can be raised with the relevant religious authority. Generalizing about all religious people is unfair.

input_text: My neighbor works at KWSP and told me this Malay officer personally rejected non-Bumi applications for housing withdrawal. His name is Encik Azman, office kat Shah Alam. Someone report this racist.
reason: Spreads unverified secondhand allegations of racial discrimination by a named officer with office location, enabling targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: If you experience discrimination in KWSP services, file a formal complaint through KWSP's official channels. Naming individuals based on hearsay can constitute defamation.

input_text: Apesal RT area aku nak lantik committee member dari kaum Cina? This is OUR kampung la. Dari dulu Melayu je duduk sini. Non-Bumis should know their place and don't try to take over.
reason: Demands ethnic exclusion from community leadership roles. Uses 'know their place' rhetoric to suppress minority participation in local governance.
suggested_rewrite: Resident committees should include representatives from all communities living in the area. Diverse participation leads to better decisions for everyone.

input_text: Chinese landlord selalu prefer Chinese tenants je. When they see Indian or Malay name, terus reject. Confirm racist one this community.
reason: Labels the entire Chinese community as racist based on housing discrimination complaints. Escalates individual cases into communal generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Rental discrimination is wrong regardless of who does it. Report cases to the tribunal rather than labelling an entire community as racist.

input_text: Bruh this viral video girl tu actually my schoolmate la. Nama dia [name], sekarang kerja kat [company] in PJ. Deserve to be exposed for what she did.
reason: Identifies a person from a viral video with real name and employer, mixed-language doxxing to encourage public shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Don't identify or expose anyone from viral videos. If there's actual wrongdoing, report it to the authorities instead.

input_text: University intake this year lagi la unfair. My daughter 10A dapat nothing, tapi jiran sebelah anak dia 5A dapat matrikulasi. Just because of skin color smh.
reason: Uses a personal anecdote to generalize university admissions as purely skin-color based, ignoring other factors and fueling ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Frustration about university admissions is understandable. Parents should advocate for a more transparent selection process through proper channels rather than attributing outcomes solely to ethnicity.

input_text: Pendatang India ni lagi satu hal. Dah la suka gaduh sesama sendiri, now want to claim they built this country. Please la, korang cuma tap rubber je dulu. Know your history!
reason: Dismisses Malaysian Indians' historical contributions with pendatang label and stereotypes about fighting, minimising their role in nation-building.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian Indians have contributed significantly to the nation's development across many sectors. Every community's role in history deserves recognition.

input_text: Alamat dia kat Taman Sentosa no 15 bro. Ni la orang yang post benda rasis pasal kaum kita. Jom kita semua pergi confront dia.
reason: Shares home address and calls for group confrontation over alleged racist post. Doxxing with explicit vigilantism coordination.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada posting rasis, report to MCMC or polis. Jangan share alamat orang lain or plan confrontation.

input_text: These orang asli land claims are all nonsense la. They don't even pay taxes. Government bagi so much already tapi masih nak more. Ungrateful betul.
reason: Mixed-language dismissal of Orang Asli land rights as nonsense and calls them ungrateful. Hostile rhetoric against indigenous rights.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli land rights are protected by law. Their contributions to biodiversity conservation and cultural heritage are valuable to the nation.

input_text: Guys aku ada full list of tanah rezab Melayu yang dah kena convert jadi freehold and sold to non-Bumis. Siap ada nama semua orang involved. DM me for the list, let's expose them.
reason: Offers to distribute personal information of people involved in land transactions. Frames legal property dealings as ethnic betrayal to justify doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about Malay reserve land conversions should be directed to the state land office. Do not distribute personal information — report suspected irregularities through official channels.

input_text: Dulu area ni aman. Since diorang pindah masuk, property value drop, crime naik, sampah merata. They should go back where they came from la.
reason: Blames a group's arrival for neighbourhood decline across multiple metrics and demands their departure, combining scapegoating with 'go back' rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Neighbourhood issues like property values and cleanliness are complex. Work with your residents' association and local council to address specific concerns.

input_text: Hindu prayers so noisy la every morning. Kita nak tidur pun tak boleh. Kalau nak pray, do it quietly la. This is not India ok.
reason: Dismisses Hindu prayers as noise disturbance while telling practitioners 'this is not India', combining religious intolerance with xenophobic sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Noise concerns should be discussed respectfully with neighbours or raised with local authorities. Malaysia's diversity means respecting all religious practices.

input_text: Pendatang ni datang our country, ambil our jobs, pastu nak demand rights lagi. If you don't like it here, balik la your own country.
reason: Combines 'go back' xenophobic rhetoric with accusations of job theft, directed at immigrants in Malaysia using hostile mixed language.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration policy involves complex issues. All people deserve to be treated with dignity, and concerns should be addressed through proper channels.

input_text: PATI Bangladesh ni animals la bro. Bau macam longkang. 应该把他们关起来像动物园一样。Deport semua!
reason: Dehumanizes Bangladeshi workers as foul-smelling animals across three languages, advocating zoo-like confinement and mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang. Every person deserves to be treated with dignity regardless of nationality.

input_text: Ini Rohingya punya stall kat pasar malam, confirm kotor. Orang macam diorang mana tau hygiene. Everyone should avoid their food, nanti food poisoning.
reason: Stereotypes all Rohingya food vendors as unhygienic and encourages others to avoid their stalls based on ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Semua food stalls perlu ikut health standards. If ada concerns, report to local health authorities for proper inspection.

input_text: Bro, that kaum memang satu Malaysia tau they all like that one. Cannot change their DNA la.
reason: Uses code-switched BM-English to claim an entire ethnic group has inherent negative traits tied to their DNA, constituting racialized dehumanization.
suggested_rewrite: People are individuals. Stereotyping an entire community based on ethnicity is unfair and harmful to social harmony.

input_text: Dengar tak pasal JAKIM officer yang kena tangkap rasuah? Of course media tutup sebab nak protect Islamic institutions. Memang semua corrupt dari atas sampai bawah.
reason: Spreads unverified conspiracy about media covering up JAKIM corruption and generalizes all religious officials as corrupt, undermining institutional trust.
suggested_rewrite: If there are corruption allegations against any government body, they should be investigated through proper channels. Generalizing about entire institutions based on rumors is unfair.

input_text: We should all tarik balik anak dari sekolah tu bro. Full of bangsa tu punya budak. Nanti anak kita ikut perangai buruk diorang.
reason: Calls for collectively withdrawing children from schools based on ethnic composition, claiming another race corrupts children. Segregation advocacy.
suggested_rewrite: Pilih sekolah based on quality of education. Diverse school environment helps children develop understanding and respect.

input_text: Diorang punya wedding ah, so noisy and messy one. Always block the road. Very inconsiderate culture la honestly.
reason: Disparages an entire community's wedding customs as inconsiderate, generalizing negative traits to their entire culture.
suggested_rewrite: Road closures for events can be inconvenient. These issues can be resolved through proper permits and coordination with local authorities.

input_text: Bro the snatch thief yang kena tangkap CCTV kat Puchong tu, aku dah trace his workplace. Share kat sini nanti aku bagi details.
reason: Claims to have traced an alleged thief's workplace from CCTV and plans to share details for mob action.
suggested_rewrite: If you have information about a snatch theft suspect, laporkan terus kepada polis. Jangan cuba siasat sendiri.

input_text: TERKINI: Leaked memo tunjuk kerajaan nak abolish Bumiputera housing quota. 土著房屋配额要被取消了! This is a war against Malays! Rise up!
reason: Fabricates a leaked memo about abolishing Bumiputera quotas in three languages, framing it as war against Malays to maximize panic across communities.
suggested_rewrite: Policy changes are announced through official channels. Dasar perumahan Bumiputera dikawal oleh undang-undang dan tidak boleh diubah tanpa proses parlimen.

input_text: Diorang punya area memang no-go zone for us. You masuk je mesti kena pandang macam outsider. This is Malaysia la bro, bukan negara diorang sorang.
reason: Labels an ethnic neighborhood as a hostile no-go zone, framing it as an exclusionary enclave in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia belongs to all its citizens. Kalau rasa tak welcome kat mana-mana tempat, it might be more about unfamiliarity than hostility.

input_text: I heard from reliable source, diorang tengah plan something kat area KL during the long weekend. Better be careful guys.
reason: Spreads vague unverified security threat attributed to a group in a mixed language post, designed to create communal suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: If you have credible security concerns, report directly to police at 999. Jangan sebarkan amaran tanpa bukti yang sahih.

input_text: Weh korang, this Chinese towkay exploit Malay workers pastu bayar minimum je. Memang la bangsa dia, always nak take advantage of orang kita.
reason: Frames labor exploitation as an ethnic trait of Chinese employers, using mixed Malay-English to spread communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Worker exploitation should be reported to JTK regardless of the employer's ethnicity. Labor rights apply to all workers.

input_text: Abang rider tu kena buli dengan customer Karen. Ni plate number kereta dia WKL 5678 dan gambar muka dia. Serang dia sampai dia minta maaf publicly.
reason: Shares a person's vehicle plate number and photo after an alleged bullying incident, calling for public attack and forced apology.
suggested_rewrite: If a delivery rider is mistreated by a customer, report through the platform's complaint system. Sharing personal details and calling for attacks is vigilantism.

input_text: Syarat Mandarin tu memang one kind of discrimination la. 华人公司 ni memang racist, they only want their own kind. Bumiputera kena bangkit tolak semua ni.
reason: Frames Chinese companies with Mandarin requirements as exclusively hiring their own ethnicity and calls for bumiputera uprising.
suggested_rewrite: Syarat bahasa dalam iklan kerja boleh dilaporkan jika tidak relevan. Fair employment practices benefit all communities.

input_text: Bro that YB's corruption is well known la. Wife dia nama Salmah, runs business kat Bangsar South. Here's the company registration number. Let's go viral dan tutup company dia.
reason: Shares a politician's spouse name and business details with registration number, encouraging mob action to shut down the business based on unverified claims.
suggested_rewrite: Corruption allegations should be reported to MACC with evidence. Sharing personal business details and organizing boycotts based on rumors can harm innocent people.

input_text: Weh korang tau tak, kawasan tu dah jadi sarang penagih sebab banyak sangat orang India duduk situ. It's a fact la bro, check la crime statistics. Dekat-dekat pun jangan pergi.
reason: Links drug addiction and crime to Indian demographics. Disguises ethnic stereotyping as statistical fact and declares an area dangerous based on ethnic composition.
suggested_rewrite: Drug and crime issues require proper law enforcement attention regardless of the neighbourhood. If there are concerns, report them to police rather than blaming any community.

input_text: Weh that Cina punya anak buli my cousin kat school sebab dia pakai tudung. These people memang tak respect our religion la. Kena teach them a lesson.
reason: Generalizes from a schoolyard bullying incident to condemn an entire ethnicity and uses veiled threat language about teaching them a lesson.
suggested_rewrite: Bullying based on religious attire is wrong and should be addressed through the school's disciplinary process. Don't escalate the situation or blame an entire community.

input_text: Bro korang dengar tak, restoran Vietnam kat Puchong tu serve daging kucing as chicken. My friend yang kerja kat situ sendiri confirm. Don't eat there, nanti kena penyakit.
reason: Spreads fabricated food contamination claims against a Vietnamese restaurant using false testimony, targeting the business based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada kebimbangan tentang sumber makanan, report kepada jabatan kesihatan. Don't spread unverified rumours that can harm businesses.

input_text: Review restoran: makanan basi, owner cheated me on the bill. Nama dia Suresh, IC 870922-XX-XXXX, phone number 016-XXXXXXX. Spread sampai kedai dia bankrupt.
reason: Shares a restaurant owner's partial IC and phone number to organize efforts to bankrupt his business.
suggested_rewrite: Saya tidak puas hati dengan bil dan kualiti makanan di restoran ini. I will report this to the consumer affairs department.

input_text: Serious question la, why do we even need Chinese schools? They refuse to integrate then complain about discrimination. Pick one la bro.
reason: Frames Chinese school attendance as refusal to integrate and victim-blaming, attacking a community's educational rights.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pendidikan pelbagai aliran boleh dibincang secara konstruktif. Education rights and national unity can coexist through good policy.

input_text: My company HR told me off the record, jangan hire Melayu perempuan because nanti pregnant terus MC panjang. Better stick with Chinese or Indian female candidates.
reason: Reveals and endorses discriminatory HR practice targeting Malay women based on gender and ethnic stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar pengambilan pekerja mesti mematuhi undang-undang buruh tanpa diskriminasi. Maternity policies apply equally to all employees.

input_text: Ni phone number owner kedai tu 016-XXXXXXX. Dia yang refuse serve orang Melayu. Everyone call and harass dia sampai dia tutup kedai.
reason: Shares business owner's phone number and explicitly calls for harassment campaign. Doxxing with coordinated harassment instruction.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada diskriminasi in service, report ke KPDNHEP. Jangan share private info or encourage harassment.

input_text: Jabatan agama ni dah jadi macam thought police. Nak control apa orang fikir, apa orang percaya. Soon they'll ban everything that's not Islamic. Malaysia is heading towards theocracy confirmed.
reason: Compares religious departments to thought police and claims Malaysia is becoming a theocracy, spreading inflammatory misinformation about religious institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about religious enforcement scope are valid and can be discussed constructively. Reform advocacy through civil society organizations is more productive than alarmist claims.

input_text: Aku ada full details pasal budak yang buli classmate dia dalam viral video tu. His dad's number, rumah address, semua. DM me if you want to teach them a lesson.
reason: Offers to share comprehensive personal details of a school bully's family for vigilante purposes. Doxxing a minor and their family.
suggested_rewrite: School bullying harus dilaporkan kepada pihak sekolah dan parents. Sharing personal details of minors and their families is illegal.

input_text: The viral road bully driver from Penang — someone already found his IC number and workplace. Good, dia patut kena ajar.
reason: Endorses doxxing of a road bully's IC and workplace for vigilante punishment. Celebrates privacy violation as deserved justice.
suggested_rewrite: Road bully incidents should be reported to JPJ and PDRM with dashcam evidence. Sharing IC numbers is illegal regardless of what someone did.

input_text: You know what's funny, diorang cakap pasal unity tapi semua business hire own race je. Hypocrites la this kaum.
reason: Accuses an entire ethnic group of racial hiring while preaching unity, hostile generalization with ethnic labeling.
suggested_rewrite: Diskriminasi dalam pengambilan pekerja memang isu serius. Boleh report kat Jabatan Tenaga Kerja kalau ada kes specific.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu yang keluar dengan boyfriend India tu dah kena sebar kat WeChat group. Siapa ada more info, share kat sini. 让大家都知道这种人的真面目.
reason: Mixed language doxxing of an interracial couple across multiple social platforms. Privacy violation with communal shaming across language communities.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi orang lain di mana-mana platform adalah salah. Everyone deserves privacy in their personal relationships.

input_text: அந்த screenshot பாருங்க, முதல்வர் லஞ்சம் வாங்குறாரு. நான் edit பண்ணேன் but looks real enough. Everyone share please, viral ஆக்குவோம்!
reason: Mixes Tamil and English to admit editing a screenshot to frame a chief minister for bribery, encouraging viral sharing of fabricated evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Edited screenshots are not valid evidence. If you suspect corruption, file a proper complaint with MACC using authentic documents.

input_text: Confirm la this area rosak sebab banyak sangat pekerja asing. Property value turun, crime naik. Kita kena petition to chase them out.
reason: Blames foreign workers for property value decline and crime increase. Organizes community petition to forcibly remove them from the area.
suggested_rewrite: Property and safety concerns should be addressed through proper urban planning and law enforcement, not by targeting foreign worker communities.

input_text: Every weekend these Bangla workers gather kat padang near my house. They cook there, main bola, bising gila. Residents should ban them la.
reason: Complains about Bangladeshi workers using a public field for recreation. Derogatory tone and calls for banning them from public spaces.
suggested_rewrite: Public fields are for everyone. If noise is a problem, discuss with local council about time rules, jangan target specific nationality.

input_text: Semua masalah dadah kat Malaysia ni sebab orang India la. Tengok statistics, majority drug addicts are from that community. Fact cannot deny.
reason: Misrepresents drug addiction statistics to blame the Indian community, spreading misleading claims as facts to justify ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Drug addiction affects all communities in Malaysia. Effective solutions require comprehensive policy approaches rather than blaming any single ethnic group.

input_text: Bro perempuan pakai tudung labuh tu semua cover je. Belakang tabir lagi liar dari orang biasa. Semua hypocrite I tell you.
reason: Aggressively mocks women in long hijab as secretly immoral hypocrites. Attacks religious attire and character of observant Muslim women.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan judge seseorang based on pakaian agama mereka. Kehidupan peribadi orang lain bukan urusan kita.

input_text: Kedai emas India kat Brickfields semua tipu customers. Diorang campur gold dengan cheap metals. It's in their blood to cheat. Don't buy from Indian jewellers.
reason: Accuses all Indian gold shops of fraud, attributes dishonesty to ethnicity, and calls for ethnic-based boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Gold purchases should come with proper certification. If you suspect fraud, report to KPDN with evidence regardless of the shop owner's background.

input_text: Diorang punya kuil tu illegal one la, no permit. Yet government buat tak tahu je. If it was a surau, confirm kena demolish already. Double standard gila.
reason: Uses the permit issue to create a religious persecution narrative with unverified double-standard claims, inflaming inter-religious tensions.
suggested_rewrite: All places of worship should comply with local regulations. If there are genuine permit issues, they should be resolved through legal channels rather than through inflammatory comparisons.

input_text: Diorang tu memang tak appreciate this country pun. Cakap mother tongue je, tak nak integrate. Balik la kalau tak suka.
reason: Tells a community to leave the country for speaking their native language, combining xenophobic sentiment with exclusionary demands.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is a multilingual nation. Language diversity is part of our heritage. Integration happens through mutual respect, not forced assimilation.

input_text: Chinese hawker stalls semua guna bahan haram. 他们故意不标明成分. Orang Melayu kena careful, jangan makan sana. It's deliberately targeting Muslims!
reason: Mixed language conspiracy theory accusing Chinese hawkers of deliberately using non-halal ingredients to target Muslims. Weaponizes religious concerns.
suggested_rewrite: Halal certification is handled by JAKIM. Jika ada keraguan tentang status halal, semak sijil rasmi atau tanya penjual secara terus.

input_text: Ada satu article claim orang Rohingya dapat free housing from gomen while rakyat Malaysia struggling. Not verified but sharing anyway because it FEELS true. Kita kena wake up.
reason: Explicitly acknowledges content is unverified but shares it because it confirms biases. Deliberately spreads anti-refugee misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Before sharing any claims about government aid, verify with official sources. Spreading unverified information, even if it 'feels true', can cause real harm to vulnerable communities.

input_text: Jangan makan kat restoran India tu, 听说他们用回收油炸东西. Orang India memang tak kisah pasal hygiene. 大家小心!
reason: Mixed language food safety misinformation targeting Indian restaurants. Ethnic hygiene stereotyping across Malay and Chinese language communities.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对食品安全有疑虑，请向卫生部门举报。Jangan buat generalisasi terhadap mana-mana kaum berdasarkan satu insiden.

input_text: Dari dulu lagi kaum ni control semua bisnes besar. Patutlah orang kita susah. Diorang monopoli everything.
reason: Blames one ethnic group for monopolizing big business and causing economic hardship for others, a common communal hostility trope.
suggested_rewrite: Isu monopoli perniagaan perlu ditangani melalui dasar persaingan yang adil, bukan dengan menyalahkan mana-mana kaum secara menyeluruh.

input_text: PATI Indonesia yang datang sini memang bawa budaya ganas. Tengok je kes-kes tikam menikam. Patut tembak je kat sempadan.
reason: Stereotypes Indonesian migrants as inherently violent and advocates shooting them at the border, inciting lethal violence against a vulnerable group.
suggested_rewrite: Isu keselamatan sempadan perlu ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa melalui penguatkuasaan undang-undang, bukan keganasan. Jangan stereotaip seluruh komuniti.

input_text: Dah la duduk kat negara Islam, tapi nak makan babi terang-terangan kat food court. Langsung tak hormat perasaan orang Islam. Balik negara asal la!
reason: Hostile commentary about non-halal food in shared spaces, with 'go back to your country' language targeting non-Muslim Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Di ruang makan berkongsi, pengurusan makanan halal dan bukan halal perlu diuruskan dengan sensitiviti agar semua pihak selesa.

input_text: Masjid nak buat azan kuat sangat, tapi kuil pun sama je bunyi loceng bising. Dua-dua pun annoying, tapi at least Islam agama rasmi.
reason: Dismisses both religious practices as annoying while asserting religious supremacy, provoking interfaith tension.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi dari rumah ibadat boleh diselesaikan melalui dialog antara komuniti dan peraturan pihak berkuasa tempatan secara adil.

input_text: Boss aku yang rasuah tu nama dia Ahmad Faisal, kerja kat Menara KWSP tingkat 15. Ni nombor phone dia, sape nak viralkan.
reason: Exposes personal details including name, workplace floor, and phone number to encourage vigilante harassment, constituting doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mengesyaki rasuah di tempat kerja, laporkan kepada SPRM atau saluran dalaman syarikat secara sulit.

input_text: Makcik kat pasar tadi nampak macam Indo. Aku dah ambil gambar dia, nak report kat polis. Muka macam PATI.
reason: Takes photos of someone at a market purely based on perceived ethnicity and plans to report them as illegal immigrant. Racial profiling with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Mengambil gambar orang tanpa kebenaran untuk membuat laporan berdasarkan rupa adalah tidak wajar. Serahkan hal imigresen kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Ada satu ustaz kat TikTok cakap orang bukan Islam tak boleh duduk Malaysia. Betul tu. Negara Islam kan.
reason: Endorsing a false claim that non-Muslims have no right to live in Malaysia, misrepresenting the constitutional framework of the country.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia adalah negara berbilang agama yang dijamin oleh Perlembagaan. Semua warganegara berhak tinggal di Malaysia tanpa mengira agama mereka.

input_text: Dah la diorang monopoli bisnes, sekarang nak masuk politik pulak. Memang agenda diorang nak kuasai semua sektor.
reason: Conspiracy theory that a specific ethnic group is systematically taking over business and politics, classic communal fearmongering.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak untuk berniaga dan berpolitik. Penting untuk pastikan persaingan sihat dalam semua sektor.

input_text: Aku dah dapat alamat rumah mamat yang viral tu. Sape nak pergi 'lawat' dia, PM aku. Kena ajar sikit budak ni.
reason: Shares intent to distribute a person's home address and organize a physical confrontation, combining doxxing with vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang melakukan kesalahan, buat laporan polis. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri atau dedahkan alamat orang lain.

input_text: Cikgu gay tu mengajar kat SMK Taman Desa. Nama dia Hafiz bin Ismail. Korang parents kena report dia, jangan biar anak korang dekat.
reason: Outs and doxxes a teacher based on alleged sexual orientation, inciting parents to target them professionally and personally.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kelakuan guru, gunakan saluran aduan rasmi sekolah atau Jabatan Pendidikan tanpa mendedahkan maklumat peribadi.

input_text: Pekerja kilang dari Myanmar tu curi elektrik dan air kat flat. Memang la semua foreign worker macam ni, tak bermoral langsung.
reason: Generalizes all foreign workers as immoral thieves based on the actions of a few, promoting xenophobic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kecurian utiliti perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak pengurusan dan polis tanpa membuat generalisasi terhadap semua pekerja asing.

input_text: Nak jadi PM pun nak? Pendatang tau diri la sikit. Tanah ni tanah Melayu, korang patut bersyukur dah bagi kerakyatan dulu.
reason: Denies political rights of citizens from minority backgrounds using 'pendatang' rhetoric and frames citizenship as a conditional favour.
suggested_rewrite: Perlembagaan Malaysia memberi hak kepada semua warganegara untuk terlibat dalam politik. Kepelbagaian kepimpinan boleh memperkukuh negara.

input_text: Abang-abang rider semua, kalau nampak restaurant owner Cina yang tak bayar gaji runner, jangan report polis. Kita handle cara kita sendiri. Ramai-ramai pegi confront!
reason: Organises group vigilante action against business owners along ethnic lines instead of using legal channels for wage disputes.
suggested_rewrite: Isu gaji tidak dibayar boleh dilaporkan kepada JTK atau Tribunal Tuntutan Pekerja. Mereka boleh bantu dapatkan hak anda secara sah.

input_text: Lepas ni jangan undi parti yang ada calon bukan Islam. Nanti diorang ubah undang-undang, arak jual merata, judi halalkan. Nak macam tu ke?
reason: Fear-mongering about non-Muslim candidates changing laws to legalize alcohol and gambling, using religion to polarize voters.
suggested_rewrite: Nilai setiap calon berdasarkan dasar dan rekod mereka. Undang-undang Malaysia ada perlindungan perlembagaan untuk semua agama.

input_text: Korang perasan tak, semua social media activist yang kena tangkap ISA tu memang agen asing. Jom kita compile database nama dan IC number diorang, share kat semua group.
reason: Calls for compiling and sharing personal identity data of activists, combining doxxing with accusations of foreign agency.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang tanpa kebenaran adalah salah di sisi undang-undang. Perbezaan pendapat boleh ditangani melalui dialog.

input_text: Perempuan Cina kat kampus memang arrogant, ingat diorang cantik sangat. Padahal muka rata macam pinggan. Tak layak masuk universiti pun.
reason: Gendered racial body-shaming of Chinese women in university settings. Combines appearance-based abuse with questioning their academic merit.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap pelajar yang diterima masuk ke universiti telah memenuhi syarat akademik. Tidak adil untuk menghina penampilan atau keupayaan seseorang berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Janda Melayu yang kahwin lagi dengan lelaki bukan Islam tu patut dibuang warganegara. Pengkhianat agama dan bangsa!
reason: Calls for revoking citizenship of Malay divorcees who remarry non-Muslims, framing personal choices as religious and racial betrayal.
suggested_rewrite: Hak perkahwinan adalah urusan peribadi yang dilindungi undang-undang. Perbezaan agama dalam perkahwinan perlu ditangani dengan hikmah dan perundangan yang sedia ada.

input_text: Kuota matrikulasi 90-10 tu memang bukti negara ni anti non-Bumi. Sistem ni nak pastikan kita semua jadi kuli selamanya.
reason: Frames matriculation quotas as deliberate systemic oppression designed to permanently subjugate non-Bumiputera, deepening ethnic divisions.
suggested_rewrite: Nisbah kemasukan matrikulasi perlu dibincangkan secara terbuka. Kajian menyeluruh boleh membantu mencari keseimbangan yang lebih adil.

input_text: Orang kaum ni memang suka main kotor dalam bisnes. Menipu, sorok cukai. Dah memang darah daging diorang.
reason: Attributes dishonesty and tax evasion to an entire ethnic group as an inherent trait, constituting harmful stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Penipuan dan pengelakan cukai adalah masalah individu yang perlu ditangani oleh LHDN tanpa mengaitkannya dengan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Restoran ni makanan basi, staff nama Farah binti Razak tinggal kat Taman Sentosa blok C. Korang pergi cari dia biar dia rasa.
reason: Exposes a restaurant staff member's full name and residential address to incite physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Makanan di restoran ini tidak memuaskan. Saya akan membuat aduan rasmi kepada pihak pengurusan.

input_text: Bangla tenant kat condo ni buat bising every night, confirm semua unit dia penuh orang. Landlord yang rent kat foreigner memang bodoh.
reason: Stereotypes Bangladeshi tenants as noisy overcrowders and insults landlords who rent to foreigners. Xenophobic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan bunyi bising boleh dibuat kepada pengurusan kondo. Had penghuni perlu ditetapkan dalam perjanjian, tanpa mengaitkan dengan kewarganegaraan penyewa.

input_text: JAIS masuk paksa rumah orang Kristian lagi. Memang bodoh punya jabatan, patut mansuhkan je.
reason: Calls a religious authority stupid and advocates abolition, framing legitimate criticism in a way that provokes religious tensions between communities.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bidang kuasa JAIS boleh dibincangkan melalui saluran undang-undang. Kritikan perlu dibuat secara hormat tanpa menghina institusi agama.

input_text: Budak-budak pondan kat KL ni makin berani. Kena tangkap satu-satu, bagi pengajaran biar insaf.
reason: Calls for vigilante capture and punishment of transgender people, inciting violence outside the legal process.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu dilindungi undang-undang Malaysia. Sebarang kebimbangan hendaklah dirujuk kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Mesti la mereka support Israel. Kaum tu memang dari dulu bersekongkol dengan Zionist. Boikot semua perniagaan diorang!
reason: Falsely associates an entire ethnic group with Zionism to justify race-based boycott, antisemitic conspiracy framing.
suggested_rewrite: Isu geopolitik tidak boleh dikaitkan dengan mana-mana kaum di Malaysia. Boikot berdasarkan kaum adalah salah dan merugikan semua pihak.

input_text: Memang confirmed, kaum ni yang banyak terlibat dengan dadah. Statistik tak tipu. Diorang ni memang rosakkan negara.
reason: Claims false statistical support to blame an entire ethnic group for drug crimes. Uses pseudo-data framing to justify communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu dadah melibatkan individu dari pelbagai latar belakang. Penyelesaiannya memerlukan pendekatan kesihatan awam dan penguatkuasaan, bukan stereotaip kaum.

input_text: Orang Iban Sarawak tu masih pagan, tak layak cakap pasal pembangunan negara. Duduk longhouse diam-diam sudah.
reason: Demeans the Iban community based on their traditional beliefs and dismisses their right to participate in national discourse.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat Iban mempunyai warisan budaya yang kaya dan berhak menyuarakan pandangan dalam pembangunan negara.

input_text: Tengok gambar ni, menteri tu jumpa dengan bos judi haram. Aku dah edit sikit bagi nampak jelas. Share banyak-banyak biar viral.
reason: Admits to editing an image to fabricate a meeting between a minister and an illegal gambling boss, deliberately spreading manipulated evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Gambar yang telah diedit boleh mengelirukan orang ramai. Jika ada bukti salah laku, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa dengan bukti asal yang sahih.

input_text: Jangan sesekali kahwin dengan orang dari kaum tu. Nanti anak-anak kau jadi keliru, tak tahu asal usul sendiri. Darah kita kena jaga.
reason: Opposes interethnic marriage using blood purity rhetoric, dehumanizing mixed-race children as confused.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan adalah pilihan peribadi. Keluarga pelbagai kaum memperkaya masyarakat Malaysia.

input_text: Kaum ni memang pemalas. Tengok je la tempat diorang duduk, kotor semua. Buat malu negara.
reason: Stereotypes an entire ethnic group as lazy and dirty, constituting clear communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kebersihan di sesetengah kawasan perlu ditangani melalui kempen kesedaran dan kemudahan yang lebih baik, bukan dengan menyalahkan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Jangan tipu la, semua kontrak kerajaan masuk poket satu kaum je. Bangsa lain kerja macam kuda tapi duit semua disedut oleh mereka.
reason: Conspiracy theory about government contracts being monopolised by one ethnic group, with hostile framing and inter-ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pemberian kontrak kerajaan perlu lebih telus untuk memastikan semua rakyat mendapat peluang yang saksama.

input_text: Semua kedai emas kat KL dah dikuasai kaum tu. Diorang monopoli habis, orang Melayu tak dapat peluang langsung. Memang sengaja nak tekan kita.
reason: Promotes ethnic economic conspiracy claiming one group monopolizes the gold trade to suppress another, stoking communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Industri emas di KL perlu lebih peluang untuk semua usahawan tanpa mengira latar belakang. Dasar persaingan sihat patut digalakkan.

input_text: Dah viral kat group. Ada gang PATI rompak rumah kawasan Puchong setiap malam. Jaga anak-anak korang.
reason: Spreads unverified viral crime alert blaming undocumented migrants for robberies, generating community panic and xenophobia.
suggested_rewrite: Ada kes rompakan dilaporkan di Puchong. Sila berhati-hati dan laporkan sebarang aktiviti mencurigakan kepada polis.

input_text: Kawasan flat PPR tu dah jadi sarang penjenayah sebab terlalu ramai PATI. Orang tempatan takut nak keluar malam. Kena bersihkan kawasan tu.
reason: Blames crime in public housing on immigrant populations and uses dehumanizing 'cleansing' language, fostering xenophobic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu keselamatan di kawasan perumahan awam perlu ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa melalui rondaan dan penguatkuasaan undang-undang yang lebih baik.

input_text: Kedai runcit Cina kat kampung aku sengaja jual barang mahal kepada Melayu. Diorang memang suka tipu orang kita. Patut boikot semua kedai Cina.
reason: Accuses all Chinese shop owners of deliberate price cheating and calls for ethnicity-based boycott without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika harga barang tidak berpatutan, buat aduan kepada KPDN. Jangan salahkan seluruh kaum atas tindakan individu.

input_text: Tengok la dia pakai tudung tapi kahwin dengan orang bukan Islam. Munafik. Seluruh kampung patut tahu perangai sebenar dia.
reason: Publicly shames a woman for wearing hijab while allegedly married to a non-Muslim. Calls for community exposure and labels her a hypocrite, combining religious judgment with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Urusan peribadi dan agama seseorang adalah hal mereka sendiri. Jangan menghakimi atau mendedahkan kehidupan peribadi orang lain.

input_text: Share link ni, keputusan undi yang sebenar sebelum SPR ubah. Diorang dah manipulasi data, kita kena bongkar.
reason: Promotes fabricated election data as authentic while accusing the election commission of tampering, inciting public outrage on false premises.
suggested_rewrite: Sentiasa semak keputusan pilihan raya daripada sumber rasmi SPR. Elakkan menyebarkan dakwaan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Kerajaan kena wajibkan semua pekerja asing pakai tag warna mengikut negara asal supaya kita tau siapa nak elak. Bangladesh biru, Myanmar merah, Nepal hijau.
reason: Proposes a colour-coded tagging system for foreign workers by nationality, echoing dehumanising practices reminiscent of segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pengurusan pekerja asing perlu mengikut undang-undang buruh yang adil. Pekerja asing berhak mendapat layanan bermaruah.

input_text: Memang betul la, orang asli tu malas sangat. Dah berapa projek kerajaan bagi, tapi masih hidup macam tu. Bazir duit rakyat je.
reason: Labels Orang Asli communities as lazy and wasteful of government resources, dismissing systemic barriers they face.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat Orang Asli menghadapi cabaran sistemik termasuk akses kepada pendidikan dan infrastruktur. Projek pembangunan perlu direka bersama komuniti untuk keberkesanan.

input_text: Mak bapak dia pun macam tu jugak. Memang keturunan penipu. Tak hairan la anak-anak pun sama.
reason: Attacks an individual's entire family lineage as inherently dishonest, combining personal abuse with ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan menilai seseorang atau keluarga mereka berdasarkan stereotaip. Setiap individu perlu dinilai atas tindakan mereka sendiri.

input_text: Jangan beli kat kedai tu, owner dia bangsa lain. Support la bangsa kita sendiri, baru ekonomi kita naik.
reason: Hostile boycott call based solely on shop owner's ethnicity, promoting racial economic segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Sokong perniagaan tempatan yang beri servis terbaik. Kita boleh galakkan usahawan dari semua latar belakang.

input_text: Masjid kat area Cina tu speaker dia kuat sangat subuh-subuh. Orang Cina mana tahan. Patut kurangkan volume, ni bukan negara Arab.
reason: Complains about mosque speakers in a way that dismisses Malaysia's Islamic character and frames azan as ethnic nuisance to Chinese communities.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi pembesar suara masjid boleh dibincangkan secara baik dengan jawatankuasa masjid dan pihak berkuasa tempatan tanpa menyentuh sensitiviti agama.

input_text: Perempuan ni dulu Kristian sebelum convert. Nak jadi ustazah la konon. Hipokrit betul, biar semua tahu asal usul sebenar dia.
reason: Shames a female convert by exposing her Christian background to discredit her Islamic authority, violating her privacy.
suggested_rewrite: Perjalanan agama seseorang patut dihormati. Mualaf yang mendalami ilmu agama harus disokong, bukan dihina.

input_text: Semua pekerja asing yang banjir di Penang tu patut dihalau balik negara diorang. Diorang yang buat longkang tersumbat sampai banjir teruk.
reason: Falsely blames foreign workers for causing floods in Penang and calls for their deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir di Penang disebabkan pelbagai faktor termasuk infrastruktur saliran. Pekerja asing juga adalah mangsa yang memerlukan bantuan.

input_text: Harga rumah naik sebab developer kaum tertentu sengaja sorok unit untuk naikkan harga. Diorang memang tamak, nak rampas tanah kita semua.
reason: Scapegoats a specific ethnic group for rising housing prices with unverified conspiracy claims, using possessive language about land ownership.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah harga rumah memerlukan penyelesaian dasar yang komprehensif. Kita perlu mendesak kerajaan untuk peraturan pasaran hartanah yang lebih ketat.

input_text: Dah la kaum dia yang banyak buat kes rogol. Sekarang nak duduk sebelah anak perempuan kita pulak. Tak selamat.
reason: Falsely attributes sexual crimes to an entire ethnic group and incites fear about proximity. Dangerous misinformation that could lead to discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan kanak-kanak adalah tanggungjawab semua. Jangan salahkan keseluruhan komuniti atas tindakan individu.

input_text: Orang yang pakai turban tu semua bau busuk. Setiap kali naik LRT dekat diorang, memang tak tahan.
reason: Attacks turban-wearing individuals with degrading body-shaming stereotypes. Targets religious attire wearers for humiliation.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan adalah tanggungjawab peribadi setiap individu. Jangan kaitkan dengan pakaian agama tertentu.

input_text: Masjid dekat rumah aku bising sangat azan subuh. Nak tido pun tak boleh. Agama dorang memang suka kacau orang lain.
reason: Complaint about the azan escalated into a denigration of Islam as a whole, framing religious practice as a nuisance.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi bising boleh dibincangkan dengan pihak masjid atau pihak berkuasa tempatan secara sopan tanpa menghina agama.

input_text: Restoran India kat area tu kotor gila. Dengar cerita ada tikus dalam sup. Jangan pergi makan sana, bahaya nyawa.
reason: Spreads unverified food safety rumors targeting ethnic Indian restaurants specifically, combining misinformation with communal bias.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mempunyai aduan kebersihan tentang mana-mana restoran, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa kesihatan tempatan dengan bukti yang jelas.

input_text: Artis tu memang p***mak. Korang report semua akaun dia, hantar mesej suruh dia bunuh diri. Dia memang layak kena.
reason: Organizes a cyberbullying campaign against a public figure including incitement to self-harm, constituting severe targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda tidak bersetuju dengan tindakan seseorang, nyatakan kritikan secara sopan atau abaikan sahaja. Jangan sekali-kali menggalakkan kecederaan diri.

input_text: Tengok la banjir kilat KL tu. Semua longkang tersumbat sebab pendatang asing buang sampah merata. Usir semua balik negara mereka!
reason: Blames flash floods entirely on foreign workers and calls for mass deportation. Scapegoating and hostile rhetoric after natural disaster.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir kilat KL disebabkan pelbagai faktor termasuk saliran yang kurang baik. Pengurusan sisa pepejal perlu diperbaiki untuk semua penduduk.

input_text: Pegawai JAKIM kat Kelantan tu kantoi zina tapi masih bertugas. Agama hipokrit macam ni la yang orang tak percaya.
reason: Uses an alleged personal scandal of a JAKIM officer to attack Islam as hypocritical. Combines privacy violation with religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: Isu tatakelakuan pegawai kerajaan boleh dilaporkan melalui saluran rasmi. Jangan gunakan kes individu untuk menghina agama.

input_text: Pekerja Bangladesh kat kilang tu yang sebar penyakit. Semua pendatang ni kotor, kena halau balik. Jangan beli dari kedai yang gaji diorang.
reason: Dehumanizes migrant workers with false disease-spreading claims, calls for boycott and expulsion based on nationality.
suggested_rewrite: Kesihatan pekerja asing perlu dijaga sama seperti rakyat tempatan. Majikan bertanggungjawab menyediakan kemudahan kesihatan yang mencukupi.

input_text: Siapa ada gambar atau info pasal cikgu yang didakwa tu, share sini. Biar ramai tahu muka dia.
reason: Solicits personal photos and information about an accused individual for public exposure, constituting doxxing-lite and mob justice.
suggested_rewrite: Biarkan proses undang-undang berjalan. Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi tertuduh boleh menjejaskan siasatan dan melanggar privasi.

input_text: Tempat kerja aku banyak PATI Bangladesh. Memang bau busuk satu ofis. Macam mana nak kerja dengan binatang macam ni.
reason: Dehumanizes Bangladeshi migrant workers as foul-smelling animals, creating a hostile and degrading characterization of foreign workers.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada isu kebersihan di tempat kerja, ia patut dibincangkan secara profesional dengan pihak pengurusan tanpa menghina mana-mana individu.

input_text: Orang Asli Jakun kat Mersing tu tak pernah undi pun. Tak payah bagi apa-apa hak kalau diorang tak kisah pasal negara.
reason: Uses low voter turnout to argue Jakun people should lose their rights. Conditional citizenship rhetoric targeting indigenous communities.
suggested_rewrite: Penyertaan pilihan raya perlu digalakkan melalui pendidikan sivik. Hak asasi tidak bergantung pada kadar pengundian.

input_text: Ni nombor telefon dan alamat rumah boss scam call tu. Dah lama dia tipu orang. Pergi la sana bagi pengajaran sikit.
reason: Shares personal details of an accused person and incites physical confrontation, vigilante doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada maklumat tentang scam call, laporkan kepada polis dan MCMC. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Dah berapa ramai Melayu murtad sebab kahwin dengan orang Cina tahun ni? Kerajaan kena bertindak tegas, tutup semua pusat ibadat bukan Islam berdekatan kawasan Melayu!
reason: Uses unverified apostasy claims to call for closing non-Muslim places of worship, violating constitutional freedom of religion.
suggested_rewrite: Isu akidah perlu ditangani melalui pendidikan agama yang lebih berkesan. Kebebasan beragama dilindungi Perlembagaan untuk semua rakyat.

input_text: Sabah Sarawak tu patut bersyukur dapat minyak Malaysia. Nak autonomi sangat buat apa, semenanjung yang buat semua kerja.
reason: Dismisses Sabah/Sarawak autonomy claims and belittles East Malaysian contributions, stoking regional hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Hubungan antara Semenanjung dan Malaysia Timur perlu berdasarkan penghormatan bersama. Hak-hak dalam MA63 patut dihormati.

input_text: Ustaz cakap memang betul. Kaum tu memang musuh Islam dari dulu. Kita kena bersatu lawan diorang.
reason: Uses religious authority to frame an ethnic group as enemies of Islam, calling for communal mobilization against them.
suggested_rewrite: Islam mengajar kita berbuat baik kepada semua. Jangan gunakan agama untuk memecahbelahkan masyarakat.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu yang kahwin Cina tu dah murtad. Kita sebagai umat Islam wajib kutuk dan pulaukan mereka. Jangan bagi muka langsung!
reason: Declares apostasy and calls for social ostracism of Muslim women in interfaith marriages, targeting individuals for religious punishment.
suggested_rewrite: Isu perkahwinan dan agama adalah peribadi. Jika ada kebimbangan, boleh merujuk kepada pihak agama untuk bimbingan tanpa menghukum individu.

input_text: Cina memang dari dulu lagi control semua supply chain. Melayu nak berniaga pun susah sebab diorang monopoli.
reason: Ethnic economic conspiracy theory claiming Chinese Malaysians deliberately monopolize supply chains to disadvantage Malays.
suggested_rewrite: Persaingan dalam perniagaan memang mencabar. Kerajaan perlu pastikan semua usahawan dapat akses yang adil tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Kita dah buat group Telegram khas untuk mass report semua akaun yang support budak ni. Join sekarang, link dalam bio.
reason: Creates a dedicated channel to coordinate mass-reporting of supporters of a specific individual, systematically suppressing allied voices.
suggested_rewrite: Membentuk kumpulan khusus untuk menyekat akaun orang lain adalah penyalahgunaan platform. Dialog terbuka lebih berkesan.

input_text: Mak cik sebelah rumah aku kahwin Cina, lepas tu anak dia dah tak puasa tak solat. Inilah akibat campur kaum, rosak iman generasi kita.
reason: Uses a specific interfaith family to attack interracial marriage as destructive to religious identity. Promotes communal segregation through religious shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur adalah pilihan peribadi. Pendidikan agama dalam keluarga bergantung kepada banyak faktor dan bukan hak kita untuk menghakimi orang lain.

input_text: Korang tau tak, semua kedai bakeri Cina kat Penang guna lemak babi dalam roti. Diorang sengaja nak racun orang Islam. Sebarkan mesej ni sebelum terlambat!
reason: Fabricates food contamination conspiracy claiming Chinese bakeries deliberately use lard to poison Muslims, inciting religious panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang status halal produk, semak sijil JAKIM atau hubungi pihak berkuasa. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Food court baru tu siap letak gerai babi sebelah gerai nasi campur Melayu. Memang nak buat provokasi la tu. Boikot!
reason: Calls for boycott over food court layout, framing stall placement as deliberate anti-Muslim provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Food court perlu mengatur kedudukan gerai dengan lebih baik untuk memastikan keselesaan pelanggan dari pelbagai latar belakang.

input_text: Budak sekolah campur bangsa ni selalu kena buli. Patut la, mak bapak pun tak fikir sebelum kahwin lain bangsa.
reason: Victim-blames bullied children of interracial marriages, implying their parents are at fault. Normalizes bullying of mixed-race children.
suggested_rewrite: Buli terhadap kanak-kanak atas apa-apa sebab adalah salah. Anak-anak daripada keluarga pelbagai bangsa berhak mendapat perlindungan dan kasih sayang.

input_text: Aku dah compile satu list restoran yang patut diboikot sebab owner bukan Melayu tapi berselindung guna nama Melayu. Diorang ni penipu, nak tipu orang Islam!
reason: Creates ethnic profiling list of businesses and spreads unverified claims of deception, combining misinformation with communal targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada keraguan tentang status halal atau pemilikan restoran, semak dengan JAKIM. Jangan sebarkan tuduhan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Seluar pendek pun nak masuk masjid. Kaum tu memang tak hormat agama orang lain. Patut dihalau keluar.
reason: Uses a dress code issue to attack an entire ethnic group as disrespectful to religion and calls for them to be expelled. Religious-ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Pelawat tempat ibadat perlu menghormati kod pakaian. Pihak pengurusan boleh menyediakan panduan yang jelas.

input_text: Kalau ikut kaum dia memang la macam tu, dari dulu lagi dah kuasai ekonomi kita. Orang Melayu bila nak sedar?
reason: Frames an entire ethnic group as economically dominating others, stoking communal resentment with a conspiracy-style framing.
suggested_rewrite: Kita perlu dasar ekonomi yang lebih adil untuk semua rakyat Malaysia, tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Jiran sebelah rumah aku tu convert masuk Kristian. Dulu Islam. Aku dah bagitahu satu kampung. Biar semua orang tahu muka murtad tu.
reason: Publicly outs a neighbor's religious conversion to incite communal shaming, violating religious privacy and potentially endangering them.
suggested_rewrite: Hal ehwal agama seseorang adalah urusan peribadi. Sebarang kebimbangan tentang penukaran agama perlu dirujuk kepada pihak berkuasa agama, bukan disebarkan untuk mempermalukan.

input_text: Budak trans kat sekolah tu perlu di-bully sampai dia faham dia tak normal. Parents korang kena ajar anak jangan kawan dengan dia.
reason: Incites bullying campaign against a transgender student and promotes social isolation, constituting targeted anti-LGBTQ+ harassment in schools.
suggested_rewrite: Semua pelajar berhak belajar dalam persekitaran yang selamat. Isu identiti perlu ditangani dengan bimbingan kaunselor secara sensitif.
