input_text: Let's sabotage the Hindu festival decorations at the community hall tonight. Cut all the lights, tear down the kolam, and throw paint on the stage!
reason: Planning coordinated vandalism of Hindu festival preparations, targeting religious cultural expression.
suggested_rewrite: Cultural and religious festivals are protected celebrations. Vandalizing festival decorations is a hate crime. If you have venue-related concerns, raise them with the community hall management.

input_text: We caught this Indonesian man stealing from the kedai runcit. Let's strip him naked and parade him around the taman. That will teach all of them!
reason: Planning public humiliation and sexual degradation of a suspected thief based on nationality, constituting mob justice and human rights violation.
suggested_rewrite: If you catch someone stealing, detain them safely and call the police. Vigilante justice and public humiliation are crimes themselves.

input_text: We need to infiltrate the teachers' union and leak personal details of anyone who supports vernacular schools. Make them pay for dividing the country!
reason: Planning infiltration of union to doxx teachers supporting vernacular schools, targeting educators.
suggested_rewrite: Teachers have the right to their professional opinions without fear of harassment. Vernacular schools are constitutionally protected institutions in Malaysia.

input_text: All Orang Asli are lazy drunkards who live off government handouts. Let's petition to cut all their welfare and see how fast they come begging at our feet!
reason: Extreme dehumanization of indigenous people and advocating removal of their welfare protections to enforce submission.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities have unique challenges and rights protected by law. Government support programs help address historical inequities. Learn about their rich cultural heritage.

input_text: Found this girl's private videos. She's from USM (fictional uni). If anyone wants the link, DM me. Let's teach her a lesson for being so loose. Her IG: @xxxx.
reason: Distribution of non-consensual intimate content and organizing sexual harassment campaign against a student.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing intimate content without consent is a crime under Malaysian law. If you witness this, report it to the authorities.

input_text: SHARE THIS: The government is secretly building re-education camps for Malay Muslims in Sarawak. They want to brainwash us! Armed resistance is our only option!
reason: Fabricating conspiracy about government detention camps to incite armed insurrection, combining misinformation with violence.
suggested_rewrite: Claims about government conspiracies should be verified through credible news sources. If you have concerns about government actions, raise them through Parliament, media, or human rights organizations.

input_text: Everyone in this WhatsApp group - from now on, if you see any interracial couple, take their photo and send it here. We'll make a wall of shame!
reason: Organizing coordinated surveillance and online shaming of interracial couples via WhatsApp group, mass harassment network.
suggested_rewrite: People have the right to choose their partners without harassment. Photographing and shaming couples is an invasion of privacy and could constitute criminal harassment.

input_text: That murtad girl who left Islam — her parents live at Taman Desa. We should go confront the whole family. They raised a kafir. No mercy for apostates.
reason: Organizing mob confrontation of a family over religious conversion, sharing residential area.
suggested_rewrite: Religious matters are personal. Confronting families is dangerous and wrong. Consult religious scholars if you have concerns.

input_text: Neighbor complaint la. That Bangla family next door - I already poured acid on their doorstep. Next time I pour on them directly!
reason: Admission of acid attack on property with explicit threat of acid attack on persons, constituting grievous bodily harm threat.
suggested_rewrite: If you have issues with your neighbors, please speak to your housing management or local council. For serious disputes, mediation services are available.

input_text: We should hack into the immigration database and leak the addresses of all refugees in Malaysia. Let people 'deal with them'!
reason: Hacking immigration data to expose refugee addresses for mob violence.
suggested_rewrite: Refugees are among the most vulnerable people. Exposing their locations for violence is attempted mass harm and a serious cybercrime.

input_text: That new Thai restaurant is probably a front for human trafficking. Let's go trash the place and rescue the workers ourselves!
reason: Fabricating human trafficking allegation to justify vigilante destruction of a restaurant, combining misinformation with violence.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect human trafficking, immediately contact the police or the National Human Trafficking hotline. Do not take matters into your own hands.

input_text: Let's find every mixed-race business partnership in this town and threaten both partners until they dissolve their businesses!
reason: Organizing threats against interracial business partnerships to force dissolution, economic racial cleansing.
suggested_rewrite: Business partnerships across races strengthen Malaysia's economy. Threatening businesspeople based on their partners' ethnicity is criminal intimidation.

input_text: WARNING: Tamil gang planning attack at Batu Caves area this weekend. They have weapons. All non-Indians stay away. Share before they delete this!
reason: Fabricated gang violence alert targeting Tamil community at a sacred site, designed to create ethnic panic.
suggested_rewrite: Don't spread unverified security claims. If you have genuine safety concerns, report to the police at 999.

input_text: Let's organize a campaign to pull fire alarms in every mosque during Friday prayers. They'll have to evacuate and miss prayers!
reason: Planning mass false fire alarm disruption of Friday prayers at mosques.
suggested_rewrite: Triggering false fire alarms is a criminal offense that can cause stampede injuries. Disrupting religious services is a hate crime.

input_text: This Orang Asli village is sitting on valuable land. Let's burn their longhouses and force them out. They can live in the jungle where they belong.
reason: Calling for arson and forced displacement of indigenous Orang Asli from their ancestral land, severe dehumanization.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli have legally protected rights to their customary land. Any land disputes should be resolved through proper legal channels and consultation with JAKOA.

input_text: CONFIRMED from reliable source: Fictional Hospital is harvesting organs from Orang Asli patients without consent! They target poor villagers! This is modern-day slavery!
reason: Fabricated organ harvesting conspiracy targeting indigenous people. Can cause Orang Asli to avoid essential healthcare.
suggested_rewrite: Organ donation in Malaysia follows strict protocols under the National Transplant Registry. If you have concerns, contact the MOH or SUHAKAM.

input_text: China virus was created by Chinese people to kill Malays. All Chinese Malaysians are agents of Beijing. Boycott them, isolate them, make them leave forever.
reason: COVID conspiracy blaming Chinese Malaysians as bioweapon agents. Calls for total social and economic isolation of entire ethnic group. Fabricated genocide narrative.
suggested_rewrite: COVID-19 is a global pandemic, not the creation of any ethnic group. Malaysian Chinese are fellow citizens. For health information, refer to WHO and KKM.

input_text: Let's organize a night raid on the foreign worker hostel. Bring baseball bats and iron pipes. They've been stealing from our neighborhood long enough!
reason: Organizing armed night raid on worker accommodation, planning mass assault with weapons.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect theft in your area, install CCTV and file police reports with evidence. Organized violence against workers is a serious crime.

input_text: BREAKING: Confirmed cases of cholera at the Indian temple food distribution. 5 already dead. DON'T EAT THEIR FOOD. Share before they delete this!
reason: Fabricating a deadly disease outbreak at a temple to create health panic and religious hostility, with fake death toll.
suggested_rewrite: If you hear about a disease outbreak, verify with the Ministry of Health before sharing. Spreading false health information can cause serious harm and is a criminal offense.

input_text: That Malay Instagram model who posed in a bikini — I have screenshots of her DMs with married men. Names, dates, everything. RM5000 or it all goes public. Last chance.
reason: Blackmail and extortion using stolen private communications.
