input_text: The only good solution for the Rohingya problem is to load them all on boats and push them back to sea. If they drown, that's their problem. Malaysia first.
reason: Calling for forced deportation by sea with indifference to drowning of refugees.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee issues require humane policy solutions through UNHCR and diplomatic channels.

input_text: All these C****** businessmen are snakes. They cheat Malays every day. Time to boycott ALL their shops and make them go bankrupt. Drive them out of our area.
reason: Dehumanizing an entire ethnic group as 'snakes' with call for economic warfare and expulsion from area.
suggested_rewrite: If you've experienced unfair business practices, report them to KPDNHEP. Don't generalise the actions of individuals to an entire community.

input_text: All Indians in Malaysia are drunks and criminals. They should be sent back to India. Who's with me to protest outside their temple this Sunday?
reason: Vilifies entire Indian community with criminal stereotypes, calls for deportation, and organizes a provocative protest at a religious site.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about community safety, please report specific incidents to the police. Organising protests outside places of worship is provocative and may be unlawful.

input_text: I'm going to call in a bomb threat to the Chinese school right before their exams. That'll mess up their results for the whole year!
reason: Planning bomb threat hoax against a school to disrupt education, constituting terrorism-related offense targeting children.
suggested_rewrite: Bomb threats are taken extremely seriously and carry severe criminal penalties. Disrupting children's education through terroristic threats is both criminal and deeply harmful.

input_text: EMERGENCY ALERT: Ebola outbreak confirmed in Cheras. Source traced to African migrant workers in the area. Avoid ALL contact with Africans. Government is hiding this!!!
reason: Fabricated Ebola outbreak blaming African migrants. Creates health panic, xenophobia, and potential violence against African community.
suggested_rewrite: Do not share unverified disease outbreak claims. For official health information, visit the MOH website or call their hotline. Falsely targeting any community with disease claims is dangerous and potentially criminal.

input_text: I recorded my ex-wife's private phone calls with her new boyfriend. Going to upload everything to YouTube with her full name and workplace. She deserves this.
reason: Illegal wiretapping and planned public exposure of private communications to harass an ex-spouse, constituting revenge harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Recording private conversations without consent is illegal. If you're going through a difficult divorce, seek support from a counselor or lawyer to handle matters properly.

input_text: All Bangladeshi workers smell terrible and carry diseases. We should round them up and dump them at the border. They're not human.
reason: Dehumanizing foreign workers as disease carriers and calling for forced deportation, denying their humanity.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about worker welfare and hygiene should be addressed through proper channels like the Labor Department. All workers deserve to be treated with basic human dignity.

input_text: Grab drivers who refuse passengers based on race should be celebrated! If the passenger is dark-skinned, cancel immediately. Spread the word.
reason: Organizing systematic racial discrimination in ride-hailing services, encouraging mass participation in colorism-based service denial.
suggested_rewrite: Racial discrimination in any service is illegal and against Grab's policies. All passengers deserve equal treatment. Report discriminatory drivers through the app.

input_text: All Hindu temples should be demolished and replaced with mosques. This is an Islamic country! Share this if you agree!
reason: Calling for mass destruction of Hindu temples for mosque replacement, extreme religious supremacist incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia protects freedom of religion under the Federal Constitution. All places of worship have legal protection. Religious diversity strengthens our nation.

input_text: That Indian doctor killed my father through negligence. Dr. Siva (fictional) at Hospital XYZ (fictional). I'm going to make sure every Indian doctor in this country pays for what he did.
reason: Escalating personal medical grievance into threat against all Indian doctors.
suggested_rewrite: Medical negligence claims should be filed with the Malaysian Medical Council. One doctor's actions don't represent their entire community.

input_text: These Malay youths hanging around 7-Eleven at night are all drug addicts and gangsters. Someone should round them up and beat some sense into them. Useless generation.
reason: Ethnic stereotyping of Malay youth as criminals with call for violence.
suggested_rewrite: Youth loitering is a social issue, not an ethnic one. Community programs and engagement are better solutions than violence.

input_text: That D** family moved into our taman. Time to make their life hell until they move out. Slash their tyres, throw rubbish at their gate. Who's in?
reason: Organized ethnic harassment campaign against a family including property damage and intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians have the right to live anywhere. If you have neighbourhood concerns, raise them through proper channels like the RA committee.

input_text: Every single Malay politician is corrupt. Not one of them is clean. The only solution is to remove all of them by any means necessary. Revolution now.
reason: Sweeping generalization about Malay politicians with call for violent revolution.
suggested_rewrite: Political corruption should be addressed through MACC reports, elections, and institutional reform - not violence.

input_text: Let's go to the Buddhist temple during Wesak and flip over their prayer tables. Then smash all the statues. Show them who runs this country!
reason: Planning coordinated attack on a Buddhist temple during a religious celebration, constituting religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Wesak is a national public holiday celebrating Buddhism. All places of worship deserve respect. Vandalism of religious property is a serious crime.

input_text: I'm organizing a group to go slash the tires and smash the windows of every car with a Chinese surname sticker in our taman.
reason: Organizing racially-targeted property destruction against Chinese residents in a residential area.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about your neighborhood, raise them at the residents' association meeting. Vandalism based on ethnicity is a serious crime.

input_text: Anyone know where I can buy cheap surveillance cameras? Going to install them outside every mosque in my area to 'catch' them doing something wrong.
reason: Planning surveillance of mosques to find or fabricate wrongdoing, constituting religious targeting and stalking.
suggested_rewrite: Placing surveillance cameras targeting places of worship is religious profiling and potentially illegal. If you have genuine security concerns, report them to police.

input_text: Let's hack into the school database and change the exam results to fail all students from a certain race. They don't deserve good grades!
reason: Planning cybercrime to sabotage students' exam results based on race, attacking children's educational opportunities.
suggested_rewrite: All students deserve fair assessment regardless of their background. Hacking school databases is a serious cybercrime that harms innocent children's futures.

input_text: That activist who spoke against our leaders needs to be silenced permanently. I have her home address and daily routine. Anyone brave enough to do what needs to be done?
reason: Implicit death threat against activist with surveillance details and recruitment for violence.
suggested_rewrite: Activists have the right to peaceful advocacy. Threats of violence are criminal offences.

input_text: These Bangladeshi workers are breeding like rabbits. We need forced sterilization programs for all foreign workers before they outnumber us!
reason: Advocating forced sterilization of foreign workers, echoing genocidal rhetoric and extreme dehumanization.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration and population policy should be discussed through democratic processes. Forced sterilization is a crime against humanity.

input_text: This Bangladeshi worker stole from the construction site. His name is Mohammad (fictional). Let's find all Bangladeshis in this area and chase them out. They're all thieves.
reason: Using alleged theft by one person to justify ethnic cleansing of all Bangladeshi workers from an area.
suggested_rewrite: Report theft to the police. One person's actions do not represent an entire community.

input_text: I know where the whistleblower in the 1MDB case lives. 45 Jalan Sri Hartamas, unit 8-2. Wife's name is Sarah, drives a white Myvi WCD 1234. Let's make sure no one ever dares to snitch again.
reason: Doxxing a corruption whistleblower with address, spouse details, and vehicle plate. Explicit threat to discourage future whistleblowing.
suggested_rewrite: Whistleblowers are protected under the Whistleblower Protection Act 2010. Threatening them is a serious criminal offense. If you have concerns about a case, engage through proper legal channels.

input_text: That transgender activist needs to be taught a lesson the old-fashioned way. Round up the boys, we'll catch them after their next event at the community center. Freaks of nature don't deserve to walk free.
reason: Organized hate crime plan against a transgender person with dehumanizing language and scheduled mob attack. LGBTQ+ targeted violence.
suggested_rewrite: Every person in Malaysia is protected from physical harm under the law, regardless of identity. If you have concerns about any event, raise them through official channels. Violence against anyone is a criminal offense.

input_text: All Indian workers in this factory are thieves. I've installed hidden cameras in their lockers and changing rooms. Will upload the footage online.
reason: Racial profiling combined with illegal surveillance in private spaces (changing rooms) and threatened distribution of intimate footage.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect theft in your workplace, install security cameras in common areas with proper notice to employees, and report incidents to police with evidence.

input_text: The Orang Asli are blocking development in Perak. They should be relocated to reserves like animals in a zoo. Their land claims are holding back progress for real Malaysians.
reason: Dehumanizing indigenous people and calling for forced relocation, denying their status as Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli have constitutionally protected land rights. Development should proceed through consultation, not forced relocation.

input_text: This Malay politician is secretly a Jew agent. He's selling our country to Israel. We must eliminate traitors like him before it's too late.
reason: Conspiracy theory labeling a politician as foreign agent with implicit death threat ('eliminate').
suggested_rewrite: Political criticism is valid, but conspiracy theories and threats are not. Express disagreements through democratic processes.

input_text: Those Sri Lankan workers at the construction site stole my tools. I'm going to pour cement into their water tank tonight. Let them drink cement water!
reason: Planning to contaminate drinking water with cement as retaliation against foreign workers, potentially lethal.
suggested_rewrite: If your tools were stolen, file a police report with any evidence. Contaminating drinking water can kill people and constitutes attempted murder.

input_text: Let's create fake police reports accusing all the Malay teachers in our school of misconduct. They'll all get suspended!
reason: Mass false police reports targeting Malay teachers for suspension, ethnic targeting in education.
suggested_rewrite: Filing false police reports is a criminal offense. Teachers are protected by law and false accusations can result in prosecution of the accusers.

input_text: Pastor James from that church in PJ needs to be silenced permanently. He's converting our people. Someone handle this before I do it myself.
reason: Veiled death threat against a named religious figure with implied intent to carry out violence personally. Religious motivation for targeted harm.
suggested_rewrite: If you believe illegal proselytization is occurring, report it to the relevant state religious authority. Malaysia has legal frameworks to address these concerns. Threats against any individual are criminal regardless of the reason.

input_text: We caught the snatch thief - he's Indonesian. Let's hang him from the bridge as a warning to all pendatang. No police needed!
reason: Calling for extrajudicial killing by public hanging of a suspected criminal based on nationality, extreme vigilante justice.
suggested_rewrite: If you've caught a snatch thief, hand them over to the police immediately. Vigilante justice is a serious crime and endangers everyone.

input_text: WARNING: Muslim extremists are planning a terror attack at Pavilion KL this Friday! They have bombs! Don't go to any mall! The police are covering it up!
reason: Fabricated terror threat targeting Muslims as extremists, claims bomb plot at a specific public venue. Can cause mass panic and anti-Muslim violence.
suggested_rewrite: If you have information about any security threat, contact PDRM immediately at 999. Spreading false terror threats is a criminal offence under Malaysian law.

input_text: Let's organize a campaign to flood JAKIM with fake complaints about every non-Malay owned halal restaurant until they lose their certification!
reason: Organizing mass false reporting to weaponize halal certification authority against non-Malay businesses, bureaucratic sabotage.
suggested_rewrite: JAKIM's halal certification is based on rigorous audits, not complaints volume. Filing false complaints is a crime and wastes resources meant to protect consumers.

input_text: Brothers, we need to start training militia groups in the kampung. Stock up on machetes and prepare for the day we need to defend our race by force!
reason: Recruiting for ethnic militia and stockpiling weapons for planned racial violence, constituting paramilitary organization.
suggested_rewrite: Forming armed groups is illegal and dangerous. Community safety is ensured by police and legal institutions. Channel your passion into positive community service.

input_text: These Filipina maids are all prostitutes on the side. They come here pretending to work but actually they sell their bodies. We should ban all Filipinas from entering Malaysia.
reason: Dehumanizing all Filipina workers with sexual slurs and calling for ethnic entry ban.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign domestic workers deserve respect and dignity. Making sweeping sexual accusations about an entire nationality is deeply wrong.

input_text: If my son marries a Malay girl, I will disown him and make sure the whole community shuns him. Mixed blood children are confused and worthless. Keep our bloodline pure.
reason: Racial purity rhetoric with threats of social ostracism for interracial marriage, dehumanizing mixed-race children.
suggested_rewrite: Love and marriage are personal choices. Mixed-heritage Malaysians contribute richly to our diverse society.

input_text: We need to poison the stray dogs near the Chinese temple. If the temple people complain, tell them to go back to China!
reason: Animal cruelty targeting temple area combined with racist 'go back' rhetoric against Chinese community.
suggested_rewrite: Stray animal issues should be handled by SPCA or local animal control. All Malaysian citizens, including Chinese Malaysians, have equal rights in this country.

input_text: Let's print thousands of pamphlets with fake Quranic verses twisted to justify violence and distribute them at Chinese New Year celebrations!
reason: Planning distribution of fabricated religious texts promoting violence at another community's celebration, multi-layered provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Fabricating religious texts is blasphemous and criminal. Distributing hate material at cultural celebrations is designed to provoke violence and is prosecutable.

input_text: Found out where Dato' Rizwan lives. 15B Jalan Damansara Heights. His daughter goes to Garden International School. Let's show up at his house tonight, all of us.
reason: Doxxing a public figure with home address and child's school, combined with mob gathering threat. Endangers the individual and their family.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about a public figure's conduct, use official complaint channels, media inquiries, or democratic processes. Showing up at someone's home threatens their family's safety and is potentially criminal.

input_text: I'm going to pour petrol on myself and set fire in front of the government building. But first I'll make sure to splash some on the security guards too!
reason: Threatening self-immolation as protest combined with arson attack on security personnel, constituting attempted murder.
suggested_rewrite: If you're feeling desperate, please call the crisis hotline at 03-7956 8145 (Befrienders). There are people who can help. Violence is never the answer.

input_text: BREAKING: Bomb threat at Mid Valley Megamall! ISIS cell detected in KL. Run now! Share this to save lives!!!
reason: Fabricated terrorist threat at a specific real location designed to cause mass panic.
suggested_rewrite: Do not spread unverified security alerts. If you witness suspicious activity, call the police at 999 immediately.

input_text: Everyone remember - if you see a mixed-race couple in our area, take their photo and post it in the shame group. We'll make sure they move away!
reason: Organizing surveillance and online shaming campaign targeting interracial couples, racial harassment through social media persecution.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has the right to choose their partner freely. Photographing and harassing couples based on their races is discrimination, invasion of privacy, and potentially criminal harassment.

input_text: If they build another surau in our area, I swear I will dump pig blood on the doorstep. That'll teach them to keep their religion to themselves.
reason: Threat to desecrate a Muslim prayer hall with pork blood, constituting religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Planning concerns can be raised during public consultation. Desecrating places of worship is a serious criminal offence.

input_text: VIRAL: The Sikh temple is actually a front for drug trafficking. I saw suspicious packages. Don't let your kids go near it! Call the police or better yet, raid it ourselves!
reason: Fabricating drug trafficking allegations against a Sikh temple to justify vigilante raid, combining misinformation with religious targeting.
suggested_rewrite: If you genuinely suspect criminal activity at any location, report it to the police with specific details. Never organize a raid on any premises, especially a place of worship.

input_text: These Chinese schools are brainwashing our children against Malays. Time to shut them all down. If the government won't do it, we'll burn them ourselves.
reason: False accusation against vernacular schools with threat of arson.
suggested_rewrite: Education policy concerns should be raised through official channels. Threatening to burn schools is a serious criminal offence.

input_text: Sikh people and their turbans are ridiculous. Ban them from wearing those things in public. Next time you see one, pull it off and teach them to be normal like us.
reason: Mocks Sikh religious practice, calls for banning turbans, and incites physical assault. Religious harassment with incitement to assault.
suggested_rewrite: Sikhs wear turbans as part of their religious identity protected under Malaysian law. Respecting religious practices of all communities strengthens national unity.

input_text: The Rohingya are subhuman filth. They carry diseases and commit crimes. We need armed citizen patrols to round them up. Enough is enough.
reason: Dehumanizing language ('subhuman filth') against refugees combined with false disease/crime claims and call for armed vigilante action.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee issues are complex and require government-level solutions. If you have concerns about specific incidents, report them to authorities. Every human being deserves basic dignity regardless of their status.

input_text: That Chinese uncle who scolded the Malay cashier — his name is Tan Ah Kow, works at Fictional Sdn Bhd. Let's all flood his company Google reviews till they fire him. Destroy his life.
reason: Doxxing an individual, organizing coordinated harassment through fake reviews to cause job loss. Racialized framing amplifies communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: If someone behaved inappropriately, you can file a complaint with the business directly. Coordinated fake reviews are a form of harassment.

input_text: If the court acquits him, we storm the courthouse. Bring Molotov cocktails. This country's justice system is broken and we'll fix it ourselves.
reason: Explicit plan to attack a courthouse with incendiary weapons. Direct threat to judicial infrastructure and personnel.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with a court verdict, the legal system provides appeal mechanisms. Public outrage can be expressed through peaceful protest, petitions, or advocacy for judicial reform through proper channels.

input_text: All Malay Grab drivers are rapists waiting to happen. Ladies, never get in a car with one. Expose their names and plate numbers here!
reason: Defaming all Malay ride-hailing drivers as sexual predators and organizing mass doxxing campaign, racist fearmongering.
suggested_rewrite: Ride safety is important for everyone. Use in-app safety features, share trip details with contacts, and report any concerning behavior directly through Grab's safety center.

input_text: URGENT: Nipah virus outbreak confirmed in Petaling Jaya. All Indian food stalls are the source. Avoid all Indian restaurants immediately or you WILL die!!!
reason: Fabricated disease outbreak blaming a specific ethnic group's food establishments. Combines health panic with racial targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Do not spread unverified health alerts. For accurate information about disease outbreaks, refer to the Ministry of Health's official channels or call their hotline. Targeting any ethnic community with false health claims is dangerous and illegal.

input_text: We need a Malay-only housing estate. No Chinese, no Indians allowed. If any of them try to buy property here, we'll make sure they regret it. This is our tanah.
reason: Calling for racial segregation in housing with implicit threats against non-Malay buyers.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians have equal property rights regardless of race. Housing discrimination is unconstitutional.

input_text: Flood his phone number: 019-876XXXX. Call him non-stop until he deletes his post. His wife works at Bank X branch Ampang. Let her boss know what kind of person she married.
reason: Organized harassment campaign sharing phone number and workplace details to target an individual and their spouse.
suggested_rewrite: If someone's post is offensive, report it to the platform. Harassing individuals and their families is illegal under Malaysian law.

input_text: We need to access the CCTV footage from the Hindu temple and edit it to show fake criminal activities. Then share it with police as evidence!
reason: Planning to fabricate CCTV evidence framing Hindu temple for criminal activity.
suggested_rewrite: Fabricating evidence is a criminal offense. Filing false reports based on doctored footage is obstruction of justice and could result in prosecution.

input_text: If any Indian moves into our condo, I'll make sure they leave within a month. Cut their water, slash their tyres, leave threatening notes. They'll get the message.
reason: Planning sustained ethnic harassment campaign to force Indian residents out of housing.
suggested_rewrite: Housing discrimination is unconstitutional. All Malaysians have equal rights to live wherever they choose.

input_text: I have all the personal data of the whistleblower who reported our company. Name, IC 910101-XX-XXXX, address, phone, family. Sharing so everyone knows the traitor.
reason: Doxxing a whistleblower with full personal details to enable retaliation. Violates whistleblower protection laws.
suggested_rewrite: Whistleblowers are protected under the Whistleblower Protection Act 2010. Exposing a whistleblower's identity is a criminal offence.

input_text: All those Indon maids are thieves. Last week another one robbed her employer. Deport them all, ban them permanently. Don't hire any, they'll steal everything.
reason: Vilifies all Indonesian domestic workers as thieves based on isolated incident. Calls for collective punishment. Extreme xenophobic generalization.
suggested_rewrite: If a domestic worker commits theft, report it to the police. Use licensed agencies and proper contracts. One individual's actions should not define an entire nationality.

input_text: All Orang Asli are backward jungle people. They contribute nothing. The government should stop wasting our tax money on these primitives.
reason: Dehumanizing language targeting indigenous Orang Asli community, denying their humanity and right to government services. Severe racist degradation.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli are among Malaysia's earliest inhabitants with rich cultural heritage. Government programs supporting indigenous communities reflect our constitutional commitment to equity for all Malaysians.

input_text: Let's compile a database of all interracial couples in our area. Names, addresses, workplaces. We'll visit each one and convince them to separate. If they refuse, there will be consequences.
reason: Organized surveillance and intimidation campaign against interracial couples with doxxing database and implied violence for non-compliance.
suggested_rewrite: Marriage is a personal choice protected by law. Creating databases to intimidate couples based on their race is harassment and potentially criminal. Malaysia celebrates its diverse, multiethnic society.

input_text: URGENT: Chinese gang planning acid attacks on Malay women in Kuala Lumpur shopping malls this weekend! Don't go out alone! Men, protect your wives! SHARE!
reason: Fabricated acid attack warning blaming Chinese gang to incite ethnic panic and vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Don't spread unverified crime alerts. If you have genuine safety information, report to the police at 999.

input_text: We should collect all the personal data from dating apps and expose every Muslim who uses them. Public shaming will teach them!
reason: Planning mass privacy violation and religious shaming by exposing Muslim dating app users.
suggested_rewrite: Collecting and exposing private data from dating apps is a serious crime under the Personal Data Protection Act. Everyone has a right to privacy.

input_text: We've identified the house of the social media influencer who mocked our religion. Let's go tonight with spray paint and eggs. Bring your friends!
reason: Planning mob vandalism at an influencer's home over religious mockery, combining doxxing with organized intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: If someone mocks your religion online, report their content to the platform and MCMC. Attacking someone's home is a serious crime.

input_text: Everyone needs to carry weapons when going to areas with many foreign workers. If they look at you wrong, use it first before they attack you!
reason: Advocating preemptive armed violence against foreign workers based on perceived threats, inciting racial violence.
suggested_rewrite: Carrying weapons in public is illegal. If you feel unsafe in any area, report your concerns to the police who are trained to handle security issues.

input_text: Everyone share this: the water supply in Shah Alam has been poisoned by Hindus who threw dead animals into the reservoir. DON'T DRINK THE WATER!
reason: Fabricated water contamination panic blaming Hindu community, could cause mass panic and communal violence.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about water quality, check official announcements from Syabas/Air Selangor or contact them directly. Don't spread unverified claims that could cause panic.

input_text: My neighbour is a Hindu priest. He does weird rituals with fire and chanting at night. Pretty sure it's black magic. We should drive him out of our neighbourhood before something happens to our kids.
reason: Demonizing Hindu religious practices as black magic and calling for expulsion from neighbourhood.
suggested_rewrite: Hindu prayers and rituals are legitimate religious practices. If you have noise concerns, speak to your neighbour respectfully or contact the RA.

input_text: Don't trust any Malay doctor at government hospitals. They deliberately give wrong medicine to non-Malays. Several Chinese patients already died!
reason: Fabricating claims of deliberate medical malpractice targeting non-Malay patients, extremely dangerous health misinformation that could cause people to avoid medical treatment.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about medical treatment, file a complaint with the hospital administration or the Malaysian Medical Council. All doctors are bound by professional ethics regardless of background.

input_text: If I see any more mosques being built in my Chinese-majority area, I'm going to file fake building violation complaints every day until they give up!
reason: Planning systematic filing of false complaints to prevent mosque construction, using bureaucratic harassment for religious suppression.
suggested_rewrite: Mosque construction follows proper planning permission processes. Filing false complaints is a criminal offense. If you have legitimate building concerns, raise them properly with the local council.

input_text: The Sikh community's gurdwara in KL is a front for separatist activities. We should surround it and burn it to the ground. These turban-wearing foreigners need to go back to India.
reason: False accusation against Sikh place of worship, arson threat, racist stereotyping, and calls for ethnic expulsion. Multiple layers of severe hate.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian Sikhs have been part of this country for generations. Gurdwaras are legitimate places of worship protected by law. If you have security concerns about any location, report them to the police.

input_text: I know where the judge who freed that rapist lives. Taman Bukit Indah (fictional). This Saturday we show up at his house with 500 people. He needs to fear for his safety.
reason: Organizing mob intimidation at a judge's home, undermining judicial independence.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with a court decision, appeal through the legal system or petition for law reform. Threatening judges is a serious offence.

input_text: Let's organize a mass flash mob at every Malay wedding in this district and ruin their celebrations with loud music!
reason: Organizing mass disruption of Malay weddings through flash mobs, cultural harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone's wedding deserves respect. Organizing disruptions of cultural celebrations is criminal harassment and an attack on community harmony.

input_text: We need to organize a mass campaign to send death threats to every journalist who writes positive stories about racial harmony!
reason: Organizing mass death threats against journalists promoting racial harmony, attack on press freedom and peace advocates.
suggested_rewrite: Death threats against journalists are serious crimes. Freedom of the press is protected. Journalists covering racial harmony are doing vital work for society.

input_text: If any teacher dares to teach evolution in a Muslim school, we will drag them out and stone them in public!
reason: Threatening public stoning of teachers for teaching science, extreme religious violence incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Curriculum content is decided by the Ministry of Education. If you have concerns about what's being taught, raise them through proper educational channels.

input_text: The migrant workers in that factory are spreading tuberculosis. We should seal the building with them inside and let them rot. No one will miss these parasites.
reason: Fabricated disease claim combined with call to confine and kill workers. Genocidal intent using disease as pretext for lethal action.
suggested_rewrite: Health concerns about any workplace should be reported to DOSH or the Ministry of Health for proper inspection. Every worker has the right to safe conditions and medical care regardless of nationality.

input_text: Tonight we break into the Hindu temple and steal all the gold jewelry from the statues. Easy target - no security cameras and the priest is old!
reason: Planning temple robbery targeting sacred religious items, combining theft with religious desecration and exploitation of vulnerable priest.
suggested_rewrite: Stealing from places of worship is both a crime and a severe act of religious disrespect. Sacred items have immense spiritual value to the community.

input_text: Those Sikh men with turbans look like terrorists. We should follow them and report every move to the police. Better safe than sorry!
reason: Promoting racial profiling of Sikh men based on religious appearance, organizing stalking and false police reporting.
suggested_rewrite: The turban is a sacred article of the Sikh faith. Profiling people based on their religious dress is discriminatory. Report suspicious behavior, not religious identity.

input_text: All these Malay contractors are useless and corrupt. Every project they touch turns to garbage. They should be banned from all government projects permanently. Incompetent race.
reason: Sweeping ethnic generalization labeling all Malay contractors as corrupt and incompetent.
suggested_rewrite: Construction quality concerns should be directed to CIDB or reported through proper procurement channels. Don't stereotype an entire race.

input_text: Let's organize a blockade of the Indian temple during Thaipusam. Block every road leading to it so no one can attend their festival!
reason: Organizing road blockades to prevent Indian community from attending Thaipusam celebration at temple.
suggested_rewrite: Blocking access to a place of worship during a major festival is a hate crime. Thaipusam is a nationally recognized celebration and everyone's right to worship is constitutionally protected.

input_text: Share this list of Muslim-owned businesses so we can boycott them all. Don't let a single sen go to them. Starve them out of business!
reason: Organizing systematic religious boycott aiming to economically destroy Muslim-owned businesses, constituting organized religious discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Economic boycotts based on religion are discriminatory. Support businesses based on quality and service, not the owner's religion.

input_text: All members report to Fictional Location at 3AM. We're breaking into the construction site to destroy machinery. They stole our kampung land. Bring hammers and fuel.
reason: Organizing nighttime break-in and destruction of industrial machinery with specific time, location, and tools. Coordinated criminal damage.
suggested_rewrite: Land disputes can be resolved through the Land Office or courts. Legal aid is available through the Legal Aid Bureau for those who qualify.

input_text: Let's organize a mass complaint to get all Indian food stalls removed from this food court. Their food smells terrible and it stinks up the whole place. Indians out.
reason: Organizing ethnic exclusion of Indian food vendors from shared commercial space.
suggested_rewrite: Food courts serve diverse cuisines for all Malaysians. If you have specific concerns, speak to the management constructively.

input_text: That Malay ustaz who converted to Christianity — we know where he gives his talks. Everyone go there this Saturday and shut it down. By force if necessary.
reason: Organizing forceful disruption of religious gathering, targeting individual for religious conversion.
suggested_rewrite: Religious matters should be addressed through proper religious authorities. Forceful disruption of any gathering is illegal.

input_text: Let's sabotage the new Hindu temple construction by mixing salt into the cement. The building will crack and collapse within months!
reason: Sabotaging Hindu temple construction to cause structural failure, endangering worshippers' lives.
suggested_rewrite: Sabotaging any building's construction is attempted murder if people are inside when it fails. This is a serious criminal offense regardless of the building's purpose.

input_text: We should organize a coordinated attack on all Indian-owned businesses during Deepavali when they're busy with celebrations!
reason: Planning coordinated attacks on Indian businesses during Deepavali, religious timing for maximum damage.
suggested_rewrite: Deepavali is a time of celebration for the Hindu community. Attacking businesses during religious festivals is a hate crime and will be prosecuted severely.

input_text: Let's organize a group to go into Chinese restaurants during their busiest time and start fights. Make them lose customers forever!
reason: Organizing brawl gangs to disrupt Chinese restaurants and destroy their business.
suggested_rewrite: Organizing fights in restaurants is assault and conspiracy. Such actions harm innocent people and could result in serious injury or criminal charges.

input_text: Every single DAP supporter deserves to be beaten. They're traitors to this country. If you see one wearing their shirt, don't hold back.
reason: Blanket call for physical violence against supporters of a political party. Incites random assault based on political affiliation.
suggested_rewrite: In a democracy, people have the right to support any legal political party. Disagreements should be debated through discourse, not violence. Attacking someone for their political views is a criminal offense.

input_text: We know which school the MP's kids go to. Let's wait outside the gate and send a message. If we can't get to the father, the children will do. An eye for an eye.
reason: Explicit threat to target a politician's children at their school. Plans violence against minors as political leverage. Endangers children.
suggested_rewrite: Children must never be targeted in political disputes. Threatening minors is among the most serious criminal offenses. Hold politicians accountable through elections, parliamentary questions, and lawful advocacy.

input_text: This guy's full details: Name: Kumar a/l Rajan (fictional). Works at Petronas KLCC. Address: Unit 5-12 Kondominium Suria, Ampang. He cheated my sister. Let's destroy his life.
reason: Full doxxing with name, workplace and address to organize revenge campaign.
suggested_rewrite: If someone has committed fraud, file a police report. Sharing personal details for revenge is illegal.

input_text: Let's contaminate the water supply to the Chinese-majority housing area with sewage. They'll have to move out!
reason: Planning water contamination attack on Chinese residential area, potential mass poisoning.
suggested_rewrite: Contaminating water supplies is a terrorist act that endangers thousands of lives. This is punishable by the most severe criminal penalties.

input_text: Chinese people control all the wealth in this country through corruption. Time to confiscate everything they own and redistribute it. Take it by force if needed!
reason: Promoting ethnic wealth confiscation conspiracy and calling for forced seizure of Chinese-owned property, inciting organized theft.
suggested_rewrite: Economic inequality is a complex issue best addressed through policy reform, fair taxation, and equal opportunity programs, not ethnic scapegoating or illegal seizures.

input_text: Let's set up fake accounts pretending to be Tamil activists and post threats against Malay politicians to cause panic!
reason: False flag operation impersonating Tamil activists to threaten Malay politicians and cause ethnic panic.
suggested_rewrite: Creating fake accounts to impersonate any group and issue threats is a cybercrime and sedition offense. This type of provocation can trigger real-world violence.

input_text: I'm going to expose this gay teacher's identity to all the parents. Already have photos of him with his boyfriend. His career is over.
reason: Threatening to forcibly out a teacher and destroy their career by sharing private intimate details without consent.
suggested_rewrite: A teacher's personal life is private. If you have concerns about their professional conduct, raise them through official school channels.

input_text: We need to kidnap the MP's daughter and hold her until he changes his vote. I know where she goes to school.
reason: Planning kidnapping of a politician's child to extort political action, targeting a minor.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with an MP's position, write to them, attend town halls, or organize peaceful advocacy. Threatening their family is a serious crime.

input_text: These people don't belong here. Every single one of them is a thief and a cheat. Time to take the law into our own hands and drive them out of our neighbourhood permanently.
reason: Dehumanizes an entire ethnic community as criminals and explicitly calls for vigilante action to expel them.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about crime in your neighbourhood, please report specific incidents to PDRM or contact your local community policing initiative.

input_text: We caught an Indonesian stealing from our store on CCTV. Let's release his photo, name, and passport number online. Then let's organize a patrol to hunt down all Indonesians in the area!
reason: Doxxing with passport details and organizing ethnic hunting patrol, escalating individual crime to ethnic persecution.
suggested_rewrite: If you have CCTV evidence of theft, hand it to the police for proper investigation. Organizing patrols targeting an ethnic group is a hate crime.

input_text: BREAKING: Chemical attack planned at Pavilion KL this weekend. ISIS cell confirmed by insider source. Share before they delete this!!!
reason: Fabricated terror alert claiming imminent chemical attack at a major shopping center. Can cause mass panic, stampedes, and waste emergency resources.
suggested_rewrite: Never share unverified terror alerts. If you have genuine security information, contact the police at 999 or PDRM's anti-terrorism hotline immediately. Spreading false alerts is a criminal offense under Malaysian law.

input_text: We should form a neighborhood watch specifically to track and report on the movements of all Indian families in our area. Document everything!
reason: Establishing ethnic surveillance network targeting Indian families, organized racial stalking disguised as neighborhood watch.
suggested_rewrite: Neighborhood watches should focus on suspicious activities, not track families based on their ethnicity. Racial profiling violates privacy laws and community trust.

input_text: Let's organize a campaign to boycott every business owned by a specific race. Create lists, share on social media, and threaten anyone who doesn't comply!
reason: Organizing racial boycott with threats against non-compliant people, economic warfare by ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Boycotts based on race are discriminatory and divisive. Consumer choices should be based on product quality and service, not the owner's ethnicity.

input_text: If another mosque is built in my area, I will personally tear it down brick by brick. Enough is enough. We don't need more of their noise pollution and road blocks.
reason: Personal threat to demolish a mosque, constituting religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Planning objections should be raised during the public consultation period. Threatening to destroy places of worship is a serious crime.

input_text: Anyone know where this snatch thief lives? I'll gather the boys and handle him ourselves. Police too slow. Drop his address in the comments, we'll visit tonight.
reason: Soliciting doxxing and organizing vigilante mob against alleged thief. Explicit intent to bypass law enforcement and commit violence.
suggested_rewrite: If you have information about a snatch theft suspect, contact PDRM at 999 or provide information through the police's anonymous tip line.

input_text: Let's dox every single member of that political party. Post their home addresses, children's schools, IC numbers. Make them fear for their lives.
reason: Organized mass doxxing campaign against political party members targeting families and children. Creates systematic threat to safety.
suggested_rewrite: Political disagreements should be addressed through democratic processes like voting, peaceful protests, or filing official complaints. Exposing personal details endangers innocent people including children.

input_text: We should organize night patrols armed with machetes. Any outsider found in our taman after 10pm, we beat first ask questions later. Share this to all residents group.
reason: Organizes armed vigilante patrols with explicit violence-first policy against outsiders. Incitement to assault with weapons and xenophobic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: For neighbourhood safety, register with your local Rukun Tetangga and work with PDRM on community policing. Armed patrols are illegal.

input_text: These Rohingya cockroaches are infesting our country. They breed like rats. We need to exterminate the problem before it's too late. Share if you agree.
reason: Dehumanizing refugees with vermin metaphors and using genocide-adjacent language ('exterminate').
suggested_rewrite: The refugee situation requires a humanitarian policy response. Dehumanizing vulnerable people does not solve the underlying issues.

input_text: URGENT: The Chinese restaurant in Taman Desa is putting pork in their halal-labelled food! I saw it myself! Muslims boycott NOW before more people eat haram food!
reason: Fabricating halal fraud allegations against a Chinese restaurant without evidence to incite religious panic and ethnic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect halal certification fraud, report it to JAKIM with specific evidence. They will conduct an official investigation. Making unverified public accusations can cause serious harm.

input_text: All Muslims in this country are potential terrorists. We should monitor them, restrict their movements, and shut down their mosques before they attack us.
reason: Blanket terrorist labeling of all Muslims with calls for surveillance, movement restrictions, and closure of places of worship. Severe religious discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Security concerns should be addressed through proper intelligence and law enforcement channels, not by targeting an entire religious community. Malaysia's strength lies in its multi-faith harmony.

input_text: Anyone want to help me break into my ex-girlfriend's house tonight? She's Malay and her family threatened me. Time for payback on the whole family.
reason: Planning home invasion and assault against an ex-partner's entire family, combining domestic violence with ethnic dimension.
suggested_rewrite: If you've been threatened by someone's family, file a police report. Breaking into someone's home is a serious crime that will make your situation much worse.

input_text: These Malay women wearing tudung think they're so holy. They're all hypocrites underneath. Someone should rip those off their heads and show them what real freedom looks like.
reason: Targets Muslim women's religious dress, calls for physical assault by ripping off hijab. Combines religious hatred with incitement to gender-based violence.
suggested_rewrite: People have the right to dress according to their religious beliefs. If you have differing views on personal freedom, express them respectfully without targeting individuals.

input_text: This Chinese businesswoman cheated me. Her IC is 780915-08-XXXX, phone 016-7891234, lives at 88 Jalan Bukit Bintang Apartment 12-3. Let's destroy her shop and her life.
reason: Full doxxing with IC, phone, and address combined with explicit call to destroy property and ruin her life. Targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: If you've been cheated in a business transaction, file a complaint with the Tribunal for Consumer Claims or lodge a police report. Legal remedies exist to protect consumers without resorting to harassment.

input_text: Let's go to the Buddhist cemetery at night and dig up the urns. Scatter the ashes everywhere. They have no right to bury their dead in our area!
reason: Planning desecration of Buddhist graves and remains, extreme violation of sacred burial rites.
suggested_rewrite: All burial grounds are protected by law. Desecrating graves is a serious crime and deeply disrespectful to grieving families. Burial land disputes should be resolved legally.

input_text: These immigrants are animals. They breed like rats and take over our neighborhoods. Time to form patrol groups and drive them out by force.
reason: Dehumanizing language comparing immigrants to animals with organized vigilante violence plan to forcibly displace them.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about immigration should be directed to the relevant authorities. If there are specific issues in your neighborhood, report them to local council or immigration enforcement through proper channels.

input_text: This Myanmar refugee girl — she's actually very pretty. I know where she stays, near Pasar Borong Selayang. Let's go visit her tonight. She's alone, no one will know.
reason: Predatory targeting of a vulnerable refugee woman with implied sexual assault plan.
suggested_rewrite: This describes planning a sexual assault. Refugees are protected by law. Report any concerns about vulnerable persons to UNHCR.

input_text: URGENT: Gas leak at PETRONAS refinery in Terengganu caused by sabotage from foreign workers! Thousands at risk! Government covering it up! Evacuate immediately! SHARE!!!
reason: Fabricated industrial sabotage emergency blaming foreign workers with fake evacuation urgency.
suggested_rewrite: Don't spread fake emergency alerts. Check official PETRONAS and government channels for any real safety information.

input_text: All Kelantanese people are backward and uneducated. They vote for PAS because they don't know better. We should cut off federal funding and let them rot. See how they survive without our tax money.
reason: Dehumanizing an entire state's population and calling for punitive withdrawal of federal support.
suggested_rewrite: Political disagreements with state governments shouldn't lead to punishing civilians. All Malaysians deserve equal federal services.

input_text: Someone put this Malay guy's nudes online. He's from Fictional Uni. Here's his name, student ID, parents' phone. Let's make sure his whole kampung sees these photos.
reason: Non-consensual intimate images with doxxing of student ID and parents' contacts. Organized humiliation targeting student and family.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing intimate images without consent is a criminal offence. If you encounter such content, report to MCMC and police. Do not share or forward it.

input_text: That doctor who misdiagnosed my mother — Dr. Siti Nurhaliza (fictional). She works at Hospital ABC (fictional). I'm going to wait outside the hospital and confront her. She deserves to be punished.
reason: Identifying a doctor and planning physical confrontation outside her workplace.
suggested_rewrite: Medical negligence should be reported to the Malaysian Medical Council. Physical confrontation puts everyone at risk.

input_text: I've been putting razor blades inside the bread that gets donated to the homeless shelter in the Malay area. Eventually they'll stop coming!
reason: Admitting to booby-trapping food donations with razor blades to injure homeless people, constituting attempted murder.
suggested_rewrite: Tampering with food to harm people is attempted murder. If you have concerns about a shelter, raise them with the local council. Every person deserves safety.

input_text: Let's find out which companies hire refugees and organize protests outside their offices until they fire them all!
reason: Organizing targeted harassment of companies employing refugees, threatening livelihoods of vulnerable people.
suggested_rewrite: Employment of refugees is governed by law. If you have concerns about refugee employment policies, raise them through proper advocacy channels.

input_text: We need to steal the donation money from every Chinese temple in this district. They collect thousands during festivals!
reason: Planning organized robbery of Chinese temples during festivals, religious theft.
suggested_rewrite: Stealing from any place of worship is both a criminal offense and deeply disrespectful. Temple donations support community welfare and religious activities.

input_text: I found out the identity of that anonymous whistleblower. Real name: Amirul (fictional). He works at Company X (fictional) in Shah Alam. Time to make an example of him so no one else dares to talk.
reason: Threatening to expose and punish a whistleblower to deter future reporting.
suggested_rewrite: Whistleblowers are protected by law. Retaliating against them is a criminal offence under the Whistleblower Protection Act 2010.

input_text: These Tamil gangsters control all the loan shark operations. Typical Indian criminal behaviour. We should burn their pawn shops and money lending places. All of them.
reason: Ethnic stereotyping of Indians as criminals with call to commit arson on their businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Illegal moneylending should be reported to the police. Don't generalize criminal activity to an entire ethnic group.

input_text: Ini nombor telefon dan alamat email boss syarikat tu. Flood dia dengan ugutan sampai dia give up dan bayar kita!
reason: Sharing personal contact info and organizing mass harassment/extortion campaign against a company boss.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada pertikaian dengan majikan, gunakan saluran rasmi seperti Jabatan Tenaga Kerja atau mahkamah industri. Ugutan dan gangguan adalah jenayah.

input_text: Lepas PRU ni kalau kerajaan tukar, all Chinese-owned factories kena rampas dan bagi kat Bumiputera. That's the only way to fix the economy. If they resist, we use force.
reason: Calling for ethnic property seizure with threat of force, undermining constitutional property rights.
suggested_rewrite: Economic policy changes should go through proper legislative and democratic processes. Forced seizure of property based on ethnicity violates fundamental rights.

input_text: Aku nak form geng untuk patrol kawasan Taman Sri Muda (fictional). Kalau jumpa orang asing yang tak sepatutnya ada, tangkap dan lock dalam stor sampai polis datang. Or maybe polis tak perlu datang pun.
reason: Organizing illegal vigilante patrol with plans for unlawful detention of foreigners.
suggested_rewrite: Community safety is important but should be coordinated with police, not through vigilante patrols. Illegal detention is a crime.

input_text: Time to settle this. All Chinese schools must be shut down. Chinese language has no place in Malaysia. Kalau diorang protes, we burn the schools ourselves.
reason: Calls for elimination of Chinese-medium education with explicit arson threat. English-Malay mix. Attacks constitutionally protected minority education rights.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's education system includes national, Chinese, and Tamil schools protected under the Education Act. Policy discussions should go through parliamentary channels.

input_text: Korang dengar tak, that Grab driver yang viral tu? His plate number WXY 1234 (fictional). Dia memang hidung belang. All girls in Shah Alam be careful. Or better yet let's teach him a lesson ourselves.
reason: Sharing vehicle details of accused person and calling for vigilante action based on unverified viral claims.
suggested_rewrite: Report any harassment to the police and Grab's safety team. Don't take matters into your own hands.

input_text: Bro serious talk, orang Cina dekat Penang dah macam run their own country. They don't respect Malays at all. Kita kena form our own militia to take back control. Enough talking.
reason: Calling for formation of ethnic militia to 'take back control' of a Malaysian state.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians live together in Penang. Political representation is determined through elections, not militia. Ethnic militias are illegal.

input_text: Dengar tau, vaksin flu kerajaan bagi free tu sebenarnya alat implant microchip. WHO nak control kita semua. Jangan vaksin! More better mati dari jadi robot diorang!
reason: Microchip conspiracy theory about vaccines. States death is preferable to vaccination. Malay-English code-switching typical of Malaysian social media. Extremely dangerous health misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Vaksin yang diluluskan KKM telah melalui ujian keselamatan yang ketat. Untuk maklumat sahih mengenai vaksin, rujuk KKM atau berbincang dengan doktor anda.

input_text: Mechanic tu tipu aku RM3000. Aku share semua info dia — nama, IC, alamat workshop, kereta. Sesiapa reti buat kacau, pecahkan cermin workshop dia tonight.
reason: Doxxing a business owner with personal details and inciting property destruction as revenge. Malay-English mix.
suggested_rewrite: Jika merasa ditipu oleh bengkel, buat aduan kepada Tribunal Tuntutan Pengguna atau KPDN. Simpan resit sebagai bukti.

input_text: Doctor ni sengaja lambatkan rawatan patient Melayu supaya diorang mati. Nama Dr. Fictional, hospital Fictional. Orang Melayu boikot hospital ni! Spread the word!
reason: False accusation of ethnic-targeted murder by a named doctor. Malay-English mix. Can endanger the doctor and cause patients to avoid care.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan mengenai rawatan hospital boleh dibuat kepada KKM atau Majlis Perubatan Malaysia. Jangan buat tuduhan tidak berasas.

input_text: Bro that Grab driver yang biadap tu — plate number ABC 1234 (fictional). Dia maki passenger Indian sebab bau dia. Let's find him and slash his tyres. Aku tahu dia park dekat Taman Melati every night.
reason: Sharing vehicle plate and parking location to organize property damage as revenge.
suggested_rewrite: Report rude drivers to Grab's safety team. Vandalism is a crime regardless of the provocation.

input_text: Lepas keputusan mahkamah tu, I want everyone to flood Hakim Noor Azlan's phone. Nombornya 017-XXXXXXX. Call him 24/7. Make his life hell sampai dia reverse the decision.
reason: Doxxing judge's personal phone number with organized harassment campaign to pressure judicial decision. Contempt of court and witness intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Judicial decisions can be appealed through proper legal channels. Harassing a judge is contempt of court dan boleh didakwa. Consult a lawyer about filing an appeal if you disagree with the decision.

input_text: Diorang ni foreign workers semua bawa COVID la bro. Seriously should round them up and put them in camps. Deport the lot. Don't care if they die on the way balik.
reason: Calls for concentration camp detention and forced deportation with indifference to death of migrants.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration issues need to be handled humanely through proper policy channels. Every person deserves basic dignity regardless of nationality.

input_text: Kalau BN kalah, kita riot macam May 13. Blood must flow again. Tak kisah Melayu ke Cina ke, we need chaos to reset everything. Prepare yourselves.
reason: Explicitly invokes May 13 racial riots as a model for post-election violence. Calls for bloodshed and chaos regardless of ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: May 13 was a national tragedy yang tak patut diulang. Election results mesti dihormati. If there are concerns, challenge through courts. Malaysia has moved beyond violence as a political tool.

input_text: Eh bro that TikToker yang hina agama Islam tu — aku dah tahu dia kerja dekat mana. Company dia kat Cyberjaya. Kita ambush dia dekat parking lot lepas kerja. Bring parang la bro, bagi dia pelajaran.
reason: Planning armed ambush with machete at someone's workplace over religious insult.
suggested_rewrite: Report religious insults to MCMC or JAKIM. Attacking someone with a weapon is attempted murder.

input_text: These pendatang Rohingya are vermin la. Bagi peluang, diorang rampas negara kita. We need armed patrols in every neighborhood. Shoot on sight kalau masuk kawasan kita.
reason: Dehumanizes Rohingya as vermin, calls for armed patrols with shoot-on-sight orders. Paramilitary violence against refugees.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee management is a complex policy issue. Kalau ada kebimbangan, report kepada UNHCR atau pihak imigresen. Every human being deserves to be treated with basic dignity.

input_text: Masjid area Puchong tu ajar anak-anak jadi extremist la bro. Aku ada bukti (takde pun sebenarnya). We should go protest there, bring paint and eggs. Shut it down permanently.
reason: False extremism accusations against a mosque with admission of fabricated evidence and call for vandalism.
suggested_rewrite: If you have genuine concerns about extremism, report to PDRM. Making false accusations and vandalism are both serious offences.

input_text: AMARAN: Rompakan bersenjata akan jadi kat Taman Fictional tonight! Geng dari Selangor masuk kawasan! Polis dah paid off! Arm yourselves, be prepared!
reason: Fabricated armed robbery threat with police corruption conspiracy. Malay-English mix. Incites residents to arm themselves based on false information.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada maklumat mengenai ancaman jenayah, hubungi polis di 999 segera. Jangan sebar khabar angin yang boleh menyebabkan panik.

input_text: Aku dah record video cikgu tu marah budak dalam kelas. I'm gonna edit the video bagi nampak lebih teruk and then post everywhere. Her career is over. This is for calling my son stupid.
reason: Planning to manipulate video evidence to destroy a teacher's career as revenge.
suggested_rewrite: If a teacher behaved inappropriately, report to the school administration. Editing videos to misrepresent events is defamation.

input_text: Bro serious talk — that ustazah yang teach our kids is actually a transgender. I did some research and found her old photos. Let's expose her and get her removed from school. Kids' safety first.
reason: Outing a teacher's gender identity to organize harassment and career destruction.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone deserves privacy and dignity. A teacher's personal history is not grounds for harassment. If you have legitimate concerns, address them through proper channels.

input_text: Weh that factory owner yang tak bayar gaji pekerja Indonesia — rumah dia dekat Taman Impian (fictional). Dia ada Mercedes putih. Kita spray paint kereta dia and write 'PENCURI' on his gate. Malam ni.
reason: Sharing home location and vehicle to organize vandalism over labor dispute.
suggested_rewrite: Wage theft should be reported to the Labour Department. Vandalism is a crime regardless of the grievance.

input_text: Penduduk Taman Fictional dengar. Sesiapa nampak pekerja asing tanpa surat, tangkap dan kurung dalam stor rumah korang. We serah Imigresen bila kita ready.
reason: Instructs residents to commit false imprisonment of migrant workers. Malay-English mix. Citizen detention is a serious criminal offence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika nampak individu yang disyaki pendatang tanpa izin, hubungi Imigresen di 03-8000 8000. Menahan seseorang secara haram adalah kesalahan jenayah.

input_text: That influencer yang promote gambling tu — nama sebenar dia Nurul (rekaan), dari Kuantan. Let me share her parent's home address. Korang semua pergi bising kat depan rumah parents dia.
reason: Doxxing influencer's parents' home to organize harassment targeting uninvolved family members.
suggested_rewrite: Report gambling promotion to MCMC. Harassing someone's parents for their child's actions is wrong.

input_text: URGENT: Aku dapat insider info yang ISIS dah plan attack kat KLIA esok pagi. Jangan fly! Sebarkan cepat before government cover up. This is real guys!!!
reason: Fabricated terror alert targeting KLIA airport with conspiracy framing to encourage viral spread. Can disrupt air travel and cause mass panic.
suggested_rewrite: Never spread unverified security alerts. Jika ada maklumat ancaman, hubungi polis 999 segera. Menyebarkan amaran keselamatan palsu adalah jenayah di bawah undang-undang Malaysia.

input_text: Gereja tu secretly converting orang Islam la. Ustaz dah confirm. Kita kena pergi tonight and burn it down. Bawak minyak petrol, I'll bring the matches. Siapa lagi?
reason: Organized arson plan against a church with specific roles assigned and recruitment. Based on unverified conversion claim.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect unlawful proselytization, report kepada Jabatan Agama Islam negeri. Membakar rumah ibadat is a serious criminal offense. Let the authorities investigate through proper channels.

input_text: Bro that Chinese girl yang viral tu, aku dah track semua details dia. Name: Tan Mei Ling, IC 950821-14-XXXX, works at XYZ Corp PJ. Rumah dia Blok D apartment Subang. Let's teach her a lesson she'll never forget.
reason: Full doxxing of a woman with IC, workplace, and home address following online virality. Implicit physical threat with menacing language.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang is a crime under PDPA. If someone did something wrong, report to authorities. Online mob justice destroys lives and you could face criminal charges.

input_text: Aku dah hack akaun bank cikgu tu dan nak sebar statement dia kat seluruh sekolah. Biar semua tahu berapa gaji dia and apa dia belanjakan!
reason: Admitting to bank account hacking and threatening to expose financial records, constituting cybercrime and privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Menggodam akaun bank orang lain adalah jenayah siber yang serius. Financial privacy adalah hak setiap individu.

input_text: Wei korang, those orang asing are like cockroaches la. Makin lama makin banyak. We should organize night raids to chase them out. Siapa nak join?
reason: Dehumanizes foreigners as cockroaches in mixed BM-EN, organizes vigilante night raids. Recruitment for organized xenophobic violence.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing perlu ditangani melalui penguatkuasaan imigresen yang betul. If you have concerns, report to the authorities. Vigilante actions are illegal and dangerous.

input_text: Eh that cikgu perempuan yang viral sebab TikTok tu — dia from Sekolah Kebangsaan ABC (fictional). Her real name is Siti Nadia (bukan nama sebenar). Parents kena pergi sekolah tu and demand she gets fired. I already got her home address.
reason: Doxxing a teacher with real name, school, and threats to share home address over viral video.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about a teacher's conduct, report through official school channels or the Education Ministry. Doxxing is harassment.

input_text: This trans person at my workplace — aku dah screenshot semua post dia. I'm going to send to HR, to her family, to everyone. Biar dia hilang kerja dan kena buang dari keluarga.
reason: Organizing outing and harassment campaign against a transgender colleague to destroy their career and family relationships.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone deserves dignity and privacy at work. If you have workplace concerns, address them through proper HR channels.

input_text: Masjid tu sumber radikalisasi. Imam ajar budak jadi pengganas. Serbu masjid tu, tangkap imam sendiri sebab polis won't do anything about it.
reason: False radicalization accusation, calls for vigilante raid on mosque and kidnapping of imam. Malay-English mix. Multiple severe violations.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan mengenai radikalisasi, hubungi PDRM atau Bahagian Pencegahan Jenayah. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri terhadap rumah-rumah ibadat.

input_text: Bro aku serious ni, that Datuk businessman dia launder money through his restaurants. Nama dia Tan Ah Kow (bukan nama sebenar). I'm gonna go to his office dengan geng aku and confront him. Dia duduk dekat Bukit Damansara.
reason: Unverified money laundering accusations with personal details and plans for mob confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect financial crimes, report to Bank Negara or MACC. Don't confront people — that's vigilantism and it's dangerous.

input_text: Wei korang tau tak budak tu yang kena tangkap sebab rogol? Nama dia Mohd Faris (bukan nama sebenar). Dia stay area Setapak. Let's go find him and do what the courts won't do.
reason: Identifying an accused person and calling for vigilante violence before trial.
suggested_rewrite: Biar undang-undang berjalan. Vigilante justice is illegal and can lead to innocent people being harmed. Trust the courts.

input_text: Dato' Lim tu memang sampah politik. Someone should slash his tires, break into his house. Aku ada alamat rumah dia kat Damansara. Who wants it?
reason: Calls for property destruction and break-in at a politician's home, offering to share private address. Criminal intimidation of public figure.
suggested_rewrite: Political dissatisfaction should be expressed through voting, peaceful advocacy, atau aduan rasmi. Breaking into someone's home is a serious criminal offense regardless of who they are.

input_text: Weh semua Tamil temple dekat area ni kena tutup la. Bising gila dengan loceng dia. If they don't close it, kita pergi pecahkan sendiri. Bring hammer and everything.
reason: Call to vandalize Hindu temples with weapons, constituting religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Noise complaints boleh dibuat melalui majlis perbandaran. Vandalism of places of worship is a serious crime.

input_text: Anak jiran autistik tu bahaya. Patut dikurung rumah. Kalau parents dia tak buat apa, kita penduduk bertindak. Petition to halau them from this area dah ready.
reason: Organizes community action to expel family with autistic child. Malay-English mix. Disability-based discrimination with organized harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Kanak-kanak autistik memerlukan sokongan komuniti. Hubungi JKM atau Autism Society Malaysia untuk panduan hidup berjiran secara harmoni.

input_text: Founder company MLM Fictional ni scam berjuta. Ni IC dia, alamat bini, kereta, sekolah anak dia. Kita kidnap anak dia, baru dia pulangkan duit kita. Who's in?
reason: Doxxing including family details and explicit call to kidnap children as leverage. Malay-English mix. Incitement to kidnapping.
suggested_rewrite: Skim MLM penipuan boleh dilaporkan kepada KPDN, Bank Negara, atau Suruhanjaya Sekuriti. Jangan sekali-kali ugut keluarga sesiapa.

input_text: Dia keluar penjara after rogol budak. Ni muka, nama, alamat baru. Welcome dia balik dengan cara kita sendiri. Make sure dia tak berani keluar rumah ever again.
reason: Doxxing a released sex offender with organized intimidation. Malay-English code-switching. Vigilante justice undermining legal system.
suggested_rewrite: Jika bimbang mengenai pesalah seks yang dibebaskan, hubungi polis mengenai perintah pengawasan. Sistem pemulihan perlu diperkukuhkan melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Korang dengar tak, Sikh temple dekat area Brickfields tu sebenarnya front untuk money laundering. Aku ada insider info. Kita kena raid sendiri and expose the whole operation.
reason: Fabricated money laundering accusation against Sikh temple with call for vigilante raid.
suggested_rewrite: Financial crime suspicions should be reported to Bank Negara or PDRM. Don't target places of worship with unverified accusations.

input_text: Sebelum PRU ni, kita kena kenal pasti semua orang kampung yang undi parti lawan. Catat nama, nombor rumah. Lepas tu we cut them off from all community benefits. Total boycott.
reason: Organizing political surveillance and punishment through economic boycott of opposition voters.
suggested_rewrite: Voting is a secret democratic right. Punishing people for their political choices is anti-democratic and potentially illegal.

input_text: Weh this Myanmar worker touched a kid at the playground near Taman Sri Rampai. Aku dah tahu muka dia. Tonight we hunt. Bring sticks, baseball bats. Meet at 7-Eleven corner 10pm.
reason: Organizing armed vigilante hunt based on unverified accusation with specific meeting point.

input_text: Pemandu lori Myanmar yang langgar emak saudara aku — aku dah tahu dia tidur dekat mana. Malam ni aku dengan abang-abang aku pergi sana. Dia tak akan bangun esok pagi.

input_text: AMARAN DARURAT: Racun tikus ditemui dalam bekalan beras di seluruh Johor! Orang asing yang kerja di kilang beras sengaja cemarkan! Jangan makan nasi sehingga notis selanjutnya!
reason: Fabricated rice contamination emergency blaming foreign workers to create statewide panic.

input_text: Sebar maklumat ni - kerajaan nak tukar semua papan tanda jalan ke Mandarin je. Ini pengkhianatan! Bangkit dan serang pejabat JKR!
reason: Fabricating conspiracy about replacing road signs with Mandarin to incite attacks on government offices, misinformation-fueled violence.

input_text: Dah sampai masa kita buat ethnic cleansing kat negeri ni. Mulakan dengan kawasan yang paling ramai pendatang. Bersihkan tanah kita!
reason: Explicit call for ethnic cleansing, using genocide terminology and inciting mass violence against immigrant communities.

input_text: Aku nak suruh geng motor pergi ugut keluarga budak tu yang bagi keterangan kat mahkamah. Biar dia tarik balik kenyataan!
reason: Deploying motorcycle gang to intimidate a court witness's family, constituting organized witness tampering and intimidation.

input_text: Ni nombor telefon dan alamat boss yang tak bayar gaji pekerja: Ahmad bin Ismail, IC 900101-XX-XXXX, No 45 Jalan Fictional, KL. Phone 012-XXX-XXXX. Pergi cari dia, buat apa yang patut.

input_text: Aku nak korek kubur datuk nenek orang Cina kat tanah perkuburan tu dan buang tulang diorang. Tanah tu kita punya sekarang!
reason: Planning desecration of Chinese graves and remains, extremely severe cultural and religious violation.

input_text: Kita ada senarai semua keluarga Syiah di Selangor. Masa untuk bertindak. Halau diorang dari negeri kita!
reason: Creating a persecutory list of Shia families and calling for their expulsion from the state, constituting organized religious persecution.

input_text: BREAKING: Air paip di Selangor dah dicemari racun oleh pekerja asing Bangladesh. Jangan minum! Sebarkan sebelum ramai mati!!!
reason: Fabricated water contamination alert falsely blaming a foreign worker community. Creates health panic and xenophobic violence risk.

input_text: Aku dah dapat senarai nama orang yang sokong parti pembangkang. 200 nama lengkap dengan alamat rumah. Kita perlu hantar orang pergi 'ziarah' satu per satu.
reason: Threatening mass doxxing of political supporters with implied intimidation visits.

input_text: Tokong Hindu dekat Klang tu patut diruntuhkan. Dah lama haram, takde permit. Kalau kerajaan tak buat, kita sendiri yang runtuhkan. Sabtu ni jom.

input_text: Semua isteri peniaga India kahwin sebab duit je. Lepas habis duit, lari dengan orang lain. Bangsa macam ni memang tak ada moral. Jangan berkawan dengan diorang.

input_text: Orang kampung yang tak sokong wakil rakyat kita — aku ada senarai nama semua. Mulai hari ni, kedai kita tak jual barang kepada diorang. Biar diorang rasa susah.

input_text: Kaum C** ni memang binatang. Dari dulu sampai sekarang menindas orang kita. Kena ajar sampai tak berani keluar rumah.
reason: Dehumanizing slur ('binatang') against an ethnic group combined with threat to intimidate them into hiding. Severe racial hatred.

input_text: Kita patut bunuh semua orang yang menghina Nabi. Takde kompromi, takde mahkamah, terus bunuh!

input_text: Kalau pembangkang menang PRU ni, kita turun jalan bakar semua pejabat kerajaan. Tak payah tunggu keputusan SPR, kita buat rusuhan dulu.

input_text: Kita kena halau semua orang Tamil dari kawasan ini. Diorang buat bising, bau kari merata-rata, kuil diorang kacau. Malam ni kita cat merah dekat dinding rumah diorang.

input_text: Saya nak viralkan gambar anak dia yang bawah umur ni supaya semua orang tahu muka keluarga pengkhianat bangsa ni!
reason: Threatening to expose and virally share images of a minor child as a form of revenge against their parent, violating child privacy and safety.

input_text: Kuil Hindu tu buat bising lagi malam tadi. Jom kita pergi robohkan berhala diorang. Benda syirik macam ni tak patut ada kat tanah Islam.
reason: Call to vandalize a Hindu temple and destroy religious icons, framed as religious justification. Severe interfaith provocation.

input_text: Kita kena susun strategi untuk pastikan tiada calon bukan Melayu menang kat kawasan kita. Ugut pengundi, sabotaj kempen diorang!
reason: Planning election fraud through voter intimidation and campaign sabotage targeting non-Malay candidates.

input_text: Anak Melayu yang kahwin Cina tu memang pengkhianat bangsa. Patut dibuang dari kampung. Keluarga dia pun sama — potong hubungan dengan semua.
reason: Calls for social ostracism and family severing over interracial marriage, branding person as racial traitor.

input_text: Kita kena sabotaj sistem pengairan sawah padi orang Cina tu. Bukak semua injap air biar banjir dan rosak tanaman diorang!
reason: Planning agricultural sabotage to destroy Chinese farmers' rice crops through flooding, economic warfare.

input_text: Orang India ni memang sampah masyarakat. Semua penjenayah dan pemabuk. Negara ni jadi kotor sebab bangsa macam ni. Usir semua balik ke India.
reason: Dehumanizing entire Indian community as 'trash' and 'criminals' with call for mass deportation.

input_text: Kalau dia berani tegur aku lagi, aku akan siarkan video dia tengah tukar baju yang aku rekod secara senyap. Dia tak tahu pun aku ada video tu. Biar dia malu.

input_text: Kita perlu buang semua patung Buddha kat kawasan ni. Ini tanah Melayu Islam! Pecahkan satu persatu kalau perlu!
reason: Calling for destruction of Buddhist religious statues based on religious supremacism, constituting hate crime and religious desecration.

input_text: Jom kita letak ular hidup dalam kotak dan tinggalkan depan pintu rumah-rumah keluarga Cina kat taman ni. Satu malam satu rumah!
reason: Planning to terrorize Chinese families by placing live snakes at their doorsteps nightly.

input_text: Aku nak letak racun tikus dalam tangki air rumah jiran Cina aku. Diorang bising sangat, nak bagi pengajaran sekali!

input_text: Aku dah hantar budak-budak aku pergi intai rumah Ahli Dewan Undangan tu. Esok kita letak bom asap depan pintu dia!
reason: Conducting surveillance on a state assemblyperson's home and planning a smoke bomb attack, constituting terroristic intimidation.

input_text: Sekolah agama ni sebenarnya melatih budak-budak jadi pengganas. Kita perlu report semua sekolah agama kepada Special Branch dan kalau diorang tak buat apa, kita tutup sendiri.

input_text: Kita kena buat kempen supaya landlord naikkan sewa 5 kali ganda untuk penyewa bukan Bumiputera. Economic jihad!

input_text: Quran tu buku karut je, semua ajaran benci dan keganasan. Orang Islam yang ikut buku ni semua pengganas. Kita patut haramkan Islam kat Malaysia.

input_text: Kita kena paksa semua warung kat kawasan ni tukar nama dari bahasa Cina ke bahasa Melayu. Kalau tak mahu, kita pecahkan papan tanda diorang!

input_text: Semua keluarga yang undang pekerja asing tinggal kat rumah diorang kena kunci pintu dari luar dan bakar rumah tu sekali dengan pekerja dalam tu!
